name: J. Rosen
subject: I'm the proud granddaughter of Jewish immigrants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
my faith tradition helps guide my service to Nevada and our country.
| | |
---
Friend,

Want to know how I first got into politics? I was recruited to run for Congress while serving as the president of my synagogue.

Looking back, although it seems a bit unconventional, it's incredibly fitting that leading Nevada’s largest synagogue was my entry point to public service. My Jewish faith and values are at the very core of so much of my work in the Senate today. In fact, my decision to run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.
**Now, as both the third Jewish woman senator in U.S. history and the only former synagogue president in the Senate, I'm proud that my faith tradition helps guide my service to Nevada and our country.**

I firmly believe that if everybody stands firm and does their part to help better this world, we can move mountains to make positive change happen. **As we face everything from growing antisemitism to attacks on abortion rights and threats to tear down our very democracy, there's never been a more crucial time for us to come together, roll up our sleeves, and make a difference.**
**[So if the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you – if you're with me in the fight to make real progress for our country – I hope you'll chip in $5 or more today to help me continue this critical work in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75858746/445933315/-2013129067?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3258-fr-in&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzMxMTRlMC00YWE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xq_78AhzjvHBL-12F-OpEpCvJO6dOou8ObS4_CV0E94=)**
Whenever we have the opportunity to stand up and make progress for the people we love and for our communities, we should. Thank you so much for helping me do that today.

Jacky

These are the plans they're fighting for: Banning assault weapons and expanding background checks Stopping climate change and boosting the clean energy sector Protecting our democracy and strengthening voting rights Expanding access to affordable health care Advancing Bidenomics to grow our economy and strengthen the middle class With President Biden and Vice President Harris heading into a critical election cycle, they need to know if Americans support their agenda. You have been selected to represent 43614 in our new opinion survey. Please, respond before midnight tonight to ensure your submission is counted: What grade would you give the Biden-Harris administration? | | | | | | | | | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

| | | Peter, _**We have to give our all to protect America from Joe Biden and Kamala Harris’ radical agenda.**_

It’s not just for our families today, but for our children and grandchildren's future.

For too long, we’ve let career politicians like Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer call the shots in our country.

__**Enough is enough.**_ _

I’m not working to be a voice for special interests. I’m working to be a voice for Missouri’s families feeling the heat from the Biden administration’s out-of-control inflation.

I know that in America, anything is possible, but if we keep Joe Biden in power, that possibility will slip away.

**[We can’t defend America’s future without taking back our Senate majority, and I need your help. Will you join me in this fight and help us WIN for America?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=caf2162aebcd41b79880ed26061938ee&_e=naVND50azDFsuoyABjH4fF_NkUPfnJA5P0aC-IsztsFq4E2MiLYq0EwPz09JcNxcPfeUJu2nK-IewiO6YTX1X1zY4izfUnJ8oZjSz1S90TOdbEexW17yUuAbkuIq2_sXkTrlFqIWqDGYxt8WfVgCuae7FWEewWO0EFuw0n9FCPqJELgEEsL3U_dsl1NQtF3hvYNoLVz2IaLdSFcI3u1myKFn2FFEEUGKZ3L-GX_PoS4Yth8GUOZ-KFh7_llxTKNF9TrMV5d13NUkKcKg8A_KyRG0LL-xG4pAh4fkkZqJ14GkAagTTSibl9dOVc4dcCLP-1rGKXu7EhxkILlYWaGxIsN8N3DUMJ6--iQyA8ZSOUmzrxtJkJzVh9eVBQ3YBaN94Ul_AoBPIBBqqjmwnVDBbQ%3D%3D)**

Thankfully, President Biden and our Democratic Senate blocked their radical cuts earlier this year. But this fight is far from over: **Now, Trump's far-right supermajority on the Supreme Court is preparing to rule on a case that could END Social Security _for good,_ ROBBING hardworking people of the benefits they've earned.**
Unlike Rick Scott, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running for Senate because she's committed to protecting and**_expanding_** Social Security. name: Jason Kander
subject: Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
With Joe Manchin’s retirement taking West Virginia’s Senate race off the board, our Senate race here in Missouri is the perfect candidate to replace it.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40491?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr)
Hi Peter, it’s Jason Kander. I’m the veteran and Democrat who was elected statewide as Missouri’s Secretary of State and then nearly defeated Roy Blunt, an incumbent GOP Senator, in one of the closest races of the 2016 election cycle.
**With Joe Manchin’s retirement taking West Virginia’s Senate race off the board, our Senate race here in Missouri is the perfect candidate to replace it.**
So in a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to join me in supporting Lucas Kunce’s campaign to defeat Josh Hawley.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40491?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr)** But first, please let me explain why I know Lucas has what it takes to flip this Senate seat next year:
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40491?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr)
---
If you’ve followed election coverage over the last year or so, the pundits might lead you to believe something new is happening.
Despite high disapproval for President Joe Biden in red states like Kentucky and Mississippi, Democrats outperformed their party’s presidential margin in statewide races by double digits. And after Republican-dominated legislatures passed extreme abortion bans in red states like Kansas and Ohio, voters delivered huge wins for reproductive rights and democracy.
But the truth is, this isn’t all that new. While pundits and insiders increasingly divide us into columns of red and blue based on their one-dimensional view of politics, voters continue to confound their expectations in election after election.
Missouri is a great example. While our state has shifted solidly red in presidential preferences since 2012, Democrats have won a half-dozen statewide campaigns, even as recently as 2018. And when Missouri politicians have adopted extreme positions on issues such as abortion, workers’ rights or health care, they’ve often seen their out-of-touch agendas soundly rejected by voters.
**Just like voters in states where we’ve seen big wins for Democrats and pro-freedom initiatives in the past year, hundreds of thousands of voters in Missouri are still splitting their tickets.**
I know this more than most because I’ve lived it. I won a race for Missouri Secretary of State. And in 2016, Missouri’s last Senate race to take place during a presidential election, I fell just 2.8% short of defeating a longtime Republican incumbent for U.S. Senate. And I outperformed the Democratic presidential ticket’s margin by more than 16%.
We proved that in races where well-funded candidates can set themselves apart and make it clear to voters that they’ll fight for them in office, Democrats can win in Missouri.
That’s what we’re seeing in Missouri’s current U.S. Senate race, as my friend Lucas Kunce takes on incumbent Josh Hawley. Much like my race in 2016, 2024 pits a labor-backed veteran against a politician — _except my opponent never tried to overthrow the government violently just to get his name out there._
Now up for reelection in 2024, Hawley faces Lucas, a Marine veteran and antitrust advocate who’s broken fundraising records, rallied Missouri’s election-winning labor movement behind him and built a reputation as a different kind of Democrat who speaks truth to power, regardless of party.
**[I’m proud to support Lucas Kunce in his race against Josh Hawley and I hope you’ll join me by adding a donation of $10 or whatever you’re able to today. Multiple polls have already confirmed that this will be a tight race, so your early support could be what helps Lucas tip the scales.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40491?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=11&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=12&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=13&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=14&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=15&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=16&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40491?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=17&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr)
---
**Now let’s talk about why Josh Hawley is so vulnerable.**
Hawley famously popped popcorn in his dorm room to gleefully watch the invasion of Iraq and then claimed a decade later to have opposed the war.
And since he’s represented Missouri in the U.S. Senate, he’s also become known as a desperately anti-union scab who is self-consciously obsessed with manhood.
From blocking defense nominations to voting against health care for veterans exposed to burn pits, Hawley has put his personal politics ahead of national security and the needs of military families. And he’s used his office to build a family business dedicated to restricting abortion access nationwide as his allies in Jefferson City enacted one of the nation’s most extreme abortion bans.
**Now with five years under Hawley’s belt in the U.S. Senate, Missourians don’t like what they’ve seen.**
Approval polling from _Morning Consult_ shows that Hawley has the lowest approval of any GOP senator running for reelection in 2024, lower than Sens. Ted Cruz of Texas and Rick Scott of Florida. And even his mentor, Missouri’s former U.S. Sen. John Danforth, has called backing Hawley the _“worst mistake I ever made.”_
Donald Trump recently commented on Hawley’s race too — _“So interesting that the Democrats are looking hard at the Senate races in both Missouri and Texas. Josh and Ted must be very careful, stranger things have happened!!!”_
**Hawley is vulnerable, and everyone knows it.** The proof is in his rapidly changing election-season rhetoric, Republicans in Washington fretting about their draconian abortion bans across the country, and Hawley’s billionaire allies launching a new pro-Hawley super PAC right after Lucas entered the race.
**[FIGHT BACK: ELECT LUCAS KUNCE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40491?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=18&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr)**
Just as we saw in elections across the country — both this year and in the last decade — pundits and presidential politics won’t be deciding the result of every race in 2024. Voters will be.
**That’s why I’m confident that Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley next year.**
And with so much at stake in this election — reproductive freedom, health care access, and even our democracy — this race must be a priority.
That’s why I’m asking you today, Peter:
**[Will you join me in supporting Lucas Kunce’s campaign against Josh Hawley for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat? This is one of our best and only opportunities to flip a GOP-held Senate seat in 2024, so I hope you’ll consider adding a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford toward Lucas’ campaign today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40491?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=20&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=21&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=22&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=23&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=24&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40492?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=25&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40491?refcode=em20231226-4448&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=26&akid=4448%2E614464%2EVLKblr)
---
Thank you so much,
Jason Kander

clean_body: With Joe Manchin’s retirement taking West Virginia’s Senate race off the board, our Senate race here in Missouri is the perfect candidate to replace it. Hi Peter, it’s Jason Kander. I’m the veteran and Democrat who was elected statewide as Missouri’s Secretary of State and then nearly defeated Roy Blunt, an incumbent GOP Senator, in one of the closest races of the 2016 election cycle. With Joe Manchin’s retirement taking West Virginia’s Senate race off the board, our Senate race here in Missouri is the perfect candidate to replace it. So in a moment, But first, please let me explain why I know Lucas has what it takes to flip this Senate seat next year: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: If you’ve followed election coverage over the last year or so, the pundits might lead you to believe something new is happening. Despite high disapproval for President Joe Biden in red states like Kentucky and Mississippi, Democrats outperformed their party’s presidential margin in statewide races by double digits. And after Republican-dominated legislatures passed extreme abortion bans in red states like Kansas and Ohio, voters delivered huge wins for reproductive rights and democracy. But the truth is, this isn’t all that new. While pundits and insiders increasingly divide us into columns of red and blue based on their one-dimensional view of politics, voters continue to confound their expectations in election after election. Missouri is a great example. While our state has shifted solidly red in presidential preferences since 2012, Democrats have won a half-dozen statewide campaigns, even as recently as 2018. And when Missouri politicians have adopted extreme positions on issues such as abortion, workers’ rights or health care, they’ve often seen their out-of-touch agendas soundly rejected by voters. Just like voters in states where we’ve seen big wins for Democrats and pro-freedom initiatives in the past year, hundreds of thousands of voters in Missouri are still splitting their tickets. I know this more than most because I’ve lived it. I won a race for Missouri Secretary of State. And in 2016, Missouri’s last Senate race to take place during a presidential election, I fell just 2.8% short of defeating a longtime Republican incumbent for U.S. Senate. And I outperformed the Democratic presidential ticket’s margin by more than 16%. We proved that in races where well-funded candidates can set themselves apart and make it clear to voters that they’ll fight for them in office, Democrats can win in Missouri. That’s what we’re seeing in Missouri’s current U.S. Senate race, as my friend Lucas Kunce takes on incumbent Josh Hawley. Much like my race in 2016, 2024 pits a labor-backed veteran against a politician — except my opponent never tried to overthrow the government violently just to get his name out there. Now up for reelection in 2024, Hawley faces Lucas, a Marine veteran and antitrust advocate who’s broken fundraising records, rallied Missouri’s election-winning labor movement behind him and built a reputation as a different kind of Democrat who speaks truth to power, regardless of party. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Now let’s talk about why Josh Hawley is so vulnerable. Hawley famously popped popcorn in his dorm room to gleefully watch the invasion of Iraq and then claimed a decade later to have opposed the war. And since he’s represented Missouri in the U.S. Senate, he’s also become known as a desperately anti-union scab who is self-consciously obsessed with manhood. From blocking defense nominations to voting against health care for veterans exposed to burn pits, Hawley has put his personal politics ahead of national security and the needs of military families. And he’s used his office to build a family business dedicated to restricting abortion access nationwide as his allies in Jefferson City enacted one of the nation’s most extreme abortion bans. Now with five years under Hawley’s belt in the U.S. Senate, Missourians don’t like what they’ve seen. Approval polling from Morning Consult shows that Hawley has the lowest approval of any GOP senator running for reelection in 2024, lower than Sens. Ted Cruz of Texas and Rick Scott of Florida. And even his mentor, Missouri’s former U.S. Sen. John Danforth, has called backing Hawley the “worst mistake I ever made.” Donald Trump recently commented on Hawley’s race too — “So interesting that the Democrats are looking hard at the Senate races in both Missouri and Texas. Josh and Ted must be very careful, stranger things have happened!!!” Hawley is vulnerable, and everyone knows it. The proof is in his rapidly changing election-season rhetoric, Republicans in Washington fretting about their draconian abortion bans across the country, and Hawley’s billionaire allies launching a new pro-Hawley super PAC right after Lucas entered the race. Just as we saw in elections across the country — both this year and in the last decade — pundits and presidential politics won’t be deciding the result of every race in 2024. Voters will be. That’s why I’m confident that Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley next year. And with so much at stake in this election — reproductive freedom, health care access, and even our democracy — this race must be a priority. That’s why I’m asking you today, Peter: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you so much, Jason Kander | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d4919628574a4ff28f6d214a4895020f&_e=kyCMmY3KiRRPyb4rxwoGejB7ybCdCA-qsPXDsqPkga6ed4_UwycxSdfqAOz2dH8QFW-8paVAoT9-KWEbqqbAt-MyrZgsiF_B5UwZF4nRPGyngGabG2f3u7C8LqETxxxtJqY6GieKUOFwdRrpv26dge9_CVwN-NFyCEKNkba9I67DfFA40i3rKi_82imXcg74VbrPCy0H6mzLRo-jJNfzFyt5kS0FUrBpiWqEolZhlMVojlwbY5e0TjVpENqD7B5mKLZaqtMxwclqifQTTDvZrqPw9vRqwfIj9PEdldzidU9sooEvxLegBFbth45EF9-YSJKkrwZX3HqurtB768zzcHaGL74tpbsOpthqXqtKErsSfhnZUWEjPvHHV8wIkvTuSGqV6Ch0_uhtFFZjJTQPSA%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d4919628574a4ff28f6d214a4895020f&_e=kyCMmY3KiRRPyb4rxwoGejB7ybCdCA-qsPXDsqPkga6ed4_UwycxSdfqAOz2dH8QFW-8paVAoT9-KWEbqqbAt-MyrZgsiF_B5UwZF4nRPGyngGabG2f3u7C8LqETxxxtJqY6GieKUOFwdRrpv26dge9_CVwN-NFyCEKNkba9I67DfFA40i3rKi_82imXcg74VbrPCy0H6mzLRo-jJNfzFyt5kS0FUrBpiWqEolZhlMX6XnUF1ktPbJUybM58SBRMe5R4lhSITl1qWl3_tCL0-ZMY7s00Qfi3SRgQQD59d3CkCDKxxgBBDxLNjdUcNIcrYQqVwE6wwVLbDeDRWx3nrJNAOToPcquyWh9gkwrNC78VaSUEFIDVenTdCuul1w0v5V9-YnrK2xPMGxxpqAWybQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d4919628574a4ff28f6d214a4895020f&_e=kyCMmY3KiRRPyb4rxwoGejB7ybCdCA-qsPXDsqPkga6ed4_UwycxSdfqAOz2dH8QFW-8paVAoT9-KWEbqqbAt-MyrZgsiF_B5UwZF4nRPGyngGabG2f3u7C8LqETxxxtJqY6GieKUOFwdRrpv26dge9_CVwN-NFyCEKNkba9I67DfFA40i3rKi_82imXcg74VbrPCy0H6mzLRo-jJNfzFyt5kS0FUrBpiWqEolZhlMWrJlGIaWcO5aBCJoRcpRjYYp-xpCSKPTOlWJWH98HnxOt_OQp927FdKnSe90bfU29zk32wCg2ZA75yqQHS_ie326DBVObWBbbEi9sd8J-6JRAwqeq4t7gSzQDNDZlXlon-bY2e3pKcGWxQTu2icAkzBK0vWYvT7XmsgGSKuIr7Rw%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.

Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Holiday slump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| The reality is that to keep our campaign running full steam ahead, I need your help these last 5 days:
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4858%2E5257348%2Ep_jJ8h)
Hi Derek — In a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to chip in $5 with only 5 days left until our end-of-year fundraising deadline.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=dec2023_abs_em._zEiYK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20231226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4858%2E5257348%2Ep_jJ8h)** But first, I want to explain why this deadline is so important.
[DONATE $5](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=dec2023_abs_em._zEiYK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20231226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4858%2E5257348%2Ep_jJ8h)
---
Running a statewide campaign in the most populous state in our country is no small feat — it takes significant resources to reach as many voters as possible.
For the past few months, because of this grassroots team, we have been able to travel all around the Golden State, meeting with folks from Sacramento to San Diego to connect about the issues that matter most.
But to reach more voters, we need to raise more funds.
The holiday season has slowed down our fundraising efforts, and as we pore over our budget in the final days of our quarter, we’re still trailing a bit behind.
This is our very last FEC fundraising deadline of the year. Our last opportunity to show the MAGA Republicans who want to see us lose, that we have the strength needed to win this race. **That makes this fundraising deadline the most important one yet.**
The reality is Derek, to keep our campaign running full steam ahead, I need your help these last 5 days:
**[So please, could you pitch in $5 to help us reach voters across California? Your donation before our end-of-year deadline will help me reach more voters ahead of the March 5 Primary election.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=dec2023_abs_em._zEiYK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20231226_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=4858%2E5257348%2Ep_jJ8h)**

name: Jim
subject: Can’t believe I’m saying this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
|
---
[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=1f4ce86d916a417abaf8a8acf107d91f&_e=A9o0tp3iws1a0G3aaQrGlCICMTnLzzbebEcF4Dvf_dKZAT4YBMHKylEknr8gfyx58Xqxa8tBlwCUmmrGosGDSwbER0QshdLJge7lG7662vJbA7K5cRZPyWJtkQDLF8w8mUFsEALavldT066OZFEgGVPT_7PXnOX4C_6zD2nZQK_m2Akejq1XnsV46hY5BW_DoCxqFfV1Z6KBqF-_G2BHMu0o4sg3jFco-PdWDmks-dRoROkeKK98Heqh6tVaSiC8N__wZHj0JtQ3HavffcCNlwJ7Ksekz-KLR91rVk_-e4ufT2vwL44fn6p8enoVWZl4ykTjCsu1sqMlcjNGufvXIIAgFbmwkSd5XFOlhku-_OdLZDvh5X_v4319qRnyMf5Cv1diwnu7BjTgKxI8Gx94DA%3D%3D)

Hello...

This could be the last email I send you this year, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**As we head into Election Year, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. Everything relies on meeting this End-of-Year fundraising deadline.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.
**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana.**
**The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**
Joe Biden and his Leftist allies are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support to help me reach my End-of-Year goal.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=1f4ce86d916a417abaf8a8acf107d91f&_e=A9o0tp3iws1a0G3aaQrGlCICMTnLzzbebEcF4Dvf_dKZAT4YBMHKylEknr8gfyx58Xqxa8tBlwCUmmrGosGDSwbER0QshdLJge7lG7662vJbA7K5cRZPyWJtkQDLF8w8mUFsEALavldT066OZFEgGVPT_7PXnOX4C_6zD2nZQK_m2Akejq1XnsV46hY5BW_DoCxqFfV1Z6KBqF-_G2BHMu0o4sg3jFco-PdWDmks-dRoROkeKK98Heqh6tVaSiC8erofj5mLJgEKK7026fuxnmggrsfpTVGhN51uEpqBl6dieXiqt89ciN1mYR2EuYEdky5sK8Ti84h3XiF7De9vv7U3asGaATkNn9zUb1HBIKuGmMaPuYmYRaRUz7x053syJO1W3f3XwU_8R4aGwej_SA%3D%3D)
The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative.

I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it [**if I don’t reach this critical fundraising goal.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=1f4ce86d916a417abaf8a8acf107d91f&_e=A9o0tp3iws1a0G3aaQrGlCICMTnLzzbebEcF4Dvf_dKZAT4YBMHKylEknr8gfyx58Xqxa8tBlwCUmmrGosGDSwbER0QshdLJge7lG7662vJbA7K5cRZPyWJtkQDLF8w8mUFsEALavldT066OZFEgGVPT_7PXnOX4C_6zD2nZQK_m2Akejq1XnsV46hY5BW_DoCxqFfV1Z6KBqF-_G2BHMu0o4sg3jFco-PdWDmks-dRoROkeKK98Heqh6tVaSiC8qG7yK4ZYDPHkfK9F16dx0L_Yv4pFafgEk98JseJWDuooz9odvKcTQQ1_QSurr9agnIpPYeCPC9gCc81CiMRd7wWoqMOFNWK-FDEImGoji3iPhQueeUqjs3q5jB7ReX18cSKirzQEnHH2TVNDejITaw%3D%3D)

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

[**So please help me out this one time, Friend. The future of my campaign depends on it. We have to start 2024 strong:**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=1f4ce86d916a417abaf8a8acf107d91f&_e=A9o0tp3iws1a0G3aaQrGlCICMTnLzzbebEcF4Dvf_dKZAT4YBMHKylEknr8gfyx58Xqxa8tBlwCUmmrGosGDSwbER0QshdLJge7lG7662vJbA7K5cRZPyWJtkQDLF8w8mUFsEALavldT066OZFEgGVPT_7PXnOX4C_6zD2nZQK_m2Akejq1XnsV46hY5BW_DoCxqFfV1Z6KBqF-_G2BHMu0o4sg3jFco-PdWDmks-dRoROkeKK98Heqh6tVaSiC89AP66NNq5RLqGZpDiUb997G1qRN_0LbFbS3ud2BKJUimgmdha7o0xTDyKasAWuOxS3JTNOUomlkIXw90jd6qoxdMm8JyE35cos86Ivu33ZypnGVcI9__Lyw-zoU4eADRUOS1PQPGdJyEldAcrJ967A%3D%3D)

clean_body: | Hello... This could be the last email I send you this year, Friend. But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up. As we head into Election Year, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything. Everything relies on meeting this End-of-Year fundraising deadline. My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress. I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls. Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate. Joe Biden and his Leftist allies are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily. The Democrats have planted a fake Republican in my race to stop me from winning. They don’t realize that I’ve been in this community for years, and I know that Americans are fed up with the progressive narrative. I’m not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there’s no way I can make it The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. | Friend, I’m not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a Patriot who wants to save America for the next generation. That’s why I’m being so candid with you today. I won’t make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will make it my mission to restore faith in our government and put the American people before political deals. I intend to make you proud. God Bless, Jim Banks Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

3\. Complete your PCR application (it only takes minutes!) and mail it to the Minnesota Department of Revenue.

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Derek, we need all hands on deck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=35434%2E3422442%2EkLx5zs)
Derek,
Do you remember seeing this headline last February?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231226-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_POL_20231226_V1_F&refcode2=35434_3422442_kLx5zs&akid=35434%2E3422442%2EkLx5zs)
A super PAC supporting one of Katie’s opponents has already spent $1M on ads.
On top of this, **two recent polls show Katie now in third place–trailing Republican celebrity Steve Garvey.** We won’t B.S. you–this isn’t good.
**[Derek, we’re counting on you. Will you make a $5 contribution right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231226-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_POL_20231226_V1_F&refcode2=35434_3422442_kLx5zs&akid=35434%2E3422442%2EkLx5zs)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231226-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_POL_20231226_V1_F&refcode2=35434_3422442_kLx5zs&akid=35434%2E3422442%2EkLx5zs)
Our fundraising report at the end of the month will be our final quarterly report before the primary. Super PACs love to look at these final reports for any signs of weakness.
If these super PACs sense a waning or weak campaign, they’re more likely to drop millions of dollars into a race in support of the candidate with the upper hand.
Katie has gone up against $10 million in super PAC spending before and won, so we know that she can do it again. But now, it’s going to take the full support of every single person who wants to see Katie in the Senate to reach our critical $100,000 fundraising goal before midnight on the 31st.
We have just 70 days to turn this around and make sure Katie is in the top two to get through March’s primary election.
**[So, Derek, is there anything you can contribute today to help us ramp up our campaign and make sure Katie Porter is California’s next U.S. Senator?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231226-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_POL_20231226_V1_F&refcode2=35434_3422442_kLx5zs&akid=35434%2E3422442%2EkLx5zs)**
Thank you,
–KPHQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_2_POL_20231226_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=35434_3422442_kLx5zs&akid=35434%2E3422442%2EkLx5zs)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=35434%2E3422442%2EkLx5zs)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=35434%2E3422442%2EkLx5zs)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Caroline (via NRSC)
subject: Your last chance to make the Roll of Honor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Our Roll of Honor only has limited spots left. Contribute NOW to get your name on the Roll of Honor before the new year! | _I can’t find your name anywhere, Fellow American._

**This must be wrong.**

I have been reviewing the names for our official NRSC Roll of Honor, and your name is NOWHERE to be found. _How could you abandon us at such a critical time?_

[**You can re-commit to the fight by making one generous contribution of $10 or more today before December 31st.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f46d9095fe3448baba6d07c5efe6dc51&_e=2IleI7jkxVih5aw7chs8ZBn2SoYYLUCtEXb0zr7VlWzaplbhIW16xIrAXwS_widR3SGJlmYweF3yTAqIYvV9xMYZA6CJm_nM-sXCUI8X_ioZGxhut5afkaDJg1JAEpDO9N0_3jihNXlgw4_OgoURmcadV8j4CRbYhjYj5NrPeublO3Nmi3nyC-ShOyKLafDqbJCZKJXZWK6ZHwtzoVgWM3xnIv5dNZuwdNFGqVAfLg98z4nW5sLwYXdVD3jpf4OjjjhGcjoHfRyartf_L0PYgq3OCxSfTfNsOBFxTDIVouEEXK44T87nXKIe3UplJqefhJfEXmCYn_MB_qlX96MzQ7glU05-mWmBsegPHEwU3d5AbOh1b9qOaWVRdBUxBAx7aJxyqr_V09IXUjMBhZjTtfGHwCUXGqZbyQnUsEamPUq3O4LI4zhdvCn7QINeluy-) Your generous donation will earn you a spot on the Roll of Honor in the Ronald Reagan Republican Center lobby.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f46d9095fe3448baba6d07c5efe6dc51&_e=2IleI7jkxVih5aw7chs8ZBn2SoYYLUCtEXb0zr7VlWzaplbhIW16xIrAXwS_widR3SGJlmYweF3yTAqIYvV9xMYZA6CJm_nM-sXCUI8X_ioZGxhut5afkaDJg1JAEpDO9N0_3jihNXlgw4_OgoURmcadV8j4CRbYhjYj5NrPeublO3Nmi3nyC-ShOyKLafDqbJCZKJXZWK6ZHwtzoVgWM3xnIv5dNZuwdNFGqVAfLg98z4nW5sLwYXdVD3jpf4OjjjhGcjoHfRyartf_L0PYgq3OCxSfTfNsOBFxTDIVouE2P0HiVE8DjoiRw1ce5CdjQhPkexjskVJ0E2lujoeJvH5C4keEBmbUEVgmWhl2P2eob0kNif_hhrO3o8WIYXRZj26H5G2vk9w5IFuHiH2DrGRuEdt6d6ILMWIIMjhISpH7fNsi1h8SBEcFFrOHolle)
What is the Roll of Honor? It is for the most loyal patriots who contribute $10 or more to the NRSC and distinguish themselves among our supporters. We need supporters like you, who we can count on when times get tough, and we need your support the most.

So, we’ve secured one of the TVs in the Ronald Reagan Republican Center lobby to have a 24/7 roll of names to honor our best supporters. The only way to be featured on our Roll of Honor is to offer a timely contribution before the New Year!

This must be wrong. I have been reviewing the names for our official NRSC Roll of Honor, and your name is NOWHERE to be found. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Cox?=
subject: Personal note from me - time is short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DAN COX FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
I write these messages myself because message matters. The hour is late for our country. I need your help TONIGHT. Thank you. | | | |
---
|
# Christmas and New Year's Cheer! 5 days to join me - _I need you now_.
---
| | | [Contribute Tonight to help nominate Dan Cox for Congress](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=1cfa30c63a&e=5bb5efcda7 "Contribute Tonight to help nominate Dan Cox for Congress")
---
|
---
| Friend,

Cheers! We trust you had a beautiful Christmas holiday.

Good news: I believe I will be your Member of Congress, by the grace of Almighty God. I firmly believe that no other candidate in this race can or will win, in my humble opinion. Is that an overstatement? It is not. Consider the following.

Do you think our Party will nominate a non-Trump supporter in a time when we need strong leadership? No. We shall not fail to nominate an America First, strong supporter of President Trump - who rightly will be our nominee, including on our Maryland ballot. And he is beating Biden by nearly 10 points nationally.

And it's not just the Primary I am confident in winning. With your help _I will win the general election_. Americans, including a large majority of Sixth District Marylanders, **are fed up with Washington** and with the Biden debacle that is leading us into WWIII and daily economic destruction. This is your family, your jobs, your money, just like it is mine. Sixth District voters, including independents and swing Democrats, reject Biden's handling and long for the days of prosperity and security under President Trump when our dollar counted for far more than it does today and our freedom had the backing of the White House.

We must have a Member of Congress who stands for your family, and not for the party handlers and globalists. I humbly submit that I will be that Member of Congress and I will have the back of the People.

I stood alone against the globalists and liberal party brokers in both parties. No other candidate in this race has done so. None. _Ask them this: "did you vote with Dan Cox to impeach the corrupt globalist agenda leadership working to impose the World Health and World Economic "Great Reset"? Dan Cox did so - why didn't you join him to protect us?"_

I will be your representative in Congress with your support and with the fight of patriots like you who come alongside and make it happen. Will you join now and donate?

I have five days to raise money for our first FEC report. If you are contemplating not giving up on freedom and your future by donating, [now is the time.](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=8a74a8250d&e=5bb5efcda7)

---
|
---
| [URGENT: RUSH Your Contribution Tonight to Dan Cox for Congress](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=8bed6b5152&e=5bb5efcda7 "URGENT: RUSH Your Contribution Tonight to Dan Cox for Congress")
---
| _Biden's outrageous election inference of our Party and Constitution has been met by too many of my fellow GOP friends with ABSOLUTE SILENCE._

Is that the kind of candidate you want in DC fighting for you - a silent one? One that has _no leadership_ to speak in the hour of need? One that cannot acknowledge that the hour for saving our country is late and is now?

The issues destroying our communities and constitutional order do not permit timidity:

**> > the illegal Border invasion.

>> the weaponization and police state of the Biden DOJ against Republicans and Conservatives.

>> the Constitution under attack by Biden gaslighting us and prosecuting his political opponent.

>> our communities are being overrun in our schools and streets with violence and murder.

>> our run-a-way national debt crisis that is worse than most countries COMBINED.**

We have a plan to fight precinct by precinct to win the votes.

Just last year I had some of the highest BIPARTISAN votes in the Sixth District as anyone has ever had. Many precincts voted 3 to 1 for me in the general election.

**Our constitutional republic is under attack TODAY**. The time is far spent. The hour is late.

**This is America. Our beloved heritage of freedom and the Bill of Rights are at stake**. [I need your contribution now before the end of the year to make sure you have a proven, experienced fighter elected to represent you](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=0cd13f6dab&e=5bb5efcda7). No more shall we nominate weak-kneed politicians.

We will unite as Republicans around our nominee and we will unite as Americans and Marylanders who care about the future of our families and freedom. I will lead with that banner of uniting all of us without timidity.

Thank you for your support tonight. Thank you for our kids and grandkids' sakes. Thank you for America's sake.

Merry Christmas and Happy New Year.

5 days,

---
| [URGENT: RUSH Your Contribution Tonight to Dan Cox for Congress](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=3aa17fb8ee&e=5bb5efcda7 "URGENT: RUSH Your Contribution Tonight to Dan Cox for Congress")
---
| | P.S. Maryland will go overwhelmingly for President Trump - and I will lead us there and then serve in support of our beautiful state and our President's America First agenda on your behalf in Congress. But I need your help tonight to reach our goal.
---
|
---
| | | | PAID FOR BY DAN COX FOR CONGRESS, INC.
---
| | | | | | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=011c431c15&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=3369d1c26d&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=a91b772333&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
| | [](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=9b06c74282&e=5bb5efcda7)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Dan Cox for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you are friends or have shown us or a fellow republican support. Thank you!

**Our mailing address is:**
Dan Cox for CongressP. O. Box 3952Frederick, MD 21705
[Add us to your address book](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/vcard?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=739896679f)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=739896679f&e=5bb5efcda7&c=c319fef9b9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=739896679f&e=5bb5efcda7&c=c319fef9b9).

---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: I can’t think of a more important time to defend free speech
body:
I can’t think of a more important time to defend free speech.

| |
---
| | Friend, I can’t think of a more important time to defend free speech. It’s no coincidence that in the past 3 years we’ve seen some of the greatest abuses of power in American history and some of the most powerful attacks on our First Amendment.As the new Speaker of the House said... _“if the alarm bells are not going off, you’re not paying attention.”_ Big Tech censorship is one of the greatest threats facing our country. If partisan politicians can leverage the force of government to censor political opponents, and get away with it, the First Amendment will be nothing more than a distant memory.That’s why Rogan O’Handley’s case is at the Supreme Court of the United States awaiting the Court’s decision on our certiorari petition... ...Because it is totally unconsitutional for Big Government to collude with Big Tech to censor disfavored—or unpopular—beliefs.The Supreme Court could decide our petition any day now, and when it does, our attorneys must be prepared at a moment’s notice. **[Will you make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more today to give our attorneys a running start?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhh3tsnoqf05752007p6mq88b2srm2a662k36kg0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cdjm2o72cjh2bs)** Recently the Supreme Court agreed to hear _Murthy v. Missouri_ – the landmark case that we filed an amicus brief for earlier this year.Murthy v. Missouri blew the lid off the corruption between the federal government and Big Tech platforms aimed at censoring conservatives.Evidence of the federal government working to censor Americans online shocked many...but probably not to you.You know Rogan O’Handley’s lawsuit well and recall that the state of California pressured Twitter to censor Rogan after Rogan called for an audit of the 2020 election.You remember hearing about how the state of California gave millions of dollars to a partisan public relations firm to root out election related “misinformation” online without ever defining the term “misinformation.”

And you saw that outrageous abuse of power result in Rogan O’Handley getting kicked off Twitter. Referring to Big Tech censorship, the new Speaker of the House Mike Johnson said it best:
---
| | |
---
_“The Twitter files should be a matter of bipartisan concern for every member of Congress and every American citizen because it is a bedrock principle of our constitutional system that the government does not get to decide what speech is acceptable or true...Under the First Amendment the American people have a right to speak freely regardless of whether their speech upsets the preferred narrative –**in fact, that’s when it needs the most vigorous protection** ...Government and media “act checkers frequently get things wrong; the American people can’t and shouldn’t rely on the so-called “experts” to be the arbiters of truth.”_
---
|
---
Friend, I couldn’t agree more.That’s why I hope I can count on your generous donation today, and if Rogan’s case moves forward, you’ll help us win it. Thank you again for all that you do.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. DhillonFounder & CEO
---
|
---

---

name: Secure & Prosper
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| **The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis****This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way.Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn:**_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months.The loss will be beyond what you can imagine.**As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis.It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food.Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies.That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://trk.secureandprosper.).When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits...You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat.[**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out.It quickly becomes every man for himself.Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late.[**Stock up now**](http://trk.secureandprosper.) on these survival food kits while you can.

name: Team DeSantis
subject: re: Before 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=fd754b47df676e815d2cb49d5510ab99ee8da06f2af24b4bf6fd3265f1b6fe96caae8028b6fcdb6a955e08ba6a6a23d6a02b8dc0e681b5cff467296f7900298ba845fb9925cb3f28f7a96448e9f642c9

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8601effb835dbec6ed847e6981c76cc3710a9c32ad5a27212aac15c1714832e3a479807bef455d9ae32870967fa7cfc93760a687caebdc5ebd2875ecff2be095

Friend,

This week, we are working around the clock to get in touch with our team and raise the resources we need before 12/31. We have a matter of days to come together to crush the FEC fundraising report and show the people of Iowa that their support in the upcoming caucus is being matched across the country.

But as we race toward this deadline, it's important to us that your feedback doesn't fall through the cracks. We want to stay in touch with you through all the intense moments. Can you take a moment to respond to our quarterly check-in as soon as you can?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8601effb835dbec6ed847e6981c76cc3710a9c32ad5a27212aac15c1714832e3a479807bef455d9ae32870967fa7cfc93760a687caebdc5ebd2875ecff2be095
Respond Now

--------Forwarded Message--------

From:
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8601effb835dbec6ed847e6981c76cc3710a9c32ad5a27212aac15c1714832e3a479807bef455d9ae32870967fa7cfc93760a687caebdc5ebd2875ecff2be095
Team DeSantis

Subject: Before 2024

Friend - It's time for a team check-in.

The days are winding down in the final quarter of 2023.

The past few months of this campaign have been chalked-full of big wins for our campaign. No one is out-working Ron DeSantis. We're so excited to prove that he's the ONE candidate in this race with the fight it'll take to lead our country back to sanity and revival.

But before we get there, we need to huddle with our team! How are you, friend? Have you gotten a chance to plug in with the campaign yet?

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8601effb835dbec6ed847e6981c76cc3710a9c32ad5a27212aac15c1714832e3a479807bef455d9ae32870967fa7cfc93760a687caebdc5ebd2875ecff2be095
Check in with us

The next quarter of this campaign will bring the most critical milestones we've faced yet, and we're collecting a count of who will be standing up with us for freedom at the ballot box next November. We know that's you, so we want to hear from you. We just need your response before the end of the month!

Please
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8601effb835dbec6ed847e6981c76cc3710a9c32ad5a27212aac15c1714832e3a479807bef455d9ae32870967fa7cfc93760a687caebdc5ebd2875ecff2be095
respond today!Election year is right around the corner.

Thank you,

Official DeSantis Survey Team

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8601effb835dbec6ed847e6981c76cc3710a9c32ad5a27212aac15c1714832e3a479807bef455d9ae32870967fa7cfc93760a687caebdc5ebd2875ecff2be095

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8601effb835dbec64cee5bd07ded2b783acc8d152e58bcc75b42dcbfaf2808ed3fd8c59108703ab4dfaa88ae18fe2895c7ce6567f9a6e3ab1e0602dc3b2eb768
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8601effb835dbec6ed847e6981c76cc3710a9c32ad5a27212aac15c1714832e3a479807bef455d9ae32870967fa7cfc93760a687caebdc5ebd2875ecff2be095

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8601effb835dbec6ed847e6981c76cc3710a9c32ad5a27212aac15c1714832e3a479807bef455d9ae32870967fa7cfc93760a687caebdc5ebd2875ecff2be095

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Food Shortage Notice
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| **The Truth About The Coming Food Crisis****This might be your only warning.** According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way.Despite this imminent crisis, mainstream media remains silent...And our own government ignores dire warnings of industry experts like fourth-generation American farmers who warn:**_“Food shortages are coming.”_** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months.The loss will be beyond what you can imagine.**As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis.It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food.Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life – depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

**Well, no need to worry anymore.** Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies.That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of these best-selling [**Survival Food Kits**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.).When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits...You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat.[**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._Q) When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out.It quickly becomes every man for himself.Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late.[**Stock up now**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._VQOP5xV4bqUfcrvCUu-w) on these survival food kits while you can.
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzYxLTU5ZGUxY2JlYTIwYzRmZTk4NzQ0Nzk4YjVkN2Q4YWVjIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/YDX9cN9YiycxUMebSnW1Zg) to unsubscribe.

I know you’ve been getting a lot of emails lately, but it would mean so much to me if you could read my personal message. Here’s a little bit about me: I am a Navy Veteran, Nurse Practitioner, Mom, and now I’m serving as VA-02’s Congresswoman. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=6cdc24774f26afb2c67db31c526e374e2b7e0b476124a8719a147416e75eef5af66ecf4a68d5336f544d9021e8b662a4e8b8de3487355327 I’m not a career politician – I wasn’t even planning on getting into politics – but I couldn’t sit back and watch our leaders continue to make false promises and lie to the American people. So I decided to do something about it and run for Congress. Despite the odds stacked against me and the best efforts of my opponent and the far-Left, I won and flipped VA-02 RED by ONLY 3%. Not only did I win one of the most competitive districts in the nation….but my seat was critical to helping the GOP take the House Majority. But our fight is far from over, Peter. Next year, my race will be one of the most competitive in the nation again and the far-Left is already spending millions against me. I can’t win this race on my own, I’ll need the help of committed supporters like you. Asking you for money has never been easy for me, but my official year-end deadline is just around the corner….and we are coming up short. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=6cdc24774f26afb2c67db31c526e374e2b7e0b476124a8719a147416e75eef5af66ecf4a68d5336f544d9021e8b662a4e8b8de3487355327 My year-end deadline is just a few days away, and it’s critical that we raise the funds necessary to meet our goal! https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=6cdc24774f26afb2c67db31c526e374e2b7e0b476124a8719a147416e75eef5af66ecf4a68d5336f544d9021e8b662a4e8b8de3487355327 SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=6cdc24774f26afb2c67db31c526e374e2b7e0b476124a8719a147416e75eef5af66ecf4a68d5336f544d9021e8b662a4e8b8de3487355327 CHIP IN TODAY Like I said, Peter, I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important. But the future of our country is at stake—do you think you can chip in any amount? https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=6cdc24774f26afb2c67db31c526e374e2b7e0b476124a8719a147416e75eef5af66ecf4a68d5336f544d9021e8b662a4e8b8de3487355327 It doesn’t have to be thousands, just a few dollars can go a long way to helping me and my team keep up the fight, and help fend off the Left’s takeover attempts in Virginia. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=6cdc24774f26afb2c67db31c526e374e2b7e0b476124a8719a147416e75eef5af66ecf4a68d5336f544d9021e8b662a4e8b8de3487355327 SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS If you can’t contribute today, I totally understand! Just having you read my message all the way through means the world to me! Thank you so much, Jen Kiggans To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=6cdc24774f26afb2511572c70c85666bf9b983a2a911af13b16ff234ee295e363915bef7cb37fd64908fc1dca40d2401b9f5bd09f1bad666 here . name: Jerry Evans
subject: Let’s End 2023 On a High Note
body:
| | |
---
|
---
| Friend,
I hope you had a great holiday with friends and family. This time of year, it is important to take time to reflect and prepare for the New Year. While many are taking time away from work and from politics, our campaign continues to move forward and prepare for 2024. In fact, we have a [major fundraising deadline in less than a week.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_qZk2Z0z9uIs9ELe89GLY113w1bcc4cAk9WnPCCjp3RwuW_12zhgBRCHeSld-zA1Ri9ZoDJ34OvAlhNqmG63Z_CfyJ9IWwu3Z0UtqYMrdZ0Zc6xFkqvOgMSuAPHavpuhugXNGssNZzi-RUgizXrEuko8iKRwq_WulYeRcTuzEftFkiLGjFmlnRC4dBjaK76W8A0IP8R37XOmj0txdRvsLG9DbpJGrEIu&c=w9HF9P-7JBon0slkWMojkFgJeXgDdRXo7VR7QPy5rse6VK6mJHYTFg==&ch=qRdoMacMICDfIo39EChKHhp6c2M2CVODMyG1xyp6ZZu9D3pApkFVaw==)
As this campaign progresses, one thing is becoming clear: momentum is on our side. The national committees in Washington D.C. see that this district will be competitive in 2024. Day after day, our team continues to engage with the people of Illinois' 11th district and provide a clear vision of how we can better the lives of people here in Illinois.
However, we need your help to do so. [We have just a few days until our biggest fundraising deadline of the year](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_qZk2Z0z9uIs9ELe89GLY113w1bcc4cAk9WnPCCjp3RwuW_12zhgBRCHeSld-zA1Ri9ZoDJ34OvAlhNqmG63Z_CfyJ9IWwu3Z0UtqYMrdZ0Zc6xFkqvOgMSuAPHavpuhugXNGssNZzi-RUgizXrEuko8iKRwq_WulYeRcTuzEftFkiLGjFmlnRC4dBjaK76W8A0IP8R37XOmj0txdRvsLG9DbpJGrEIu&c=w9HF9P-7JBon0slkWMojkFgJeXgDdRXo7VR7QPy5rse6VK6mJHYTFg==&ch=qRdoMacMICDfIo39EChKHhp6c2M2CVODMyG1xyp6ZZu9D3pApkFVaw==). [With your support](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_qZk2Z0z9uIs9ELe89GLY113w1bcc4cAk9WnPCCjp3RwuW_12zhgBRCHeSld-zA1Ri9ZoDJ34OvAlhNqmG63Z_CfyJ9IWwu3Z0UtqYMrdZ0Zc6xFkqvOgMSuAPHavpuhugXNGssNZzi-RUgizXrEuko8iKRwq_WulYeRcTuzEftFkiLGjFmlnRC4dBjaK76W8A0IP8R37XOmj0txdRvsLG9DbpJGrEIu&c=w9HF9P-7JBon0slkWMojkFgJeXgDdRXo7VR7QPy5rse6VK6mJHYTFg==&ch=qRdoMacMICDfIo39EChKHhp6c2M2CVODMyG1xyp6ZZu9D3pApkFVaw==), our movement will shake up the Washington establishment and bring back common-sense leadership. We cannot allow the career politicians like Joe Biden and Bill Foster continue leading America in the wrong direction. [Can you give today?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_qZk2Z0z9uIs9ELe89GLY113w1bcc4cAk9WnPCCjp3RwuW_12zhgBRCHeSld-zA1Ri9ZoDJ34OvAlhNqmG63Z_CfyJ9IWwu3Z0UtqYMrdZ0Zc6xFkqvOgMSuAPHavpuhugXNGssNZzi-RUgizXrEuko8iKRwq_WulYeRcTuzEftFkiLGjFmlnRC4dBjaK76W8A0IP8R37XOmj0txdRvsLG9DbpJGrEIu&c=w9HF9P-7JBon0slkWMojkFgJeXgDdRXo7VR7QPy5rse6VK6mJHYTFg==&ch=qRdoMacMICDfIo39EChKHhp6c2M2CVODMyG1xyp6ZZu9D3pApkFVaw==)
For the cause,
Jerry Evans
P.S. This campaign has always been a team effort. So please share this email with your friends and family and ask them to join the fight with us. A simple donation of [$30](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_qZk2Z0z9uIs9ELe89GLY113w1bcc4cAk9WnPCCjp3RwuW_12zhgBRCHeSld-zA1Ri9ZoDJ34OvAlhNqmG63Z_CfyJ9IWwu3Z0UtqYMrdZ0Zc6xFkqvOgMSuAPHavpuhugXNGssNZzi-RUgizXrEuko8iKRwq_WulYeRcTuzEftFkiLGjFmlnRC4dBjaK76W8A0IP8R37XOmj0txdRvsLG9DbpJGrEIu&c=w9HF9P-7JBon0slkWMojkFgJeXgDdRXo7VR7QPy5rse6VK6mJHYTFg==&ch=qRdoMacMICDfIo39EChKHhp6c2M2CVODMyG1xyp6ZZu9D3pApkFVaw==) will allow us to continue fighting for you and will defeat Bill Foster in November! Visit our website at [jerryevansforcongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_qZk2Z0z9uIs9ELe89GLY113w1bcc4cAk9WnPCCjp3RwuW_12zhgBUUNLZ7BGO-04K7RHTowi4j535Owyxia4YUK25qRxBlVHupwm1aKRKR4aHffIuqTu4r65805VW1LazHLk186_9ScWt5Whgw5jGJjRgTzcgOd&c=w9HF9P-7JBon0slkWMojkFgJeXgDdRXo7VR7QPy5rse6VK6mJHYTFg==&ch=qRdoMacMICDfIo39EChKHhp6c2M2CVODMyG1xyp6ZZu9D3pApkFVaw==) to learn more and get involved!

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: We’re fighting for a better future together.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The second step for our generation:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8abef88-fed1-4891-b22f-64b081d11a4e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Let me tell you what I think, Peter. Young people are smart. We pay attention to the issues. We’re showing up to vote. But to me, this is only the first step for our generation. The second step? Running. **We need young people on the ballot. We need young people in elected office.** That’s why I teamed up with Kevin Lata, the campaign manager who helped elect the first ever Gen-Z member of Congress last year, to launch Leaders We Deserve. [**Peter, if you agree that we need more young, courageous leaders running for office, will you pitch in $25 to help Leaders We Deserve make it happen?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcf465ede-2580-4477-8d31-14e7f25b09a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9788f266-f874-4b6b-a79c-e6c9da8af494/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| As a generation, we grew up hearing that to survive a school shooting, we had to run, hide, and fight. I think our generation needs to reinterpret what that means.
* **We need to run—for office.** Representation won’t happen on its own.
* **We need to stop hiding** from our responsibility to our country and planet.
* **We need to fight** for a better government and a better future for everyone.

That’s why Leaders We Deserve exists. We’re helping young people run for office and win—like Nadarius Clark, our endorsed candidate who just won in Virginia. [**Leaders We Deserve was founded to recruit and support the next generation of leaders. Will you help us take the second step and donate $25 right now?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9c257de-14e4-47d7-843d-ffc5392deed4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for everything you do for this movement, David Hogg
Co-Founder, Leaders We Deserve
---
| | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T647f0a39-033b-4e05-b4c9-7facf57656ae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

subject: A real deadline

body:

---
Team — I hope you had a merry, relaxing, and safe Christmas with your family and loved ones 🎄 One thing I’ve always promised is this: We will never insult your intelligence with our fundraising emails. No gimmicks. No made up deadlines. **December 31st is our next real deadline. **When it passes, we’ll have to report every cent we’ve raised over the last six months. People will look up these numbers, reporters will write stories about them, and they’ll be interpreted as a sign of momentum for us (and Georgia Republicans across the state) rolling into 2024. **[We’re more than 90% of the way to our overall fundraising goal for 2023. If you haven’t given this year, I’m asking you to push us over the top now —>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/cdd1703cb4ea9a9e3947229f28c3afba/b3fc2335b2aaeb77c3d6b838967d376c/41703)**

If you can, I hope you’ll do so ASAP.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/cdd1703cb4ea9a9e3947229f28c3afba/c12fb324558f0aa9c3d6b838967d376c/41703)**

This work matters, and it’s critical we have the means to get the word out. I need you on the frontlines with me. **[If you’re able, I hope you’ll donate $10, $5, or even just $2 now.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/51a797e4f41bbbc57c94c760ea83e7c0/41703/cdd1703cb4ea9a9e3947229f28c3afba/ff8690a3afdf3a48c3d6b838967d376c/41703)** Every single donation counts.
