name: Bob MacGuffie
subject: Patch reports: "MacGuffie takes the hard-hitting lane" vs. Himes
body:
Campaign Update
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
December 27, 2023 Over the weekend, the Patch published a profile of my campaign following a lengthy interview with me and separately with Gary Rose, political science prof at Sacred Heart University: MacGuffie takes the hard-hitting lane toward winning U.S. House seat Running in Fourth District, former financial executive sounds alarm about escalating federal debt since Himes took office in 2009 Posted Sun, Dec 24, 2023 By Scott Benjamin FAIRFIELD - Bob MacGuffie has been throwing nasty sliders at Jim Himes since 2009, when the Democratic congressman from Connecticut's Fourth District was in his first year in office and the Tea Party was emerging.
He has video on his campaign web site from Himes' town meetings to prove it.
"I came out of Queens," said MacGuffie in an interview with Patch.com. "I came out of the school yards. I was small. Naturally you get picked on. So naturally I developed a sharp tongue and dressed these guys down."
Sacred Heart University Professor Gary Rose, who wrote a book on the Fourth District in 2011, stated in an e-mail interview with Patch.com: "MacGuffie is waging a bare-knuckle campaign intended to unseat Congressman Himes. As a candidate, MacGuffie is quite unlike the previous Republicans who have sought to unseat the congressman. MacGuffie's style is hard hitting, provocative and he has conducted an impressive amount of research regarding Himes' position and votes on a variety of national issues.".................
You can read the complete article here: [Patch-MacGuffie](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ubRaQcaxtDQEturC4yZG6yBgIJilTPYS2ta7qxjxDoTbG21TgVbmUliG10aHHKd8FkpjFAO37xd35OjMKoz0ZjKVnu-LV34JVmufHdCfZ6zf2Mt8-HwbEn9O6OWMIONz69vl2rQbXqyIBq1y6f-tkmAO-4Rg2tlVslU9E02mci_id3P_MPXQlVQI21wPX5jgBSWD_G6jtvmGyaPh5pX-cZPVNS6Nd7eL8uJEBW13PEOaMMppNyvw99-vEBeu4nOa&c=b59OghcFVbmOHRO04fOGgNPoX9FWx2hfCaqOw6Lajqdc4CECMFVQBw==&ch=R8fdaFSNtK9rRKu4HcQ-zRTtEvEuwt0lpUJgkXcXFM2ECRCA7e8HmQ==)
I will make the 2024 election a referendum on Jim Himes' failed 15-year rule.
Thanks to all who have helped my campaign this year. This campaign reporting period closes on Sunday, If you want to help the candidate who will prosecute an effective and successful case against Himes, please contribute right here [Donate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ubRaQcaxtDQEturC4yZG6yBgIJilTPYS2ta7qxjxDoTbG21TgVbmUvMhRuHVpfNHYHeyBqMJ-lqxgCpR58cA-PgCafHXAYH7lJiwbDIa_6SfscrYYbLgyjHki9XP8vcIv0gFgMRQuPbltNsa6xCgQylyenkiBTEKR9gtUS0YGEKpfTyh6tKNMKmXE0cz8PYvmdzcnMvBhzD0i2nI33TZxngXD2v_nS2oBc0RXuugu1k=&c=b59OghcFVbmOHRO04fOGgNPoX9FWx2hfCaqOw6Lajqdc4CECMFVQBw==&ch=R8fdaFSNtK9rRKu4HcQ-zRTtEvEuwt0lpUJgkXcXFM2ECRCA7e8HmQ==)
Have a Healthy New Year!
Please re-circulate this message to any and all who are interested...or should be. Help is on the way,
Bob MacGuffie Candidate for Congress [www.BobMacforCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ubRaQcaxtDQEturC4yZG6yBgIJilTPYS2ta7qxjxDoTbG21TgVbmUpWJ2VrXMrlR-cb1_xMG69lt-sCqNe7E1fFS751K74_3ER7KyBCPRm2ovYy3i8N0rfhCcaG0QLJsnyn8ILkDmPYS7FaTDcoFL7NjStCYN738&c=b59OghcFVbmOHRO04fOGgNPoX9FWx2hfCaqOw6Lajqdc4CECMFVQBw==&ch=R8fdaFSNtK9rRKu4HcQ-zRTtEvEuwt0lpUJgkXcXFM2ECRCA7e8HmQ==)

name: The Flyover
subject: Man Wins $500,000 Parlay, a Cosmic Snowball, and Neil the Seal
body:
The U.S. military struck three Hezbollah terrorist facilities in retaliation for a drone strike that injured three U.S. soldiers on Christmas morning—one of them critically.

## U.S. Strikes Hezbollah Sites in Iraq
The U.S. military [struck three Hezbollah terrorist facilities](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGv2zAMhH-NvDGQKDtOBg9ZjHZ4RbeOBp9FJ2xlKZXoGPn3hTu_6Ya7w-G-Xx_TB0mUdP9BKw-65IlmlRdPDgF7QD-1TRgWZmTf8OB668-XM3a2eQyXCwXCbmHuu3Nr0V29557ZtZ2zRG0jA1r0DrF3tus8npjDpe-IroSfM_mraS0H0VxOv7MkffAS3_nF5TTntYnDQ_VZjb8ZHA2O-76f1poOz-DICbZqcEy8H7LnEoPBcatQWCkKKVeQBFLoL9CiXMDDVkFLzs8Ke95S4AAO5iIqM8X4PuKh5MRAqjT_gc_3UU9AUe6JAyiXkotUPRapwO3mVvfz-7emDOG5S4xSz71p7X0lif8_6NdI_wUAAP__1Xl6lA) in retaliation for a drone strike that injured three U.S. soldiers on Christmas morning--one of them critically. The Kataib Hezbollah is claiming credit for the drone attack on U.S. personnel, and the U.S. response focused on drone bases and likely killed "a number of militants," the Pentagon said. At the same time, a U.S. alliance to protect shipping in the Red Sea has prompted transport company Maersk to resume [shipping through the Red Sea](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSrCAQheGnwQxLGgQnILiJ2dx0Q6uVduwtRqYAx5q333LjjU_ynf_rPt2RI--P__gkX9c04VL5TZMCCU6CnkwT_EoEpBvyynXaDhb6rtk82FUrZZFgVdYMYNDAbCkoZ2-DGULDHjrQCsCpru81tERhcD3iDWFeUN-E6ShwTbn9TrzXjdb4SW_K7ZKeTfRbra8i9D8Bo4DxPM8201Epl2sXMM5H4Z1KETBu-MKHjDF9ggy0cCB5UtipBPxInNNRJdciMwVZCGVOR6UiL568nloBY5N9eJ0cIxfrhOkeT-T4K6l_h_kJAAD__7_9ZJQ), and rival Hapag Lloyd will decide whether to follow suit today.
## GOP Reps Hit by "Swatting" Attempts
Two Republican legislators, Georgia Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene and NY Rep. Brandon Williams were both [victims of "swatting" false alarms](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvgzAQBeBfY2-OzBnHMHjowpauHZFjLnCtsRG-BuXfV2Hu9klPek96X7fxFihRnj_Dip4fZQyR6YljAwqcAjO2cvIPREAj0TdOm2t3Bavl4gNYDV3EaHrdY2MjTp3uTOvMHTXYVpIHDaYBcI221sAFceqcDaEPcI_B9KLVOBGX_fJdKPOCj_QqT9wvsawy-YV5q8J8CBgEDLzgQim9MwHDUlbMeNSTvxUFDK1xrrGgtpIooqL8xMo0B6Y8q3oEPkE50oSZVWCV8VCvsv-oHbeq3pUCBrn7aTsoJapXJ1o9r4HOVcn_H_QXAAD__wtXaHg) on Christmas Day. Swatting is a false emergency call phoned to the police in hopes they'll send a SWAT team to an innocent household, which can put the victim in danger because the police believe there's a live threat. In Greene's case, a New York man called a suicide hotline and said [he'd killed his girlfriend](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOhCAQQL8GOwwMqLsFxTV2e-2VZsBR2aBsYLLGv7_s1de95DUv7-cxPTCmeKzfuJPjJU8YOL5p0iBhkGAm28xuIQIyDTk9KNPfeuhUsznvtUKrjfZLIAvB3s1iIZDvte687pvoQIHRAINWXWegJZpvQ4d4R_ABzV1YRXPkXNpnjgdvtKQrv6m0Ie9NchvzqwrzJWAUMJ7n2QZfDzrrxwsYPyhg3LE8c4kkGa-Ui1wL0UGynsgcj1UGTEkylpVY3niTHHeSYSux8o5VzngJGJvi5tcZU4q1H4RV644x_XXw_1t-AwAA___8pGaG) at Greene's address and was going to kill himself. Police notified both Greene and Williams before they arrived.
## Man Wins $490,000 With 14-leg Bet
A bettor turned $5 into a $490,000 jackpot with a 14-leg NFL parlay bet. The wager required 14 different players to score touchdowns this weekend, and it came true in the final game Monday night. [You can watch the better's reaction here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOpDAQRL8GMiPTwBgCB5eQzaUXoh67DT4ZG9m9Y83fr9h4K6ikXlB6_57bE33wcf-LJ2l2aUPD_k1bDwKUgGEbW6sdEdDQku6VHB7zAybZHlqZRY5SGWMtmWmU8-QkIrnFWTkTudZrkDD0AKqX0zRAR2RnNSEuCC-Dw9KMkqznlLv_yUc-yIVPelPuTDrboA_mqzTDnwbWBtZaa2depVwpc7mJBtbowt1Uyw0gm0O8iDllkQkNF8FJVB-jj7vAcKbCYpJ3BDqmLAyW4976UQTaBacvc9hUo7gwB_w0sLZZ26v6EHx5qGaU-4k-_Pzj33V9BwAA__9yEW6a). The 100,000 to 1 bet needed [touchdowns from](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAURb8Gb0TwgDgeGLqwpWtHC8Mjfi02FqBE_vsqnbtd6UpHR-frPt89Zdofn35D21OZfej0xFkCh5GDmvUQbUIEVANaOQp1vV3BiGG1WkeQWkuNOsWIKoxGm0Wr6QYSFjENZEGAkgCjFMYouCDG22i8nzwswauJaYGReqmX70J7XzHlszyxXkLZhmzX3o_G1AcDx8Dt51Faf18M3BvMwEl4b8PAtaPU3hi4BXsvlb9ob9wI8cN942Gt1Dr5nW8h-JQqnjzRTm3FxktKXGqe8cEPX7M_Gbih2ni8KGdq15Fp8dg85T-r_n-k3wAAAP__SHtnDg) Najee Harris, Gabriel Davis, Jahmyr Gibbs, DK Metcalf, Jerome Ford, Chris Rodriguez Jr., Jonathan Taylor, Calvin Ridley, James Conner, Raheem Mostert, Javonte Williams, Isiah Pacheco, D'Andre Swift -- and Christian McCaffrey. By Monday night, the first 13 had crossed the goal line. The final game featured McCaffrey's San Francisco 49ers against the Baltimore Ravens. McCaffrey scored in the 2nd quarter.

On this date in 1947, NBC aired the first episode of "The Howdy Doody Show" just after Christmas. Despite starring a marionette, it became television's first big hit show. () Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . It launches on January 9th, and you can | U.S. Strikes Hezbollah Sites in Iraq The U.S. military in retaliation for a drone strike that injured three U.S. soldiers on Christmas morning--one of them critically. The Kataib Hezbollah is claiming credit for the drone attack on U.S. personnel, and the U.S. response focused on drone bases and likely killed "a number of militants," the Pentagon said. At the same time, a U.S. alliance to protect shipping in the Red Sea has prompted transport company Maersk to resume , and rival Hapag Lloyd will decide whether to follow suit today. GOP Reps Hit by "Swatting" Attempts Two Republican legislators, Georgia Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene and NY Rep. Brandon Williams were both on Christmas Day. Swatting is a false emergency call phoned to the police in hopes they'll send a SWAT team to an innocent household, which can put the victim in danger because the police believe there's a live threat. In Greene's case, a New York man called a suicide hotline and said at Greene's address and was going to kill himself. Police notified both Greene and Williams before they arrived. Man Wins $490,000 With 14-leg Bet A bettor turned $5 into a $490,000 jackpot with a 14-leg NFL parlay bet. The wager required 14 different players to score touchdowns this weekend, and it came true in the final game Monday night. . The 100,000 to 1 bet needed Najee Harris, Gabriel Davis, Jahmyr Gibbs, DK Metcalf, Jerome Ford, Chris Rodriguez Jr., Jonathan Taylor, Calvin Ridley, James Conner, Raheem Mostert, Javonte Williams, Isiah Pacheco, D'Andre Swift -- and Christian McCaffrey. By Monday night, the first 13 had crossed the goal line. The final game featured McCaffrey's San Francisco 49ers against the Baltimore Ravens. McCaffrey scored in the 2nd quarter. body:

https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8cdba784ecf7514b263eb836be0604e39d48a49074c347c3b2e8efb3e2e667544cf6fce3267f84f8f891ecc3412d4ef1a6cff1f8d2f240573791195aa1d6b1b72b0f4ecd2079a3de46c920bb06eae655

Friend,

December 31st is a critical date for our campaign. We are facing our LAST CHANCE to make an impact this year before the nation combs through our end-of-quarter FEC fundraising report. If we don't absolutely terrify the Left and shock the mainstream media with the strength of our team, they're going to write us off. This is not something we can afford just ahead of the Iowa Caucus.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7fae9d7333780dd3fdbee5b34bc95aede3fa0f392c4951e3ec9f0290fe2e3cbbeff3d905c1772c3b9451ce4e5f83856af6a97a40248cbfe313ac481997c42cbd
Chip in any amount now!

Every quarter, the Federal Election Commission (FEC) mandates that federal campaigns submit their fundraising report from the last three months... I'm going to level with you: if we show the slightest sign of weakness in this fundraising report, the radical Left, legacy media, and every single one of our opponents will point to a false narrative that our campaign is faltering. We have earned the momentum we are seeing on the ground, friend. We cannot let them spin this story.

We're going to restore hard work, leadership, accountability, transparency, a proven record, fulfilled promises, no closed doors, no shady deals, and no excuses back to the White House. This is something NO other candidate is capable of doing, and they've proven it time and time again with their flip-flopping positions and unfulfilled promises.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7fae9d7333780dd3113873c87412dd1a88b41aec6fabdffa26b9b53d923579f47bc194c78190b8a3da1cd6daa450c75989ec02fcab64c31f4a99c0ff3e394fdd

Chip in $50

Chip in $75

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7fae9d7333780dd3f93f545e7340450a44a8b74ed0a529e02fabee0cb8c5304bc7f2375f436a4cb358f82e6510f3f0ccde1cdabb59b59146dfa6876a6bfd57e3
Chip in $100

Chip in $250

I am counting on you to help me fight for this new era of politics before it's too late. We cannot take our chance to save this country for granted. If we don't have a strong showing on this FEC report, we risk losing supporters across the nation. Now is the time to put it all on the line and I am humbly asking you to step up before December 31st.

Yours in Freedom,

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7fae9d7333780dd3fdbee5b34bc95aede3fa0f392c4951e3ec9f0290fe2e3cbbeff3d905c1772c3b9451ce4e5f83856af6a97a40248cbfe313ac481997c42cbd

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7fae9d7333780dd31d579bbf940f43696c76fbb672d4b21fef49ace195607f8a36da4199aab69dbff471485fa449a25692c2a8cd8882d38f24305586feb99078
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7fae9d7333780dd3fdbee5b34bc95aede3fa0f392c4951e3ec9f0290fe2e3cbbeff3d905c1772c3b9451ce4e5f83856af6a97a40248cbfe313ac481997c42cbd

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=7fae9d7333780dd3fdbee5b34bc95aede3fa0f392c4951e3ec9f0290fe2e3cbbeff3d905c1772c3b9451ce4e5f83856af6a97a40248cbfe313ac481997c42cbd

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Team DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsxVkzliNV

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osxVkzliNV

Friend,

In
2022, Joe Biden and Congress signed the "Inflation Reduction Act"
into law. Since then?

Inflation has increased 17.4%.

Remind us again the title of the bill?

This type of nonsense in DC is why we need Ron DeSantis in the
White House. DC politicians don't worry about slashing spending,
they worry about raising taxes. They do this because not a single
one of them will be affected by the havoc they wreak on our
economy.

HELP US DRAIN THE SWAMP

This is the uniparty in DC; it's what we have been stuck with for
decades and it's destroying our country. We cannot afford to
elect another man to the presidency who has done the job before.
What will change?

It's time to elect a real leader who will be an agent of change.
Ron DeSantis is him. Since Ron DeSantis became Governor:

Florida is running a budget surplus.

Florida has a 2.8% unemployment rate.

Florida leads the nation in people moving into the state.

The
numbers don't lie: Floridians love the culture of prosperity and
freedom that Ron DeSantis provides. It's time to take it
national.

So
if you can, and only if you can, please chip in whatever you can
afford to help Ron DeSantis for President. A dollar today isn't
worth the same tomorrow with our current leadership.

SUPPORT RON DESANTIS FOR PRESIDENT

In
Freedom,

Team DeSantis

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not

of Defense.

clean_body: I need your help in this critical moment, friend | | | Friend: Last month, Trump took the stage right down the street from me to rally his MAGA base while his fellow extremists pushed their hateful agenda on prime-time TV during the GOP debate. There were a lot of lies told, but there's one thing that has been proven true: Republicans will do absolutely anything to win Florida. And now, more and more people from the far-right are going to be tuning into our election. We have to rally our own base of support if we want any chance of fighting back. | | This state has given me so much: A better life, opportunities to give back to my community, a way to serve my country, a beautiful family, and a chance to win my own American Dream. That's why I refuse to let far-right extremists push their hateful agenda on our state any longer. I'm going to defeat Rick Scott next fall and win a better future for Florida — but I need your help in this critical moment to do it. | | I'm so grateful for your support, friend. Thank you, Debbie | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znb2ffkmvb0v9fjd05ujmalqo3ouh2qj9a1ljefo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbs4vpn0bpvem7rv6j8j9nr91lhi2mev3898ceqg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1koonceb3nv2h8qfpcgs1fv318r37t1urj56km8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsig506rqjecq02s5us4eeo0a5hikh4ls6vqn92g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9ljuf2masg2vi9hg8fceb5litlac92a2q6ropo8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd3jgaa1mv2i1pk622okh1iilufruiel1b42mkn0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9h64o30sth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z77lqurtoqtn6o78cf64m32rlqlb9c01fs3cv358_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsmm6dk5salc9radag86h0taiglci53tcjvcr500_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Texas’ public universities are scrambling to rebrand their diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) efforts after Republican Texas Gov. Greg Abbott signed a law prohibiting DEI offices. The new Texas law bans DEI departments and initiatives in public universities and prohibits colleges from holding activities that discriminate on the basis of race, gender or ethnicity. Some colleges in Texas have shut down their DEI

TERENCE P. JEFFREY: Is College Worth The Money? http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgning9ophh8igalhuuk3bg4j9lpmip7iaf72a8g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr4cjkmkpj9ctn6ej3fddnk5qj4t9jmoqjb83lkaqj6cpiekqfb95memj3fcdhmkrjadd7eup72s5lk5obadd5muprad7nk8gq48bi4bh28pr0cpjm0p30c9g649fg

At first glance, the price of attending college may seem astounding.
“In 2023-24,” reports the College Board, “average estimated budgets
(tuition and fees, housing and food, and allowances for books and

name: Gallego for Arizona [ALERT]
subject: Peter: We're really worried
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
After taking some time off over the long weekend we fell way behind on our fundraising.
#

Peter, we're in trouble.
After taking some time off over the long weekend we fell way behind on our fundraising. We expect a drop off around the holidays, but this was much, much worse than we anticipated.
The truth is, we're not even sure we can catch up to our end-of-year goals at this point. Sorry to be so direct, but it really is that bad.
And with our final FEC deadline of the year just days away, this couldn't come at a worse time. As you know, these goals aren't just arbitrary numbers. If we don't hit them, we're at serious risk of losing the edge in Arizona against Kari Lake and Kyrsten Sinema.
We only have one option right now: We need a historic amount of donations over the next few days to reach our goals. We have to break all our records so far. But if everyone who can pitch in does, we can get there. That means we need folks like you, Peter, to join hundreds and hundreds of others and make your first contribution.
If you've been waiting for the right time to make your first contribution to Ruben’s campaign, this is it. It simply could not be more important. So please:
[**Make your first contribution of $3 TODAY. It is especially important that you make this donation today, because if we make enough progress we'll have a much better chance at hitting that end-of-year goal.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231227-1-sm&t=1&akid=1606%2E734936%2E78LKIK)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

When we close the books on this year, we will submit a public report to the Federal Election Commission (FEC) that shows how many people have donated to show their support for our campaign. As a top-tier race, it is incredibly important that we demonstrate our strength against extremism.
I am setting a goal of raising $10,000 with our grassroots supporters before our end-of-quarter deadline on Sunday. If we come together as a team, I know that we can hit this goal and have a strong foundation for the work we need to do in 2024.
[**Your donation, whether it is $5, $10, or more, fuels our mission to empower and uplift every voice in our district. name: Pro Life Update
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zms6tf6sdq5hqpri7gvp1t4d5d2553pihktlmsm8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg6cor0c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0c7l7ikf2vfrmt00uqa7hf60na3hi4j2ffq082o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg6cor0c5h2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq6hr5h2q1tnnefjqv2lqea5s3njkg5mks0ucvr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg6cor0c5h2bs) [NO](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmnrdmr2lcijl795psq0q26nro840cle8khu5b40_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg6cor0c5h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhrtsfcvnpg5oibh01esbcah778p0vhu9c6b8qm0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg6cor0c5h2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdlvt2jsdq60vviokik2iopfdhba9b1785dhc1i8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg6cor0c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp32c9h68o36c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znluih1chlgbncjbl6jggqr4uukcakecpd48ms68_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg6cor0c5h2bs)_

| | 🚨**Let's end the year with a WIN!** 🚨
Dawn Liphardt, Executive Director here, and we need your help for one of our first big projects in 2024. We want to ensure that all voters that move INTO our state and WITHIN our state get registered in their new city.

_We also want to connect them to our County GOP's._

One of our MAIN priorities this year is Election Security and making sure our voter registration process and system is secured and updated. You can help us make this mailer happen.

Approximately _11,000 new Republican_ movers happen a year and we NEED to connect to them. Each mailer costs about **.45 cents after PRINTING and using our BULK MAIL permit**. With your **$45 donation** we can mail **100 cards** and with $5,000 total, we could mail out to EVERY new mover Republican!

Our goal is $5,000 in the next 5 days. I know we can do this.

Donate by the **end of the year** and we can get this mailer out **ASAP** and connect these folks to our county leaders.

THANK YOU ever so much!

~Dawn

clean_body: $5,000 in 5 DAYS - can you help? | | | | | | | 🚨Let's end the year with a WIN! 🚨 Dawn Liphardt, Executive Director here, and we need your help for one of our first big projects in 2024. We want to ensure that all voters that move INTO our state and WITHIN our state get registered in their new city. We also want to connect them to our County GOP's. One of our MAIN priorities this year is Election Security and making sure our voter registration process and system is secured and updated. You can help us make this mailer happen. Approximately 11,000 new Republican movers happen a year and we NEED to connect to them. Each mailer costs about .45 cents after PRINTING and using our BULK MAIL permit. With your $45 donation we can mail 100 cards and with $5,000 total, we could mail out to EVERY new mover Republican! Our goal is $5,000 in the next 5 days. I know we can do this. name: Dean Phillips
subject: Youth Voices Matter: Historic Youth Cabinet Initiative
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dean 24
body:
https://www.dean24.com [https://www.dean24.com]
Hi Friend,
What would a Dean Phillips presidency look like? A melting pot of ideas.
Government is like a business — where you have competing ideas, competing perspectives, and you have competition not with each other, but for each other.
We need to repair America. To do so, I make one commitment: I will have the most diverse cabinet, not just in terms of races and religions, but in terms of politics, in history. I will have a Youth Cabinet for the first time in American history.
Bold? Many Americans would agree this idea is common sense. Help us deliver solutions by chipping in $38. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=12.27.2023.Cabinet&amount=38]
During my time in Congress, I initiated a Youth Advisory Council for High School Students. It allowed these young minds to engage directly with me, sharing their perspectives on the happenings in Congress. It was an enlightening experience, and I am eager to expand this model to a national level.
Do I want the very best and brightest to join this administration? Absolutely. Good ideas come from anywhere, not just from one perspective. I will surround myself with diversity and a team of rivals.
The average age in Congress is 57, and in the Senate, it's 65. Contrast that with the average age in the United States, which is 38. It’s no wonder there’s a disconnect between Washington and Main Street.
If you're ready for a government that represents the next generation, contribute $38 now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=12.27.2023.Cabinet&amount=38]
Younger people bring unique experiences, especially growing up in the age of social media and technology. They understand our world in ways that the current Congress frankly don’t. From grappling with the impact of high education costs to staying actively involved in current events, the youth are more informed and engaged than ever before.
We’re ready for change. We just need to make it happen.
For our children’s future,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103532/images/Signature.png]
- Dean
Congressman Dean Phillips

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Who controls whom?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Trian News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z86v9f1hpjpomgn86itqk52tqivkfr7mdb8suaug_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvf0eci0e2oor6fgjlp65ga9f4onrbgbesp5eep8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkqt0gp7m51k1s8d3eoh39igoj11e7sah6agolig_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h2bs) [NO](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7k6hpocggleiqg4r0mmllei7tmvj2p19tb0lfbg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl2r1ubdrscq0ieud2feth1hdnapl9lpgnnqu8m8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg68o74c5h2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. | | | This sponsored message from Trump Trian News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government? For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: the *two* most vulnerable senators in the country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
Jon and I simply can't keep fighting in the Senate without your help
| | |
---
Peter, I won't beat around the bush. I'm about to ask you to split a donation between my campaign and my friend Jon Tester's (D-MT) – but first, I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this is so important. [**_Or, if you're already convinced, you can click here to rush your support!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75873294/445995067/1075517787?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk205-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTJlZmEwMC1jM2E0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3ZW5D4eOrOUNCtwVXQfuL88Awo7vPy79-L6zvpotEQ=)
Jon and I are running in the two most competitive and important Senate races in the entire country. _CNN_ says we're two of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot, and Mitch McConnell has _personally_ named us top targets for defeat. And with Joe Manchin retiring, Republicans are virtually guaranteed to pick up a seat, which means losing either Ohio OR Montana could cost Democrats our Senate majority.
**Dark money is already flooding into our states to flip the Senate red. So to make sure we have the resources to fight back and win, Jon and I have launched the "Big Sky Buckeye Fund." If you're as committed as we are to protecting the Senate and fighting for progress, we need you to help us raise $75,000 by midnight tonight.**
[**So please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – split between Patty Murray, my campaign and Jon's – so we can win our battleground races in Ohio and Montana and keep fighting for working families across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75873295/445995068/1075517787?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk205-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTJlZmEwMC1jM2E0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L3ZW5D4eOrOUNCtwVXQfuL88Awo7vPy79-L6zvpotEQ=)

Peter,
Democrats are launching a relentless campaign against me.

_**They see me as a threat to their agenda**_ , and they are sparing no effort to undermine our Republican values.

The stakes have never been higher, and I need your help...

_**Without your support, there is a real risk that my seat could fall into the hands of the Democrats, jeopardizing the hard-won House majority that we have fought so hard to secure.
**_
_The outcome of this battle will undoubtedly shape the course of our nation's future, and I’m counting on you to stand with me in the face of this formidable challenge._

Your contribution, whether big or small, will go a long way in ensuring that we can continue our fight for conservative values and principles. Your support will empower us to counter the relentless attacks from the Democrats and safeguard the progress we have made together.

[_**Show your commitment to preserving our majority. >>>**_](https://u32713940.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=QaFdQdrHVXbreAiZFK-2FZpoYXAnXuShHmfoKNlT2uNWWOK78rkMnXNr7-2FL-2FOCNu2ZO0ILWwZsrAMDRFAXsbj1g2U029b-2BNizeLjvf-2BsrM2C6oWFKkmtF0rOwkt1Bx3GFwL1pL-2F4X5cM-2FiG8NRh3K-2FyD9bZHNHSQkYBiyBX-2BQh1-2BO3EKcYHGtke0I-2BDMMCQK0wQ-2FVKiVYaCxw0NDvHf9FVUdA4pkT3-2FceuG-2FUVa6aWWOiclLNngYms3bzZ50KByYI-2BTm_0_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdkLMmWeLnwK0KfPGgXzXHvoIGcfoQrAuI0Zkzwvv9dkHghc1ZFPh4s2VPIB-2BUJPR1ce1MwXOgEsQtpD9Vs-2BDtc8UMjUQVvr40kx-2FtgA3KjRrtxC8kvGJeh3Rql0H1moQch7pSa-2Be9q7V5e1TxWi2kZbBBSYjw9Sj2X5zWuqAhUwjx7UUG6BnnmJb9ZYO35BZoNvtAZLxFsD7VXyzlWQMh6i06QBPNm-2B7dEosQ2FCdbhD1ve7yq10gwfRBxfduPvvD1cvGdhjhrQ0Vg7GiExi3OdrttpZn4CmqH-2BZXFaOXN89Jbn-2F4fTqqp27tMkGRGqphBisTNPlQgJ8VsawC4gpWNlsQ7klMMFkqbTBbisQs670MQt8F72uQafv-2B3pbrDV12fOAiSBJaSPQA4XnWds-2FBq65xnG6EU42t-2FekWfNoJjOWYzYt42l6CJvv-2FIUxpujxED7PzG3-2FJNImDvaCZSA1ymlri9Jj1HXVtIyOwR3Tz5Ilgto1pP7N052-2FrpSK1PM-2FC0IFgTIUxmMGnLG01U8FwJ8ExBPDDdudGkuciFpCK92G29LqXyaIRigrXGT9c9byQ-2FzdssRGFqexI-2Fo6Vn9kI1VmUn8WzLjaBT3-2FwbPZKsVedErKU-2FqVYJozE3F8FAlcchvEz-2F0cIRDA9h4Gd0c5PI0Bms0vIUpXes4EoXp1pfL8BHIT0oI52c6TTYU-2FIvHhFDGs1VMKwGwAfN-2F8hW49IKSbBRE9v-2BAV4vsBhf3D6hBEaPRo-2BW8PtxL77RQcaYnAElLb3ca29pVRMNQx2PSiYcZIGZN7dlL72cnBiJHm2ptQkI5Qd-2BmgsZFIv74MDw79t7t2Pq5nf4NSRs9vhGGbdTGfSZlJuro2PWdAFMSn4icKfvoZ1vjnl-2FpPWUePuh8OYT8-2FibD4hl4SHulGfbrTstP-2Fgn41ENu7EosQLjXye-2FSvLujBSZ-2B0W2tKSrs5AjssR7aZQmEPo5mg1lMQnWnbg2Q-3D-3D)_**
**_
Your generosity will make a significant impact and send a powerful message to those who seek to undermine the principles we hold dear.

Now, more than ever, we need to unite and stand strong against the forces that aim to silence our voices and weaken our representation in Congress. I am confident that with your support, we can overcome this challenge and continue working towards a brighter future for our community and our nation.

Thank you for your unwavering support.

Together, we will prevail.

Sincerely,

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

They see me as a threat to their agenda , and they are sparing no effort to undermine our Republican values. The stakes have never been higher, and I need your help... Without your support, there is a real risk that my seat could fall into the hands of the Democrats, jeopardizing the hard-won House majority that we have fought so hard to secure. The outcome of this battle will undoubtedly shape the course of our nation's future, and I’m counting on you to stand with me in the face of this formidable challenge. | Your contribution, whether big or small, will go a long way in ensuring that we can continue our fight for conservative values and principles. Your support will empower us to counter the relentless attacks from the Democrats and safeguard the progress we have made together. Your generosity will make a significant impact and send a powerful message to those who seek to undermine the principles we hold dear. Now, more than ever, we need to unite and stand strong against the forces that aim to silence our voices and weaken our representation in Congress. I am confident that with your support, we can overcome this challenge and continue working towards a brighter future for our community and our nation. Thank you for your unwavering support. Together, we will prevail. Sincerely, Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Hi Peter, it’s Cheri Bustos — former Congresswoman in IL-17 who proudly represented this community for a decade. As my first year since leaving office wraps up, I wanted to reach out about why your continued support for Eric Sorensen - the Democrat I endorsed as my successor - is so important. Eric’s roots in our district run deep, and we can trust him to represent our values in Washington. In the midst of the circus in Congress he’s had a first year we can be proud of. Once again, our district has been tabbed as ground zero in the fight over the House: Illinois 17th Congressional District is the only seat in Illinois that’s listed as competitive, and the only one national Republicans have already planned million dollar ad buys to flip.
**[We need to keep momentum on Eric’s side, Peter. So I’m making an urgent request: will you contribute $5 to his campaign today? clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, it’s Cheri Bustos — former Congresswoman in IL-17 who proudly represented this community for a decade. As my first year since leaving office wraps up, I wanted to reach out about why your continued support for Eric Sorensen - the Democrat I endorsed as my successor - is so important. Eric’s roots in our district run deep, and we can trust him to represent our values in Washington. In the midst of the circus in Congress he’s had a first year we can be proud of. Once again, our district has been tabbed as ground zero in the fight over the House: Illinois 17th Congressional District is the only seat in Illinois that’s listed as competitive, and the only one national Republicans have already planned million dollar ad buys to flip. I spent five election cycles facing the media circus of our district being the true battleground seat of Illinois, so I’m sympathetic to what Eric’s going through. I know from many tough battles that when we come together, we can rise up against the millions that national Republicans pour into IL-17 every cycle. I’m confident that Eric has the goods to continue to deliver for our district for years – but he’s counting on contributions from supporters like you. Cheri Bustos | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States | | Sent via . name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze8fcvnlac0uurrj1jkfgr6us9cvdlld0ka6nt8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg6aob1c5h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu8fi48n7611080e3cr8gql6qeduvajin158b5co_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg6aob1c5h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjp3ov2ib41f5dt87pmsk8c8m559ietg8niv55u0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg6aob1c5h2bs)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____

clean_body: Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. would like to send you my brand-new book Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. Make your generous gift here: Pathway to Victory is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support. May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, | | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas ICYMI News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:

| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=d52ca5a906704e69be625cec76ca5886&_t=DpFcBh-5YoysE64CsCDIly09NH3_grlsVs54Vk0F89UF6UwxbPJJkjTygjgUCUMa8AJGlreUEmj0BYFOEUTWq1b_7roHDNTKPT-6u38Wko8%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=d52ca5a906704e69be625cec76ca5886&_t=DpFcBh-5YoysE64CsCDIly09NH3_grlsVs54Vk0F89UF6UwxbPJJkjTygjgUCUMa8AJGlreUEmj0BYFOEUTWq1b_7roHDNTKPT-6u38Wko8%3D)

Hi Fellow Conservative,

Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you.

Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d52ca5a906704e69be625cec76ca5886&_e=v47mPR_sLUyEs46fz68rSc7PYfFuo-9XEizFk21RtU3WrCofrSd5vltf_yhDP_rWS309-VdYgeCNd6xEm5SvqzHhJGKKtpX_-jnpsetF32iS1WZwil2MR5272PeyGaABziwyjoZNJXKPiG7KGaEKn5G8-K3uDwNnoet8B7cfoKbNbQE22koQghbYq3ktOKGB1bCimU5PXpe40gECi0eF73uVDqnX-nefB2i-NlBJL-SMf3BEn5LY9dm_4K3XFJ26iW4bA9wSsoyDbbCMzrby5yi2GmtJVh6I2EZsUa3v2qegg4guBqa5GmP7GBpvqGXHmZgRIgpqNGzrWyaW_jQgBzAIIRj7uMNMfGbqaY97TcvoYx5EiIaM5fEawZURZwnI)**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable._**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d52ca5a906704e69be625cec76ca5886&_e=v47mPR_sLUyEs46fz68rSc7PYfFuo-9XEizFk21RtU3WrCofrSd5vltf_yhDP_rWS309-VdYgeCNd6xEm5SvqzHhJGKKtpX_-jnpsetF32iS1WZwil2MR5272PeyGaABziwyjoZNJXKPiG7KGaEKn5G8-K3uDwNnoet8B7cfoKbNbQE22koQghbYq3ktOKGB1bCimU5PXpe40gECi0eF73uVDqnX-nefB2i-NlBJL-Q69dQjJCXMrNuIFlQx0GvbuOJJn6HOUAsiWtjFkKOoKGz-YMbx_sDe_KuKr4aahxbAs3Y8v6BanaKj4YjsHMLoWky061DvDQUsff_to0RIAUxserp8jeWAawpcSJKC66Vj5bqjnzVUMUZsp5PQznOY)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.

---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won.** ➡️

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=d52ca5a906704e69be625cec76ca5886&_e=v47mPR_sLUyEs46fz68rSc7PYfFuo-9XEizFk21RtU3WrCofrSd5vltf_yhDP_rWS309-VdYgeCNd6xEm5SvqzHhJGKKtpX_-jnpsetF32iS1WZwil2MR5272PeyGaABziwyjoZNJXKPiG7KGaEKn5G8-K3uDwNnoet8B7cfoKbNbQE22koQghbYq3ktOKGB1bCimU5PXpe40gECi0eF73uVDqnX-nefB2i-NlBJL-SNdOemmV_dMfmPtWXl41NzOKEPYi794CxOdAvxPpl6aWgPKLhPRPKk2VOS9AXpLFYVgB5wqXtp2DctQoWY-Z4yiiQiu75tPe77StCU6aYEH-XUV7KTqDYuiXzXa8EjhbP4MbeqwT5RGR-k13NwFgeM)
---
When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---

clean_body: Whether you’ve been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn’t be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. | | | | | Hi Fellow Conservative, Whether you've been with me from the start or just heard from me for the first time at the debate, I couldn't be more grateful to have a chance to connect with you. Now, I think it's important to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable.Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words. | | | | | | I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it. After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and no one believed I had a chance. I was polling at a mere 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. | | When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick-me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | I launched my campaign for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Now, our campaign is catching fire, and I need a SURGE of support to keep the momentum strong in order to continue sharing this message across America! Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will showcase the tremendous momentum we have gained! | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, Your support is what keeps our movement thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492
