name: Joe Kent
subject: Speaker Hakeem Jeffries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
You read that subject line correctly.
Thanks to a recent New York court decision that eliminates six Republican seats and replaces them with Democrats, Democrats are on track to take back the US House by a comfortable margin next year and elect radical socialist Hakeem Jeffries Speaker of the House.
The only way Republicans can stop that is to go on **OFFENSE,** and my district in Southwest Washington is **GROUND ZERO** for flipping blue seats red.
Our end of year deadline is here: please help us flip this seat by making an emergency contribution today at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/NsN6Acdu8B8892Uts5PQi2Jw/5aFaXnzcIj21QboMVwYzuQ).
What does it mean for us if we lose the US House and hand the gavel over to the Democrats?
* Higher taxes, more spending, and more money going to support wars around the world that are not in our national interest.

* Eroding parental rights and advancing the radical "trans" agenda.

* A wide-open border and no stopping the flood of illegals, cartels, sex trafficking, and fentanyl.

The truth is my district is the most important district in the country for Republicans to win in order to stop my opponent, Biden Democrat Marie Perez, and others like her from electing an extremist like Hakeem Jeffries Speaker.
We lost this seat by less than 1% last time -- one of the closets elections in the country -- and it's our best hope to gain back one of the seats we are losing in New York State.
Can I count on you to help us raise the money we need to flip this seat? Please give what you can at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/NsN6Acdu8B8892Uts5PQi2Jw/5aFaXnzcIj21QboMVwYzuQ).
Respectfully,

Joe Kent
PS: With the New York court ruling, Democrats have already gained the seats they need to flip the House. Help us go on OFFENSE to pick up this badly needed seat in Washington's 3rd District by supporting my campaign at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/NsN6Acdu8B8892Uts5PQi2Jw/5aFaXnzcIj21QboMVwYzuQ).

Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
---
[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/unsubscribe/o2MugVE0sjPAeG1zwzE3zPwB377NamVJrtTtZu9DI892k/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/5aFaXnzcIj21QboMVwYzuQ)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Peter, it’s Roland Gutierrez.
Every day, there are thousands of Texans who need an abortion for reasons that only matter to them and their doctor
Ted Cruz and his extreme Republican Party have no right to be part of that equation.
Enough is enough, Peter.
If you’re ready to defeat the most extreme anti-choice Senator in Washington, then I have just one question: Will you chip in $25 or more before midnight to help send me to the Senate? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Republicans have forced thousands of Texans to travel out of state for abortions
But let me be clear, Peter: No one should be forced to travel thousands of miles for routine and necessary health care procedures.
These anti-choice policies are causing cruel and unnecessary pain and suffering.
But if we stand together, we can make them pay the price for their anti-choice extremism — by defeating them this November.
If you’re proud to stand with me in the fight for abortion rights, then can I count on you to rush in $25 or more before midnight? Anything you can spare would go such a long way in the fight to defeat Ted Cruz. >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rg2024-em?amount=25]
Thank you,
Roland

Hi friend, it’s Greg. Over the next few days, you may notice more emails than usual from me and my team – and I wanted to take a moment to explain why.

**Sunday, December 31st marks our final end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline of 2023. This means, after the end of the month, all of our _internal fundraising data will become public._**

All year, extremist Washington Republicans have been targeting our district as a top pick-up opportunity – so we know they’re going to scrutinize our end-of-the-year fundraising report to look for signs of weakness. **Posting a strong end-of-quarter is our best way to prove that their Big Money backed attacks won’t stop us. This will be a defining moment for our campaign, so I’m asking for your support.[To ensure we finish the quarter strong, my team set a goal of raising $18,000 online before Sunday night. subject: Breaking News: Tucker's Revelation Shakes the Foundations of History!
body:
We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda.

We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda. .
Tucker Carlson, a brave voice in media, was recently dismissed by Fox News under the guise of "remarks" he had supposedly made.
However, we've discovered a more profound reason behind his firing.
Tucker was on the brink of exposing a 1,700-year-old Biblical scandal - a shocking lie that has caused immeasurable pain and suffering throughout the ages.
This deception, carefully guarded by the Democrats, has shaped the course of history, often leading to wars and conflicts.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z80naq4a5v58c1j4sl2fk2hk3nqetitfh85vgcr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg6eoj2cth2bs)

This video carries an [urgent message](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl9g4er5jon0b82nmg3a8firsjmkr9pv4km0or30_rp22sh2s8i6eo36ctg6eoj2cth2bs)for all those born before May 16th, 1986.
It's a message that the Democrats don't want you to see, which is why they might try to remove it from the internet soon.
To ensure you get access to this eye-opening revelation, we urge you to watch the video while it's still available.
Share this information with your friends and family, as together, we can combat the misinformation spread by those in power.

**🔥🔥Justice Clarence Thomas is in the HOT SEAT!🔥🔥** According to the new SCOTUS code of conduct, **a justice should disqualify himself or herself in a proceeding in which the Justice’s impartiality might reasonably be questioned.** [**Look, MILLIONS of Americans reasonably question Thomas’ impartiality! Sign now to demand that Justice Clarence Thomas to recuse himself »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-recuse?source=FFR_20231227_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20567%2E4449941%2EAvd2XC) | [ 45,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: Sign now to DEMAND that Justice Clarence Thomas recuse himself. »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-recuse?source=FFR_20231227_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20567%2E4449941%2EAvd2XC)
---
Listen, Thomas has _already_ shown that he can’t be impartial.

**In 2022** , he was the _only_ justice to vote to allow Trump to block the release of presidential records to the January 6th Committee.

It was later **_exposed_** that his wife was part of the conspiracy to overthrow the 2020 Election! **His rulings could affect whether his wife goes to prison!**
[**There’s a clear conflict of interest for Justice Thomas. He MUST recuse himself. Sign now to demand that Justice Thomas recuse himself »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-recuse?source=FFR_20231227_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20567%2E4449941%2EAvd2XC)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I'm counting on you to have my back again
| | |
---
Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75882131/446019840/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4643-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjMzYjZhZC1jYWE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AQsi1rT1TLnQ4ORwo2paP6OuM6NDC2VuS7YPw4E8uTA=)
Thank you for having my back when we fought for **health care coverage for 9/11 first responders** and **expanded benefits for veterans** exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need.
Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that **empowers survivors of sexual assault** in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members.
Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 13 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York.
Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for **national paid family leave** for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the **Equal Rights Amendment** to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country.
**My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support.**
But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. **Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat.** I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors.
**[_Please, friend, you've stood by me so many times before, and I'm counting on you to have my back again. Will you chip in before midnight tonight to join me in this fight for progress and defend our Senate majority? Your support would mean so much to me._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75882132/446019841/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4643-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjMzYjZhZC1jYWE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AQsi1rT1TLnQ4ORwo2paP6OuM6NDC2VuS7YPw4E8uTA=)**

clean_body: I'm counting on you to have my back again | | | Friend, I want to personally thank you for always standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington. = Thank you for having my back when we fought for health care coverage for 9/11 first responders and expanded benefits for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits. We must ensure that our heroes get the care that they need. Thank you for supporting my hard-won legislation that empowers survivors of sexual assault in the military to seek justice. Together, we took on the Pentagon to win reforms that will create a fairer system for service members. Thank you for never giving up the fight to make gun trafficking a federal crime. After 13 years of advocacy, late nights and whipping votes, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns into New York. Thank you for your continued commitment to family rights and gender equity. With your support, I have spent the last decade fighting for national paid family leave for all workers. And now, I'm proud to lead the charge to add the Equal Rights Amendment to our Constitution — which would finally give us the legal basis to restore reproductive rights across the country. My record is about winning real results for the families I swore to serve — not for corporations or megadonors. And none of that would be possible without your continued, tireless support. But here's the bad news: Republicans are emboldened after their historic victories in New York last year. Now, they're laying the groundwork for an even bigger red wave in 2024 — and they're directly targeting my seat. I refuse to accept a single cent from corporate PACs, so I'm relying on grassroots donors like you to compete with their right-wing megadonors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = With gratitude and love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: If you want to keep Michigan blue...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=946%2E135344%2EtLyEJq)

☀️ To everyone who wants to make sure we keep Michigan BLUE in 2024, please don't click away. ☀️

We have said it before, but it bears repeating: this Senate race in Michigan is going to be one of the most competitive, and, sadly, most expensive, races in the country.
**And if the outcome of this one Senate race wasn't enough on its own, the only way to keep Democrats' Senate majority is to defend this swing seat.
**

If everyone reading this donated even $10, we would not just have a huge number of individual donations, but we would be so well-resourced we would have no problem hitting our important FEC fundraising goal before December 31.
But not everyone gives. That’s just the reality. So we’re relying on people who understand how important this race is to chip in before our FEC deadline at the end of this month.

For our Republican opponents, most of the money they'll spend to try to beat us will come from their own self-funding, corporate PACs, or super PACs spending millions on TV on their behalf.
But most of our fundraising comes from people chipping in a few bucks at a time. Without those donations -- big or small -- we couldn't run a winning campaign.

Our average online donation is around $35. Many donors give less. Some give more. All that matters is that you’re choosing to power this campaign before our official FEC deadline on December 31.
[**If Elissa Slotkin winning this Senate race and keeping Michigan BLUE in 2024 seems worth $3 to you, we're asking you to take a minute to secure the future of this campaign by making a donation before our FEC deadline on Sunday. Thank you.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231227-1-tt&t=2&akid=946%2E135344%2EtLyEJq)**

name: Jimmy Kimmel
subject: Will you support my friends at GIFFORDS PAC today?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We must be loud and use our collective voice to make a change.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231227-1-30&refcode2=7107.3935704.VGuSjH&t=1&akid=7107%2E3935704%2EVGuSjH)
---
Hi there, Jimmy Kimmel here. I know you’re used to seeing me on your TV screen, but today I’m reaching out to you about an important topic close to my heart: ending America’s gun violence crisis.
Gun violence isn’t always in the headlines, and it can be far too easy for us to go about our daily lives and forget that it’s happening each and every day. But for the families who now have empty seats at their dinner table—like the families who lost a child in Newtown, Parkland, or Uvalde—they can never, ever forget.
[**GIFFORDS is doing lifesaving work at the forefront of the gun safety movement, and I'm proud to be an ambassador for this incredible organization. Will you join me today in supporting GIFFORDS PAC by making a contribution to support their crucial work?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231227-1-30&t=2&akid=7107%2E3935704%2EVGuSjH)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231227-1-30&t=3&akid=7107%2E3935704%2EVGuSjH)**
Gun violence is a uniquely American epidemic. This year alone, we’ve experienced record numbers of mass shootings. The leading cause of death for children in our nation is gun violence.
This is the only developed country in the world where this happens. We have to do something to change this.
Laws such as universal background checks, safe storage laws, and extreme risk protection orders would help ensure that guns can’t fall into the hands of people who shouldn’t have access to them. We call these laws commonsense because that’s just what they are—common sense.
It is long past time for our representatives to do their job and truly represent the American people. The majority of Americans support commonsense gun safety legislation. Yet far too many of our politicians make the choice to stall the passage of lifesaving legislation because they’re afraid to stand up to the gun lobby.
[**This is not a moment where we can sit back. We must be loud and use our collective voice to make a change. So please, will you make a commitment to ending our nation’s gun violence crisis by donating $3 to my friends at GIFFORDS PAC today? They have a critical FEC fundraising deadline coming up, so your support at this moment is crucial:**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-dec23.vYScJV&refcode=em231227-1-30&t=4&akid=7107%2E3935704%2EVGuSjH)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17016?c0=giffords-em-dec23.eB6WxE&refcode=em231227-1-30&t=23&akid=7107%2E3935704%2EVGuSjH)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-dec23.xM0yow&refcode=em231227-1-30&t=24&akid=7107%2E3935704%2EVGuSjH)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-dec23.4nQm2O&refcode=em231227-1-30&t=25&akid=7107%2E3935704%2EVGuSjH)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-dec23.sy2DIk&refcode=em231227-1-30&t=26&akid=7107%2E3935704%2EVGuSjH)**
---

| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-dec23.H_9s2_&refcode=em231227-1-30&t=27&akid=7107%2E3935704%2EVGuSjH)**
---
****

****
Thanks for standing with me and the GIFFORDS team today. Your support is crucial to our ongoing fight to end gun violence.
\- Jimmy Kimmel

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

| | I’ll keep this really quick, Peter.

Right now, we’re facing gerrymandering and voter suppression in Georgia. After a federal judge ruled that Georgia Republicans’ legislative and congressional maps violate the Voting Rights Act and dilute the power of Black voters, the GOP drew new maps that ALSO dilute the voting power of minority voters!

We’re not strangers to GOP voter suppression in Georgia. Years of GOP attacks on Black voting power have forced us to develop the most robust voter protection program in the entire country. But right now, our program is smaller than ever and significantly underfunded, **_right as the GOP is revving up their partisan gerrymandering tactics._**

[**_So here’s my request: Pitch in. Any amount will go a long way toward reinforcing our voter protection team and supporting our work._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75883072/446022541/710125701?refcode=20231227.1_KO_12AK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjAwOWZhMC1jYmE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=toAKzKkeOT-lvLJZEt8QCir7EhRO_enan6bIQsvVz-Y=)

Thank you for all your support,

Kevin

Tolulope Kevin Olasanoye

Democratic Party of Georgia

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Re: Your free “I’m voting in 2024” sticker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
We’ll send you a free “I’m voting in 2024” sticker as a thank you — so you can show off your plans to participate in our democracy all year.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo)
---
MAGA Republicans have a plan to win elections: **Step 1:** Prevent American citizens from voting through aggressive voter suppression tactics. If that doesn’t work and they lose, then they move on to Step 2. **Step 2:** Spread the Big Lie and attempt to overturn election results that they don’t like. It’s all part of an ongoing scheme to defy the will of the American people, prevent voters from being able to choose our country’s leaders, and hold onto power. Now there are numerous ways that we can fight back. Like passing national legislation to protect the right to vote and the right to have that vote counted. And abolishing the filibuster so we can pass popular, badly needed plans. I’m running for re-election to stay in those fights all the way. But another critical piece of this plan is by continuing to vote and make your voice heard. **[2024 is another critical election year, and we need to go in prepared. So if you’re able to make a contribution of any amount to our campaign before the FEC fundraising deadline, we’ll send you a free “I’m voting in 2024” sticker as a thank you — so you can show off your plans to participate in our democracy all year.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1055?t=8&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo)** | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1055?amount=28&t=9&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo)
---

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1055?t=23&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1055?t=25&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1055?t=27&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1055?t=29&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1055?t=19&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1055?t=21&express_lane=true&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo)
---

---
During the last presidential election, voters showed up in record-shattering numbers — even in the middle of a pandemic — to make their voices heard. Joe Biden and Kamala Harris won more votes than any ticket in history. A few weeks later, on one of the darkest days of our democracy, a violent mob of domestic terrorists — incited by the president of the United States — attacked the Capitol and tried to overturn the results. This is the type of anti-democratic extremism that we’re still up against. But, in the 2022 midterms, Democrats were able to expand our majority in the Senate, and election deniers lost every statewide race to oversee elections in every presidential battleground — shoring up the freedom of the American people to choose their own leaders in 2024. **But that didn’t happen by chance. It’s because we grew a strong grassroots movement across the country to reject authoritarian extremism. To defend our democracy. To protect our freedoms.** We can win this next election — we can continue to protect our democracy and make real change — if we link arms and get organized in this election, person to person, starting now. **[So, if you’re able to pitch in to power this fight, please donate $28 or anything you can before the end of the year — and we’ll send you a free “I’m voting in 2024” sticker so you can let the GOP know that you won’t be silenced.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1055?amount=28&t=15&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo)** Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1055?t=13&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo)
---
| [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/365?t=4&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/367?t=5&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/368?t=6&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo) | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/369?t=7&akid=1872%2E4032634%2E5VBGTo)

This is great news, team: President Biden's approval rating continues to increase as polls show him _statistically tied_ with Donald Trump!

President Biden is moving the country in the right direction by strengthening our economy, creating over 14 MILLION jobs, and reducing inflation -- _and**Americans are taking notice.**_

But to defend our incredible progress under the Biden-Harris administration, we need to confirm that Democrats are supporting President Biden and REJECTING a Trump comeback! **_So please, let us know your response before the midnight deadline:_**

clean_body: What do you say? Kamala and I would love to meet you. | | | $1 That's all it takes for a chance to win a contest we’re launching to have a cup of coffee with me and Kamala. The contest lasts only for a limited time, so if that's all you need to hear, use this link to contribute and you’ll be automatically entered to win: People ask me all the time if these messages asking for $1 really matter in a presidential election that will cost so much money to win. Yes. They do. Grassroots supporters like you who donate to these messages are how we get the vast majority of our donations. So when you see us on TV and rising in the polls, your support is a big reason for that success. And for today, your donation also gets you entered at a chance to have a Cup of Joe with me and the Vice President. So what do you say? Kamala and I would love to meet you. Just chip in $1 or whatever you can afford here: you're selected, we'll take care of all the travel and logistics. All you'll have to do is let us know how you like your coffee. Joe Joe Biden

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: No gun law is safe — not in California or anywhere
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Any gun safety law will continue to be thrown out by NRA-owned federal judges until we pass a Constitutional amendment to make our communities safer from gun violence.

Friends -
Here’s another, very recent example of why we need a Constitutional Amendment on guns.
As you know, California has some of the strongest gun laws in the country, and some of the lowest firearm death rates to match.
Our gun laws work.
But we have to consistently fight back against far-right judges overturning common sense gun laws.
They've overturned our assault weapons ban, our high-capacity magazine ban and legislation to stop gun manufacturers from marketing weapons of war to our kids.
Last week, a right-wing judge stopped a law that would have banned firearms in hospitals, libraries and children's playgrounds.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3089?t=1&akid=1741%2E4767699%2EdxKhUZ)
Wake up.
Any gun safety law will continue to be attacked by NRA-owned federal judges until we pass a Constitutional amendment to make our communities safer from gun violence.
\- Gavin
* * *
👉🏻 Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If it sounds worth it that Democrats fight back everywhere rights are under attack — even in Red States — we are asking you to contribute $20 to Gavin Newsom’s Campaign for Democracy today. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in.
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1741%2E4767699%2EdxKhUZ).

1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

| Hi there, I’m sure you’re enjoying this holiday season with loved ones, so I don’t want to take up too much of your time.

Now that the Supreme Court is going to hear arguments in a case that could overturn the FDA’s approval of the leading abortion pill, it’s painfully clear that we must take all actions possible at the state level to protect our fundamental rights.

That starts with who we elect as governor next year. As we approach our last deadline before 2024, we need to reach our goal so we can hit the ground running to defeat my anti-abortion opponent.

**_[Before the ball drops on 2023, my team has a goal to raise another $17,000 for our toss up race. I wouldn’t ask you to give if it wasn’t truly important. As governor, I'll fight to ensure everyone in New Hampshire has the freedom to make their own reproductive health care decisions. I will push back against extremist policies like the _15 day_ abortion ban that’s been proposed by Republicans in the state legislature.

**My opponent, Kelly Ayotte, tries to scare Granite Staters about our state becoming Massachusetts, but the real threat is New Hampshire becoming an extreme anti-abortion state like Texas, where women can’t get the reproductive health care they need—even in dire circumstances.**

We can’t let it happen. That’s why we need a surge of support before the new year to help us both prove it and act on it→

**_[https://go.cindewarmington.com/a/end-of-year](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75885934/446029386/-893500759?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_CW_20231227_FR_1.1_3MO_candidate_na_na_eoy&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjUyZjZlOS1jZGE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RTL26T22DsqFz4c2sbUBUJaFiQvuRGOeWgsd77lcy4Q=)_**

Thank you,

Cinde

| Friends,
We have a very important fundraising deadline coming up Sunday, December 31. I need your help. I'm running for Congress because the enemy isn't at the gate -- the enemy is THROUGH the gates and in our communities.
Open borders, fentanyl, out of control national debt, outrageous spending and more; the threat is here. Joe Biden and the socialist left are ruining the greatest country the world has ever known.
[If you agree with me, click here to donate to my campaign.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d9daH-iCo2OG5szVlCjRHDoUQC6cbR_6Plgp-mbDiu0ErVglXKMCzgz9F3hbyzwX3NBuYYh_UL1EF5nZzwLKGaDySW_VNEEwCLhCdkl19BAUHAWqEdl4XhXvuuAhrFzFQfPRu3v4QUm6U4HX5dZv-3va_iJ7WjGglm_PHaCd4Gbj4RPg0WhxkVf_wb_r5jRBiFdJdN30p855Pe3Io-T2oDFyM-G816OUmV_bkKC3nAM=&c=FmrIizzoDWf1K_w01ZFRvrqFu_qJBq7YcxnSCyT3U-jKxiN6a7Zf2g==&ch=uTcD6oU0pQlx82zUyi8DpPzNNjZdt4fVcmKCKCz0HXZn64DjQ28HHw==)
We can't wait -- we have to fight back NOW.
I'm running because every one of us must do everything we can to stop the far left from destroying our country.
I served as a Navy SEAL to protect the land of the free and home of the brave. I want to continue my service to our country.
Donald Trump's Save America agenda is the best way to fight back and I'm running to help him carry out that agenda when he's returned to the White House.
I need you because my opponent is actively working to STOP TRUMP and STOP HIS AMERICA First AGENDA!
[Join me and click here to contribute to our campaign. We have to win -- the future of the U.S.A. is at stake.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d9daH-iCo2OG5szVlCjRHDoUQC6cbR_6Plgp-mbDiu0ErVglXKMCzgz9F3hbyzwX3NBuYYh_UL1EF5nZzwLKGaDySW_VNEEwCLhCdkl19BAUHAWqEdl4XhXvuuAhrFzFQfPRu3v4QUm6U4HX5dZv-3va_iJ7WjGglm_PHaCd4Gbj4RPg0WhxkVf_wb_r5jRBiFdJdN30p855Pe3Io-T2oDFyM-G816OUmV_bkKC3nAM=&c=FmrIizzoDWf1K_w01ZFRvrqFu_qJBq7YcxnSCyT3U-jKxiN6a7Zf2g==&ch=uTcD6oU0pQlx82zUyi8DpPzNNjZdt4fVcmKCKCz0HXZn64DjQ28HHw==)

clean_body: | | | | | | == | The Enemy is Here/ I need Your help! | == | Friends, We have a very important fundraising deadline coming up Sunday, December 31. I need your help. I'm running for Congress because the enemy isn't at the gate -- the enemy is THROUGH the gates and in our communities. Open borders, fentanyl, out of control national debt, outrageous spending and more; the threat is here. Joe Biden and the socialist left are ruining the greatest country the world has ever known. == We can't wait -- we have to fight back NOW. I'm running because every one of us must do everything we can to stop the far left from destroying our country. I served as a Navy SEAL to protect the land of the free and home of the brave. I want to continue my service to our country. Donald Trump's Save America agenda is the best way to fight back and I'm running to help him carry out that agenda when he's returned to the White House. I need you because my opponent is actively working to STOP TRUMP and STOP HIS AMERICA First AGENDA! == | == | I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | | | | | | | For God and Country, Delegate John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun == The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA New Email: john@mcguireva.com New Website: www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.com powered by

Our final filing deadline of the year is only a few days away — and we are not where we need to be if we want to hit the ground running in 2024.

We’re on course for our kids to inherit a climate catastrophe, a crumbling democracy, and a country where gun violence is the leading cause of death for our children— that’s unacceptable.

We have the power to change this: We must elect leaders to Congress _who put our kids first._

clean_body: | | | If you'd like to unsubscribe, | | Our final filing deadline of the year is only a few days away — and we are not where we need to be if we want to hit the ground running in 2024. We’re on course for our kids to inherit a climate catastrophe, a crumbling democracy, and a country where gun violence is the leading cause of death for our children— that’s unacceptable. We have the power to change this: We must elect leaders to Congress who put our kids first. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Too many politicians put power, money, and privilege over people — including our kids. Our endorsed candidates are different — they understand that children are the bottom line. In 2023, you helped endorse five candidates who have shown they will always put our kids first. But if we want to make a real difference — that’s not enough. We need to ensure they’re elected in 2024. name: John Carney
subject: Being Grateful
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/OoMlZ6mwLUW28FIdhd9_yA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OoMlZ6mwLUW28FIdhd9_yA2]

Hi Friend,

As we celebrate the holiday season, it's a time to reflect on the things we are thankful for. I am honored to have served as your Lt. Governor, Congressman, and Governor. With each election, I have been grateful for your support and vote as we work together to improve our state. As I prepare to run for Mayor of Wilmington, I continue to need your support.

With only five days until the end-of-the-year reporting deadline, I still need your help . Any contribution, no matter how small, will help us run a strong campaign.

The maximum contribution is $600. You can contribute online [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OoMlZ6mwLUW28FIdhd9_yA2] or send a check to:

Carney for Wilmington
P.O. Box 2162
Wilmington, DE 19899

Thank you for your support, and I wish you a Happy New Year!

Sincerely,

John

DONATE [https://secure.ngpvan.com/OoMlZ6mwLUW28FIdhd9_yA2]

Carney for Wilmington
P.O. Box 2162
Wilmington, DE 19899
United States

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ff550416a68d49abb6c296be9fad4a6b&_e=Erq-e29n9SaU1OUgbyVs-2j9Eh69rc1EZFU_xtTIK_H44jkAIoI_zYSaXR0zeUtllz3LFXI3iP6LJR5E65tYjnNYqE_BCW5oOWM3Cw_tNcahSdsUOGk-y0E7-xEHBvYJYeI4otwVEdCaiepvfVY5ovqAiZCU3S3VQDo4Y91nEHDHsIYv9RdkWRsilMCa0yHL2Wy-1yxFBPmDiZqM7KsxGzb54MSfKiiAv8pDJnNUBmwtkwv4x2_Q2_-HLHcigxQQEwT3UsELfvdxG0kBdOl6o1FgoFm9AWJE_K64YJaFTCnprexF7qi1nO0e-vLMNBwEftNjPKyU7Q3N5AmInM_CRklJJGN-sQZDSjAIPlvyY_Jk2srl9onoY25OE0eHGIhxywqdD3d_sa_8018s58i0sQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**I’ll keep this brief:** if we don’t get our online fundraising on track today, we won’t hit our goal before Sunday’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.

We all knew November would be slow, with everyone enjoying their time with family for Thanksgiving, _**but it’s looking like December is on track to be even slower**_ , if you can believe that.

I’ve been told by folks who’ve run for office before that the Fourth Quarter is tough, but until you’re in the thick of it, it’s hard to know just how difficult it can be to reach supporters around the holidays.

I’m never one to back down from a challenge, so now I’m using what time we have left to **[plead for your help](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ff550416a68d49abb6c296be9fad4a6b&_e=Erq-e29n9SaU1OUgbyVs-2j9Eh69rc1EZFU_xtTIK_H44jkAIoI_zYSaXR0zeUtllz3LFXI3iP6LJR5E65tYjnNYqE_BCW5oOWM3Cw_tNcahSdsUOGk-y0E7-xEHBvYJYeI4otwVEdCaiepvfVY5ovqAiZCU3S3VQDo4Y91nEHDHsIYv9RdkWRsilMCa0yHL2Wy-1yxFBPmDiZqM7KsxGzb54MSfKiiAv8pDJnNUBmzaEzUDOMh9xSmkUu6K78Y68jMXPGp_C0be-p-yUwZS0aY-S_bgfyQbA7bBySYMiHMamvQ9H20H6fV-EKcosKgYm8AuIV0Ro0DNeq8NHUSOO54ZmaE9CnBncM7osm7T33F4uG7hs5W_muoQo5bLw-cPnU_x5SBPraSs87nODZ9l2Q%3D%3D)** ahead of the upcoming end-of-year fundraising deadline on December 31st.

I spoke with my finance director, and here is where things stand today:

_**We need to raise an additional $39,600 by Sunday.** I know we can do it._ But we need conservatives like you to step up and make gifts of **[$5, $50, or even $500](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ff550416a68d49abb6c296be9fad4a6b&_e=Erq-e29n9SaU1OUgbyVs-2j9Eh69rc1EZFU_xtTIK_H44jkAIoI_zYSaXR0zeUtllz3LFXI3iP6LJR5E65tYjnNYqE_BCW5oOWM3Cw_tNcahSdsUOGk-y0E7-xEHBvYJYeI4otwVEdCaiepvfVY5ovqAiZCU3S3VQDo4Y91nEHDHsIYv9RdkWRsilMCa0yHL2Wy-1yxFBPmDiZqM7KsxGzb54MSfKiiAv8pDJnNUBmxdlx2ZtbW97aPP70CpCEqYlXo-_4V8JaNt1Yn-8kcBZsgyBusQjuoNs5Q6vU1omY-Cy_dDxVT0hzaJ4_-FS_S33TTPGzzLN3MwVmuR438DV9X8z-lvu5BBO662gLs4rWIgxMMPtS4yn9q0ED6fuwW52AhNiDVdd8Dqj2LpgFx2BQ%3D%3D)** right now and every day for the next four days.

[**DONATE GENEROUSLY ->** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ff550416a68d49abb6c296be9fad4a6b&_e=Erq-e29n9SaU1OUgbyVs-2j9Eh69rc1EZFU_xtTIK_H44jkAIoI_zYSaXR0zeUtllz3LFXI3iP6LJR5E65tYjnNYqE_BCW5oOWM3Cw_tNcahSdsUOGk-y0E7-xEHBvYJYeI4otwVEdCaiepvfVY5ovqAiZCU3S3VQDo4Y91nEHDHsIYv9RdkWRsilMCa0yHL2Wy-1yxFBPmDiZqM7KsxGzb54MSfKiiAv8pDJnNUBmy9YHe8Q8x4zPJt9q8dC2iPcWNSFjtb_0IJz_xRlcoxe50jIJk-CthsAsy9TgxSCpmb9AqoM9XB2JFotBNS0czLl9A8wuqufhPTBUdnEvRB8V9DPNui0dttQ2nXT22s4_N4BRc4Ly39qq-gZVqNlxu69SwEqtbS7XBdG0N7DvLoEw%3D%3D)

I’m asking for your help today because America’s future is on the line.

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ff550416a68d49abb6c296be9fad4a6b&_e=Erq-e29n9SaU1OUgbyVs-2j9Eh69rc1EZFU_xtTIK_H44jkAIoI_zYSaXR0zeUtllz3LFXI3iP6LJR5E65tYjnNYqE_BCW5oOWM3Cw_tNcahSdsUOGk-y0E7-xEHBvYJYeI4otwVEdCaiepvfVY5ovqAiZCU3S3VQDo4Y91nEHDHsIYv9RdkWRsilMCa0yHL2Wy-1yxFBPmDiZqM7KsxGzb54MSfKiiAv8pDJnNUBmzFyJMJI1VX2SDKQtmUnASlxZd47irKDPgX2Qk1GHd9IVcC_Egv8nPit3tFoqMQw3TnrKGogCfwgnB2ONUTItFBfasLz34DByGMlA2glhbfCQr2vFlNY5h1uJqy8eWq5spC2RQBBG99Xf5k7OVAa3gaPjVKptevqYc5AOQzLKi90Q%3D%3D)

* * *

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ff550416a68d49abb6c296be9fad4a6b&_e=Erq-e29n9SaU1OUgbyVs-9QrLAmmZ7JjPExYh484qma5_0Sdzh4xrbHwd_5bVSzScXCMnnm4_LciNni_713JClwkQ8FFJMO82Ic0vD4EXTW-mwnqK921PFE7b0gO5MX4xrsRslN7vzedgxBDmZWaNrPq7-m6stkyxN9xAehtpGQCoKY1nvWfIwKfC74x6lr7uDOWPhKrxZT2wpunT9kYJw%3D%3D) [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ff550416a68d49abb6c296be9fad4a6b&_e=Erq-e29n9SaU1OUgbyVs-7_diSbf4vPyBnDkqtKi5qhc6Y5GaCo0iIVv3zCrOZrSghIq6OQLX9vV4uXrN8hpXA3Q49UfsEvnzvimdVfiTpMjkoIHru4FTouBch4CvDPnIt2hxP8e_JOD9GVFdTUvTq_5XsOOaOhYxJSVv4x0oWSWOhg6n_tgY5MiZOoACH38Z5ZwuVwfpem6XvbPvSI7Qw%3D%3D) [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ff550416a68d49abb6c296be9fad4a6b&_e=Erq-e29n9SaU1OUgbyVs-wvBNRmwEUr7SCRoAg_GuwtTVcWD4c23HBcgts96LjNdNESceSLDKTA4nEq1B81P9-e0J0FHzkjoZ4vbrU5CV76_HReRH2xzX1VNnJZB4AFdUNRp2y8uEtyvQC8temWjy6RmEZVQF9o5EP3FGEoPYqVrbEr8kNlGpEd2R5qZKCdmlcFdm3-OyqoBponmmvJPTwHUY9rKuf6zfOELJFf38Wo%3D)

---

Peter,

In 5 days our campaign is coming up on our most critical fundraising deadline to date. **_The FEC's end of year fundraising deadline is on December 31st!_** Once we submit our report to the FEC our opponents, media, and the entire nation will see the campaign's financial outlook ahead of the Iowa Caucus. This is our **LAST CHANCE** this year to take action against leaving **our lives** in the hands of Joe Biden any longer. We have to step up, put everything we've got into this race, and **fight** for our future by ****[**supporting Ron DeSantis.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=293107d45f224897b6e94464c1bfe4ab&_e=ni9wcwfm-OqRRxlKwmdMK4uGBFzlcxacCkYjoJIlAaNNhp2yEy3_LgdqMvt-c18s3IsLBrr69J5Tnf3c58sW-3GG0_4bI11iV--btlAUr1JrMYdo9iGLyP4fgEjGqUakDm6x2OvWBB1Vc5RrhIrj8-H9r6l-NFOul-dogjhr58l3T96dHcpaVg-ledeyYkqHjlusK2gNoNtkMfm4F7X1Ij2D8vlUjyPUh6vO0wrU2Hm3j3zaMXDuBOEJI4wmEvUbzAaHkYxqPc2vR7t37dQmH8Rjc6SuSIw5370NyWBaSi7Q6pHsLcs80jlbXE0T_mvmxW5aRO6akOUu5oEX42qop_C3I6-6hi20jNKO5CadPr4dvqq--hXsEoY0_vfSMkCQxPVpkHAWZYS1Bhgz8tiLJHRhkz_u0UM9gnnOmspKBiLrDZsK2fj3HUSli_2wHWei)****

| | | **_We've done the math. We need our team to help us raise $37,000 every day leading up to the new year or we lose our chance. This it is for 2023, Peter_** _**.**_
---
| | | | [Chip in TODAY!](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=293107d45f224897b6e94464c1bfe4ab&_e=ni9wcwfm-OqRRxlKwmdMK4uGBFzlcxacCkYjoJIlAaNNhp2yEy3_LgdqMvt-c18s3IsLBrr69J5Tnf3c58sW-3GG0_4bI11iV--btlAUr1JrMYdo9iGLyP4fgEjGqUakDm6x2OvWBB1Vc5RrhIrj8-H9r6l-NFOul-dogjhr58l3T96dHcpaVg-ledeyYkqHjlusK2gNoNtkMfm4F7X1Ij2D8vlUjyPUh6vO0wrU2Hm3j3zaMXDuBOEJI4wmEvUbzAaHkYxqPc2vR7t37dQmH0eCHqvmpk7eRZVKezEOCtDSfgIMalTcfFkKwwF8301--0qSoA3fTtSw9KOdB2ZplaIZ_nntS3fxc2kz0dBv3sdgWmrZeoi9IzQJ_BOqn53FZEJZeYuPycAOOuFaIaj7RS6RRLD5COEUO1TkpcbU4QNNzRWJxYLJJf7VlogcXa1R)
---
Trust us, we know that this is not the email you want to see the day after Christmas. We love what we do, but we hate having to ask you for money, especially after the holidays.**The truth of the matter is that the Left isn't going to take a day off, and we can't either.** **We need your support, and we can't wait another day.** **_This is one of the most crucial elections our country has faced in decades_**.****_We can't sit by, slow down, and let the left win. Now is the last chance we have before this race hits its boiling point at the Iowa caucus._

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=293107d45f224897b6e94464c1bfe4ab&_e=ni9wcwfm-OqRRxlKwmdMK4uGBFzlcxacCkYjoJIlAaNNhp2yEy3_LgdqMvt-c18s3IsLBrr69J5Tnf3c58sW-3GG0_4bI11iV--btlAUr1JrMYdo9iGLyP4fgEjGqUakDm6x2OvWBB1Vc5RrhIrj8-H9r6l-NFOul-dogjhr58l3T96dHcpaVg-ledeyYkqHjlusK2gNoNtkMfm4F7X1Ij2D8vlUjyPUh6vO0wrU2Hm3j3zaMXDuBOEJI4wmEvUbzAaHkYxqPc2vR7t37dQmH9QF8tttTZlT9MqaQKfZEvDasPeJ8lP-WWy_ZUc9qQ9o6f2a0x7jla57O6rXaXSdtHPCjc70pv8QNErGJZdDVsIP1ca5GHtkvWSTNj2kQYvQAlwmhZCh9PbyuSVXMqGJZXfaP8jKELNgTjuEEhZIYbizi3FostPAFQa5iycgOHc7)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=293107d45f224897b6e94464c1bfe4ab&_e=ni9wcwfm-OqRRxlKwmdMK4uGBFzlcxacCkYjoJIlAaNNhp2yEy3_LgdqMvt-c18s3IsLBrr69J5Tnf3c58sW-3GG0_4bI11iV--btlAUr1JrMYdo9iGLyP4fgEjGqUakDm6x2OvWBB1Vc5RrhIrj8-H9r6l-NFOul-dogjhr58l3T96dHcpaVg-ledeyYkqHjlusK2gNoNtkMfm4F7X1Ij2D8vlUjyPUh6vO0wrU2Hm3j3zaMXDuBOEJI4wmEvUbzAaHkYxqPc2vR7t37dQmH4eYGtuaad0uS2DgTVOoYt8zWG32QetHvBjYJU6V6wsymTDucS5MtjRTuTVc61f4rpi62hr-J9rmz0ZJ2kRVvtbskp83Ys1toEpgUw_Cdmi_HM0c35Vri7hPWDb0wNv6WloA8mXqzl-wyYPT11milv7VJ-SoyU9aUEni8F1nlF_u)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Peter,
I want to explain why this week is so important for us.
The first and only time our campaign is required to disclose our 2023 fundraising data publicly is shortly after December 31, giving Republicans in Minnesota and across the country the best opportunity yet to gauge our strength heading into next year’s critical election.
To ensure we leave no room for doubt that we are ready to hit the ground running on day one to protect our DFL majorities, keep Minnesota blue, and keep Donald Trump out of the White House, we set an end-of-year goal of $150,000, and with just five days to go, it’s clear we need to pick up the pace – and fast.
My fundraising team tells me you’ve yet to donate this year, and I wanted to follow up personally – because if there was ever a time we needed your support, it is right now.

The first and only time our campaign is required to disclose our 2023 fundraising data publicly is shortly after December 31, giving Republicans in Minnesota and across the country the best opportunity yet to gauge our strength heading into next year’s critical election. To ensure we leave no room for doubt that we are ready to hit the ground running on day one to protect our DFL majorities, keep Minnesota blue, and keep Donald Trump out of the White House, we set an end-of-year goal of $150,000, and with just five days to go, it’s clear we need to pick up the pace – and fast. My fundraising team tells me you’ve yet to donate this year, and I wanted to follow up personally – because if there was ever a time we needed your support, it is right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for everything you do for our state. I’m grateful, Tim Walz ********=******

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688141%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZNIwqKDog2HmWghJMQb52Q&sysid=1)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you’d like to give online, here’s a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688142%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oD9%2fpYL2JYCC9CBabcUjuQ&sysid=1)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity’s show that I’ve partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I’m the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left’s cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America’s freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that’s when you know you’re saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America’s founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688143%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pa90ywHSOxvvgPps%2blU7Hw&sysid=1)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women’s identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688144%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=452BO60XIrP6MhhcOLIgfQ&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2041%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=6YB1zT0R%2fdQCCtWv00uG1A&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688255%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fu4sEMLeB%2bznCAdppbzOMg&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c688256%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PNL6pJnXx2BGDiunln81LA&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c2041%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=6YB1zT0R%2fdQCCtWv00uG1A&sysid=1)

name: James Carville
subject: I need your attention, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
It’s not looking good
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T418710ed-3a73-46fa-b180-6618c6159879/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T421fd09a-86a4-45cf-bd3e-49f75505a163/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I need your attention, Peter. Anthony D’Esposito just became the most vulnerable incumbent in the country, meaning Republicans will be spending millions to hold onto NY-04. When it comes to Republican extremism, Anthony D’Esposito is just like the rest of them. He voted to elect extremist Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House and just this month led efforts to launch a baseless impeachment investigation into President Biden. Make no mistake, with extremists like Mike Johnson and Anthony D’Esposito leading the GOP, they’ll continue their attacks on Social Security, reproductive rights, and LGBTQ+ rights. The biggest mistake we can make right now is to sit back and watch it happen. We only need to flip 5 seats to retake the House majority, and this is one of them. We need to act now to flip this seat and elect Laura Gillen for Congress. [Will you split a contribution with Blue Amp Action and Laura’s campaign for Congress with a $10 contribution today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T47c0bc73-36a3-4533-a4a7-1eae785f6dfe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T267e67c6-7bc1-49b2-b6a7-86316013ca2f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thanks for your support, James
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |

---|---
| **Blue Amp Action PAC**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_em_fr_op_carvilleforny04_231227?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0cb0aa1f-994b-4dd3-a75c-3043f307728a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC

name: Janelle Stelson
subject: Let me tell you a story…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson
body:
Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/57CdP-wFgkuQm58EpOgxvQ2?unsubscribedata=XX%2FUMo9J2Y3v5yLCo2F6WSxPjqPz9buiO%2BDlJ5Uobaf83q4jHPtjEYnL31BJtMoWTgyx%2F8KKQLDGjr%2BRSomCg3OIT0j1UIavUU%2FK445DvjTeG5YfzucTvsCU41q6kL4GPfZq6Jt4NUgUKPLhCxpiJybUY13Qt7ElDpaIcfHA78kQsll1vb%2BSq5rspc4EImcgMxPQq%2BI1Eb1xLoYZEpfuBhmEFLyMMGr4BMmaNGtZ7sgM2XlZamntmoa8WpkFInmPPDtOiMmtX9awXA3rbf5EDDTokMGjykZSTSSO%2BTMHdqV0WAT5N3ynurWxizeuICwlE5lCRk%2B0BdxQARQXmxC98Qh2bUtaQJbCWZ%2FERtvi6KJk2KPRIwmKYEFnxSjSYz4HcAgcVcOxQz9mwY62MULEY5yE0NTXdJJU0lmMU1CIfRLTeVXm4YcYCk8jFfKctIm5)
---
| |
---
Let me tell you a story about why I decided to run for Congress.

For the past 40 years, I was a TV news anchor, telling the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I reported on the brokenness of our healthcare system and told the stories of families who couldn’t afford their utility bills. I spent 40 years putting a spotlight on injustice every chance I got.

Then I saw something that horrified me. **On January 6th, 2021 and the days following, I saw my Congressman, Scott Perry, inciting unrest, spreading conspiracy theories, and plotting to overturn our votes.**

I’m running for Congress because we deserve better.

But right now, I’m up against the most important deadline of this campaign so far – the final End-of-Quarter deadline of 2023, and I’m aiming to raise **$30,000 by Sunday** at midnight. | [Help me meet my deadline→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75888949/446038902/-398252547?source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_122723_1_1_EOQ_R&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RkZjA3OTAtZDFhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PpnAC1Ou_1Pb3V2nl1DicCL4vMciGuRCsAzexqD578c=)
---
Now that might seem like an insurmountable number, but it’s critical that I meet that goal. Why? **Because come January, dark money groups and big-shot Republican donors will be able to see how much I raised and if I look vulnerable, they’re going to pour even more money into Scott Perry’s campaign.**

We can’t let that happen. [Will you pitch in $10 or even $50 to help me meet my goal and send Scott Perry packing come 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75888951/446038903/-398252547?amount=50&source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_122723_1_1_EOQ_R&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RkZjA3OTAtZDFhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PpnAC1Ou_1Pb3V2nl1DicCL4vMciGuRCsAzexqD578c=)
If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.
---

clean_body: Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Let me tell you a story about why I decided to run for Congress. For the past 40 years, I was a TV news anchor, telling the stories of Central Pennsylvanians. I reported on the brokenness of our healthcare system and told the stories of families who couldn’t afford their utility bills. I spent 40 years putting a spotlight on injustice every chance I got. Then I saw something that horrified me. On January 6th, 2021 and the days following, I saw my Congressman, Scott Perry, inciting unrest, spreading conspiracy theories, and plotting to overturn our votes. I’m running for Congress because we deserve better. But right now, I’m up against the most important deadline of this campaign so far – the final End-of-Quarter deadline of 2023, and I’m aiming to raise $30,000 by Sunday at midnight. | = Now that might seem like an insurmountable number, but it’s critical that I meet that goal. Why? Because come January, dark money groups and big-shot Republican donors will be able to see how much I raised and if I look vulnerable, they’re going to pour even more money into Scott Perry’s campaign. We can’t let that happen. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = We have a real shot at flipping this district, but = I’m counting on you. — Janelle | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for more than three decades as an Emmy-award-winning journalist. Now, Janelle is taking on Scott Perry and fighting for what we deserve — good-paying jobs to support our families, abortion rights, the highest quality healthcare and education, and someone we know we can trust. Janelle needs your support to unseat MAGA extremist Scott Perry and flip Pennsylvania's 10th District blue.** | = = Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson Friends of Janelle Stelson P.O. name: The Exodus Effect
subject: Breaking News: Tucker's Revelation Shakes the Foundations of History!
body:
We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda.

We live in a time when the truth is often obfuscated by those with a hidden agenda. .
Tucker Carlson, a brave voice in media, was recently dismissed by Fox News under the guise of "remarks" he had supposedly made.
However, we've discovered a more profound reason behind his firing.
Tucker was on the brink of exposing a 1,700-year-old Biblical scandal - a shocking lie that has caused immeasurable pain and suffering throughout the ages.
This deception, carefully guarded by the Democrats, has shaped the course of history, often leading to wars and conflicts.
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb841pfaijj881s10l1dj72hodqb1d761i3ifnig_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti60o72c9h2bs)
Fortunately, we have a [newly surfaced video](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z23l17cjj9h0iltannggk1kgbn7rnj3pm805n1lg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti60o72c9h2bs)video that lays bare the truth.
This video carries an [urgent message](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkdsikd7fvfe5442heerlhdo4jvpi6ee5qqr4s0o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti60o72c9h2bs)for all those born before May 16th, 1986.
It's a message that the Democrats don't want you to see, which is why they might try to remove it from the internet soon.
To ensure you get access to this eye-opening revelation, we urge you to watch the video while it's still available.
Share this information with your friends and family, as together, we can combat the misinformation spread by those in power.
[Watch the video before it's too late.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd57bbge5gi95qb5c14jqpk4r5945tr34tbocce8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti60o72c9h2bs)

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zekf6t9l0png1bm57tpqfqacndqou75cbu3f02lg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti60o72c9h2bs)

American Briefing

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: An important update about my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please read this, Peter.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce with an important update about my campaign.
After my team and I got back to work after the holidays, we officially set our last end-of-quarter fundraising goal of 2023: **40,000 individual donations.**
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in toward our most ambitious goal yet before our big deadline on Sunday.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40497?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm) But first, please let me tell you about why this goal matters — and what will happen if we don’t hit it.**
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40497?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm)**
**Before I explain anything else, I want you to know that this isn’t some arbitrary goal.** Staying on track means we’ll enter 2024 in the strongest position possible, with the resources to keep holding Hawley accountable by reaching Missouri voters with our message throughout the year. Falling behind could mean something very different.
So this week, my team and I are going to do everything we can to hit this goal and make sure we’re prepared for the fight ahead — **including asking grassroots supporters like you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you think is best before Sunday’s deadline.[Can I count on you, Peter?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40497?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40498?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40498?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40497?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm)
---
From the moment we got into this race back in January, Josh Hawley and the GOP insiders propping up his campaign have been determined to tear me down. And with the help of grassroots supporters like you — chipping in and sharing our message when you can — we’ve made it clear: **they’re right to be scared.**
Just a few days after we launched this campaign, _National Journal_ said our race “represents one of the Democratic Party’s better offensive targets” in 2024.
And since then, we’ve made that a reality by breaking Missouri fundraising records and building a truly people-powered coalition to take back this Senate seat with support from the Missouri AFL-CIO, the Missouri Fire Fighters, elected officials and community leaders across the state, and national organizations like League of Conservation Voters.
**Now multiple polls even show this race in a _statistical tie._**
That’s why GOP insiders and corporate mega-donors put more than **$1 MILLION** into a brand new Super PAC to attack me — and it’s why national Republicans are dumping money into Josh Hawley’s campaign.
They know that Hawley is the most vulnerable GOP senator up for re-election next year — **with even worse approval ratings than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida.** And they can tell we’re putting together a powerful grassroots movement that’s capable of winning this race, flipping this U.S. Senate seat, and taking back power for real working people.
**So now, we need to be prepared to head off the attacks that are already happening from those GOP insiders AND keep holding Hawley accountable by getting our message in front of voters** — and that’s why I need your help today, Peter.
**[Can I count on you to add a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you think is best today so we can hit our end-of-quarter goal and defeat Josh Hawley in 2024? I’m not taking a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors in this race, so I mean it when I say anything you can afford to give makes a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40497?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40498?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=8&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40498?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=9&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40498?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=10&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40498?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=11&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40498?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=12&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40498?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=13&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40497?refcode=em20231227-4473&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm)
---
**When we defeat Josh Hawley and flip this seat, I promise you this: We’re going to shake things up in the U.S. Senate.**
Together, we’ll secure voting rights, outlaw war profiteering, legalize weed, abolish corporate PACs, empower workers in their workplaces, and stand up to Big-Brother-style attacks on abortion access from control-obsessed politicians like Josh Hawley.
We’ll stop handing out money for Wall Street and forever wars, and start rebuilding communities in Missouri and all across the country. And we’ll create the next generation of energy jobs right here at home.
That’s what we’re fighting for in this movement. And I’m glad you’re a part of it.
Now let’s get moving,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231227-4473-footer&t=15&refcode2=4473_614464_6DNyhm&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=16&akid=4473%2E614464%2E6DNyhm). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: New York GOP Takeover [via Team Thomas]
subject: MAGA Mike Johnson is an honorary New Yorker?!

[**Peter, I’m about to ask you to renew your 2024 Democratic Membership with $10 before my final End of Quarter Deadline of the year. First, please let me explain why your donation is so important. With extreme MAGA Republicans in control of the People’s House, all the tremendous progress Democrats have made is on the line. I need 2,000 supporters to chip in before my End of Year Deadline to compete with the MAGA mega-donors, rush funds to every battleground race and fight extremism every step of the way. Can I count on you to split a donation between me and The Collective PAC? >>**](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZ2_zXNv0yn8-5_jaZCTxGkqfQ3s4AfPgIbOe6O1yVNIIeqvVjXzCE6_n-OWarHFHXHxScpJ-WQkkBCNY5sdbCZX-qoCalSL0_abV1dZnMymOfCfGmnYlDbWocsO3LkYJfA0dNyytVwNRqjzbkIYUSjvQsE6WXinZm9Z3hyaQG9VV-UGABQpodFn8dxJ2b6ChCDz1gsRiyq2Tnj76qnNf79yA-uv643EiKqLxEQiVtZ7ek2c52amHdOGUA1A-6vWH8AbbEX9m3rmgkrsowQ-BDT0uYIxUPImIf34c9TGfnkPKJA1L1pVjmSBzeb2m_ELS-jKzi_Lt0scG_tGT0d1pznE4fQPQsdQ4jPRa3J4oXe66PbUUKfsBI5dXZT1BYOYW0eMbnILXpmq-l7uhZOY8qbw/42h/hIQ82NNFSXGIJ8NzfoNzPQ/h2/nMD7e2pZ6p5HY6AVFuJloRXYMThR0E4tnCppYJ14FaU)

This is serious, Peter.

MAGA Republicans are too extreme to lead our country.

They brought the House to a complete standstill for weeks.

They peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and protected serial liar George Santos.

And they’ve raked in millions to buy their way into power.

If you'd like to unsubscribe | | This is serious, Peter. MAGA Republicans are too extreme to lead our country. They brought the House to a complete standstill for weeks. They peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and protected serial liar George Santos. And they’ve raked in millions to buy their way into power. We can’t waste a single moment, Peter.
