name: Adam Schiff
subject: My faith has been my compass
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4862%2E5257348%2EYdCdbT ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hi Derek, I
wanted to share this photo of me at my Bar Mitzvah when I was 13 years
old.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=4862%2E5257348%2EYdCdbT ]Adam Schiff at his Bar Mitzvah

It’s easy to chuckle at this photo and see just how far fashion has
evolved since that classic 1970s bow tie — but it is also an opportunity
to tell you about how the guiding principles of my faith have guided me
through my life.

My family moved quite a bit during my school years. And when we finally
settled in the San Francisco Bay Area, we joined a reform synagogue with a
wonderful Rabbi. His sermons were different than I had experienced
elsewhere — they covered contemporary issues, and shed light on how Jewish
learning should inform our response to those challenges.

Guided by these sermons, and by other wonderful influences in my life like
my parents, my older brother and my public school teachers, I developed a
deep interest in history, philosophy and public service. We have a saying
that is part of a Jewish tradition — “Tikkun Olam,” or repairing the
world. I carry that beautiful idea with me each day in my work.

There’s a lot that’s been broken, and there’s a lot to fix, but I’m ready
to do my part to leave our state and country in a better place for future
generations. I’m committed to attacking the changing climate that is
ravaging the world, to repairing our broken democracy, and to advancing
peace, something more important than ever.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1005&akid=4862%2E5257348%2EYdCdbT ]As we approach our final FEC deadline of the year, your support is
crucial to my continuing work. Together, we can continue the tradition of
repairing the world. With that in mind, will you pitch in
$3 to
help?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em.8jAHEM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=4862%2E5257348%2EYdCdbT ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

$10

$100

Thank you,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=4862%2E5257348%2EYdCdbT ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

name: Josh Stein (personal)
subject: Let me introduce myself, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
My name is Josh Stein. I am a husband, a father, a proud North Carolinian, and the current Attorney General of our state. And I am running for Governor of North Carolina. | Derek,

I'm writing today with updates from the campaign trail, important news coming out of North Carolina (like how recent polling shows our campaign in a DEAD HEAT!), and appeals for a contribution to our campaign. And yes, this email will ask you to donate at the end. [If you already know how important it is to hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal, you can click here to make a contribution.](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2216?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231227_FR_eoq_0_3MO_JoshStein_JoshStein_NA_eoq.1.1&t=5&akid=6551%2E1827488%2E1uDAf5)

Today, I wanted to let you know who I am and why I am in this tough race in the first place.

My name is Josh Stein. I am a father, a husband, a proud North Carolinian, and the current Attorney General of our state. And I am running for Governor of North Carolina.

For the past seven years as Attorney General, I've taken on big fights for the people of North Carolina and won. I've worked hard to keep families safe, hold corporate wrongdoers accountable for the damage they've done to our people, make polluters pay to clean up the messes they make, and defend your reproductive and voting rights.

I've stood up to the radical right who are trying to take away our freedoms. Because the bottom line is this: North Carolina is a great place to live — and we must do everything we can to protect the state we love and the people who live here.

Now, I am running for Governor of North Carolina because we're facing a real threat. My opponent Mark Robinson is a MAGA extremist who wants to tell you who you can love ... and who you should hate.

Despite how wrong Robinson is for our state, we're in a statistical dead heat in the polls.

We always knew this race would be a close one — statewide races in North Carolina always are. My team set a $150,000 online goal for this quarter, and hitting this number is crucial to our efforts to fight back against extremism in our state and win this election.

name: Debbie
subject: We've proved them wrong.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
Friend, it's official.
| | |
---
Team, it's official: 2024 is less than a week away. It's hard to believe how fast the first couple of months of this campaign have flown by — and how much we've accomplished in that time.
**Before this campaign enters high gear in 2024, I want to take a moment to reflect on everything that we've accomplished and personally thank you for being one of my earliest supporters.[(If you're short on time, thank you for all that you've done. We've got a long road ahead of us, and I need reliable people like you by my side. Will you chip in a donation here to keep our campaign on track for victory?)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75890799/446043899/-1832279535?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk531-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDA4NjM1N2ItZDRhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8Uv9caBXUgXVajLJQfYwdywOaCXBQ3aY1NoFVvPb5bE=)**
Just a few months ago, there were plenty of people out there who wrote off Florida. They never imagined that so many people would rally against Rick Scott. They never imagined that a grassroots team could outraise a _megamillionaire._ They never imagined that we could make this race a statistical tie and one of the most likely seats to flip blue in 2024.
_But we've proved them wrong._**Because, in this country, if you believe enough, if you work hard enough, and if you have enough courage, you can do what some might believe is impossible.** It's a lesson I've learned over and over again — in the stories I've heard from families across Florida and in my own life.
I came to America as a 14-year-old immigrant from Ecuador. My family lived in a one room apartment, my mom worked double shifts, and I found a minimum wage job to help pay the bills. Achieving our American dream wasn't easy. But eventually, I was able to give back to my community and serve Florida as the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress.
My family's story is one of courage. It’s a story of hardwork, perseverance, and an unwavering belief in what is possible in this country. And it's a story that I share with millions of Americans.
Anything is possible in America if you're willing to fight for it. _That's why I know that we're going to win in 2024_. The incredible people who make up this team — people like you, friend — have proven that they'll never give up. **We won't rest until we've defeated Rick Scott, maintained our Senate majority, and restored the promise of America that he's worked so hard to undermine.**
Thank you so much for being one of the very first people to believe in my campaign. Now, as 2023 comes to a close, it's up to us to continue this fight into the election year. We'll only defeat Rick Scott if we keep this momentum going. That's why I have to ask once again:
**[If you have anything extra to spare, will you make a donation right now to power our campaign into 2024 so that we have the resources to defeat Rick Scott? name: James Carville
subject: I’m F*%$ING TERRIFIED
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Excuse my language, Peter, but I’m F*%$ING TERRIFIED.
The news of Joe Manchin’s retirement is a HUGE BLOW to Democrats’ chances of holding their Senate majority.
With an open seat in West Virginia, Mitch McConnell only needs to flip ONE more to retake the Senate, and you can bet that national Republicans will turn their full attention (and resources) to Bob Casey in Pennsylvania.
This race was already gearing up to be one of the most expensive Senate races of the year, but now GOP spending is going to skyrocket. If we’re going to re-elect Bob and stop Mitch McConnell from taking back the gavel, we need all the grassroots support we can get.
[**That’s why I’m asking: Can you rush an urgent donation to Bob’s re-election campaign to stop national Republicans from buying this seat? Your action TODAY could make or break our Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20231227-1&refcode2=1507_552475_uXTxm2&akid=1507%2E552475%2EuXTxm2)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20231227-1-el&refcode2=1507_552475_uXTxm2&akid=1507%2E552475%2EuXTxm2) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20231227-1-el&refcode2=1507_552475_uXTxm2&akid=1507%2E552475%2EuXTxm2) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20231227-1-el&refcode2=1507_552475_uXTxm2&akid=1507%2E552475%2EuXTxm2) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20231227-1-el&refcode2=1507_552475_uXTxm2&akid=1507%2E552475%2EuXTxm2) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20231227-1-el&refcode2=1507_552475_uXTxm2&akid=1507%2E552475%2EuXTxm2) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20231227-1&refcode2=1507_552475_uXTxm2&akid=1507%2E552475%2EuXTxm2)
---
**The stakes couldn’t be more clear: If we lose Pennsylvania, it’s game over.** Democrats could lose the Senate majority AND the White House.
There’s no way in HELL I'm going to stand on the sidelines and let that happen. So I’m asking one more time: [**Will you rush $5 to Bob Casey’s campaign today to help his team raise the resources necessary to prepare for the tough fight ahead of us?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20231227-1&refcode2=1507_552475_uXTxm2&akid=1507%2E552475%2EuXTxm2)
Thank you for stepping up.
James Carville

Bob Casey for Senate

name: American Defense News
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp338ftidljjnu9du69q158lke9sfk8k93kv73kg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti64or2cph2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfkvn0cvi9hrcu4nn79hhen2hm6ueq9psbou5nb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti64or2cph2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfucs4giple3e5r4j6tgk8n7fm6stoua61j1jqc8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti64or2cph2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrdroientgnv6f1tcpbmb71uro85pan5cllj91r0_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti64or2cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9h64p30slh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z72ouposcnqfqct8u3ucni586s6s2i7i37fbn3ig_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti64or2cph2bs)_

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgo4doqsem1lofgoeegkk1go7nfae9bfa5gt8250_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr0cpjm8oj3c9j649fg)

name: Karen at United We Dream Action
subject: ICE detained me when I was 18 years old
body:
I watched as ICE officers knocked on our door to arrest my father and me, and forced ankle monitors onto my mother and sister. | | | Hi Peter, When I was 18 years old, I watched as ICE officers knocked on our door to arrest my father and me, and forced ankle monitors onto my mother and sister. This traumatic scene unfolded after years of legal battles and confusion ever since my family applied for political asylum. Our lawyer never told us our case would carry deportation orders for our entire family. This is the reality for so many young people in the United States, living in the shadows to escape deportations, afraid every day of being separated from their families. Luckily, DACA arrived soon after, and my world opened up. I was free to go to school and work, support my family and secure my future. DACA changed everything for me — and now it’s in greater danger than it has ever been before. DACA is likely on its way to the Supreme Court for the second time, and we can’t be certain what comes next. But the one thing I know for sure is my family and families like mine need more than temporary protections. We are contributing members of our society, and should not be treated as threats or targets. Enough is enough. **That’s why United We Dream Action is using this end-of-year fundraising campaign to prepare for not only the DACA fights ahead, but ALSO securing a pathway to citizenship for all 11 million undocumented people. DACA was never enough, and now is the time to use our momentum to fight for more. Will you join us with a donation today:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8CyraxqLLfAsc7Mu4MEH22nEZGSLCSm9HgCsMIZhMTf57F7FDv086u3iI1eXgEuZM6rRra-BfuPYurbBjLHoAH4iB6oBM4Pqr0CcIwButFNuMWqF__5ETjgAmii_1fUZSFOIkptmD5Wh5lK4tsCEFSqHWvFRqIMK7SxFVwarxsQle94bkNtLp_mYGZMBLIBrcy2mM2auUEsnDDZ8b9M6QrJfZMvyzhZvqIyWVr0asoZ1dhJFd-Qu24jkH4JD7XAOIQ1sbJxcXOq9SVEwXEgYm75e7sxqNDOovxd9jNe8utq0pHFTe0HyrcjqhOLt4VvOVjby5ROZKW_PgRZcTMfdebbKRUy2OmbD69FkAVwKZVa5NIp7fPHk7gkDlKlpqkl-gOgKxHRk0VwwZyNA1zRxBRcFycawH56zN5ngB4LJiWjPzc9v-HxQ9S_je3M5QrTfuLS1UeEkmy8zBpXdXTJ7a5Q/42h/8N53V8weQVWd1g0Uc_7iyA/h0/GWzlKGB2ssQQpbp-Tdit5gY9wrnS2mwzBhXJnmC9UFI)

After I was released from detention, I was drowning in shame and fear. I became isolated and depressed, scared to share my story, afraid I would be judged. When I found the United We Dream community, I was transformed by the love and acceptance of my peers, who understood my struggles and gave me the support I needed to break my silence.
Now I speak out unapologetically about the horrors of ICE and the need for permanent protections, because I know that I’m not alone.
Thanks for being on our team,
Karen, United We Dream Action

clean_body: I watched as ICE officers knocked on our door to arrest my father and me, and forced ankle monitors onto my mother and sister. | | | Hi Peter, When I was 18 years old, I watched as ICE officers knocked on our door to arrest my father and me, and forced ankle monitors onto my mother and sister. This traumatic scene unfolded after years of legal battles and confusion ever since my family applied for political asylum. Our lawyer never told us our case would carry deportation orders for our entire family. This is the reality for so many young people in the United States, living in the shadows to escape deportations, afraid every day of being separated from their families. Luckily, DACA arrived soon after, and my world opened up. I was free to go to school and work, support my family and secure my future. DACA changed everything for me — and now it’s in greater danger than it has ever been before. DACA is likely on its way to the Supreme Court for the second time, and we can’t be certain what comes next. But the one thing I know for sure is my family and families like mine need more than temporary protections. We are contributing members of our society, and should not be treated as threats or targets. Enough is enough. That’s why United We Dream Action is using this end-of-year fundraising campaign to prepare for not only the DACA fights ahead, but ALSO securing a pathway to citizenship for all 11 million undocumented people. DACA was never enough, and now is the time to use our momentum to fight for more. Will you join us with a donation today: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | After I was released from detention, I was drowning in shame and fear. I became isolated and depressed, scared to share my story, afraid I would be judged. When I found the United We Dream community, I was transformed by the love and acceptance of my peers, who understood my struggles and gave me the support I needed to break my silence. Now I speak out unapologetically about the horrors of ICE and the need for permanent protections, because I know that I’m not alone. Thanks for being on our team, Karen, United We Dream Action

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: It shouldn’t be controversial
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This month, I stood alongside union leaders and Jewish advocates demanding
a ceasefire. The next day, dozens of staff from the Biden administration
held a vigil outside the White House, “risking their jobs and, possibly,
their careers because they know the stakes of this moment.”[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231227-1-rt.veUFxQ&refcode=em20231227-32526&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=32526%2E1203867%2E_6WRg9 ]

[1]Common Dreams: Biden Staffers Demand Cease-Fire at 'Historic' White
House Vigil

It shouldn’t be controversial to say: Stop the killing! Let’s save lives!
In fact, it's what a vast majority of Americans and people around the
world are calling for, and our anti-war movement keeps growing.

But rather than work for a ceasefire or acknowledge the humanity of
Palestinians, our elected leaders are supporting more violence. Before the
House adjourned for the year, my colleagues voted to approve an $886.3
billion budget for war and destruction—the largest military budget in the
history of our country. I voted against this massively wasteful budget
that funds more bombs, weapons, and war crimes.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231227-1-rt.veUFxQ&refcode=em20231227-32526&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32526%2E1203867%2E_6WRg9 ]Make a split donation to my campaign and Justice Democrats today to
keep the pressure on President Biden and Congress to join us in demanding
a ceasefire now!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231227-1-rt.veUFxQ&refcode=em20231227-32526&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=32526%2E1203867%2E_6WRg9 ]Contribute $3

Thank you. Together, we demand not only a ceasefire, but also an end to
the blockade on Gaza, an end to the dehumanizing system of apartheid, and
the return of all hostages and those arbitrarily detained.

In love and solidarity,

Rashida

[1] [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140315?t=1022&akid=32526%2E1203867%2E_6WRg9 ]Biden Staffers Demand Cease-Fire at 'Historic' White House Vigil

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1023&akid=32526%2E1203867%2E_6WRg9 ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1024&akid=32526%2E1203867%2E_6WRg9 ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231227-32526-footer&t=1025&refcode2=32526_1203867__6WRg9&akid=32526%2E1203867%2E_6WRg9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=32526%2E1203867%2E_6WRg9

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Join Me in Standing Up for Women’s Sports and American Values
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z81i532unkk3vim1knju9ari6qjldcmfr65l2lko_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti64or2cph2bs)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo6hsdui74ah5c72hk8mqn3mg2p5dml1mu86v9mo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti64or2cph2bs)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3s51srbrj7q5gg1ovpiacgjfelunl9nqhegtgh8_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti64or2cph2bs)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9hvpckas7sjrjbf2rf9ql0iddihqnsuv6vfrl1o_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti64or2cph2bs)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Trump Train News
---

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
Friend — I know we’ve been reaching out a lot, so I’ll keep this quick. Is there anything I can say to convince you to split a donation between Seth Moulton and my Senate campaign? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
What if I said your contributions support our organizing efforts all across California’s 58 counties?
Or that your contributions help us respond to baseless attacks from Republicans?
What if you knew that your contributions fund our campaign to protect our democracy, help us address the challenges of the climate crisis, bolster our economy, and make affordable housing a reality?
All of this is true. And your support means a lot to me — it shows the strong support and faith you have in me to win this Senate race.
So please, if you’re convinced, will you split a contribution of $25 or more to support Seth Moulton and my campaign before tonight’s fundraising deadline? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]
— Adam
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

name: *Alert* Message from [Donald J. Trump]
subject: Message will be gone in 20 minutes

name: Kadida Kenner
subject: Our vote is powerful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project__
body:
States around the nation are still working to strip away voting rights from Black voters.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75893396/446049275/-1739567893?refcode=EM_F_231227powerful_N_KK_90DO_9_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4ZTk4MjQ1LWQ3YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G_duM9aIsrVRn-ZTAVkh4Aqd5riUgBcFqwliU_OT998=)
| Fellow activist,

We made a lot of progress in Pennsylvania this year, and we should celebrate all the successes and advancements that expand our access to the ballot, and our voting rights. However, as we work to build a NEW Pennsylvania – _and nation_ – that is for all of us, we must stay diligent to ensure that our representatives are reflective of the people and our sacred voting rights are protected.

States around the nation are still working to specifically, and with surgical precision, strip away voting rights from Black voters. Here’s a look at what’s happening:

❌ In Georgia, elected officials have to redraw their legislative maps after a judge determined they diluted the Black vote.

❌ In North Carolina, according to _AP News_ , the newly adopted maps for the state Senate “divide a cluster of predominantly Black counties in the northeast corner of the state in a way that unfairly dilutes the voting power of Black residents.”

❌ In Texas, according to the _Washington Post_ , “the Supreme Court let stand a local map in Texas that a lower court determined watered down the strength of Black and Latino voters.”

**In fact:** According to the _Washington Post_ , Congressional maps are being challenged in **__at least nine states__** , “with the results expected to help determine who wields power on Capitol Hill beginning in 2025.”

Our work is far from finished. Black voters remain woefully underrepresented after centuries of oppression, targeted policies, and neglect. We are working to change that, and the first step is to protect Black voters’ freedom to vote and have those votes counted.

**Black voters are powerful. That is why Republicans are working overtime to silence their voices and strip away their access to the ballot box. Fellow activist, we are not going to stand for it.**

[**We have set an ambitious fundraising goal of $10,000 by year-end to start off the year right. Will you donate $25 right now to help us engage and mobilize Black voters in PA ahead of the critical 2024 elections?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75893397/446049285/-1739567893?refcode=EM_F_231227powerful_N_KK_90DO_9_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4ZTk4MjQ1LWQ3YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G_duM9aIsrVRn-ZTAVkh4Aqd5riUgBcFqwliU_OT998=) clean_body: States around the nation are still working to strip away voting rights from Black voters. = | Fellow activist, We made a lot of progress in Pennsylvania this year, and we should celebrate all the successes and advancements that expand our access to the ballot, and our voting rights. However, as we work to build a NEW Pennsylvania – and nation – that is for all of us, we must stay diligent to ensure that our representatives are reflective of the people and our sacred voting rights are protected. States around the nation are still working to specifically, and with surgical precision, strip away voting rights from Black voters. Here’s a look at what’s happening: ❌ In Georgia, elected officials have to redraw their legislative maps after a judge determined they diluted the Black vote. ❌ In North Carolina, according to AP News , the newly adopted maps for the state Senate “divide a cluster of predominantly Black counties in the northeast corner of the state in a way that unfairly dilutes the voting power of Black residents.” ❌ In Texas, according to the Washington Post , “the Supreme Court let stand a local map in Texas that a lower court determined watered down the strength of Black and Latino voters.” In fact: According to the Washington Post , Congressional maps are being challenged in at least nine states , “with the results expected to help determine who wields power on Capitol Hill beginning in 2025.” Our work is far from finished. Black voters remain woefully underrepresented after centuries of oppression, targeted policies, and neglect. We are working to change that, and the first step is to protect Black voters’ freedom to vote and have those votes counted. Black voters are powerful. That is why Republicans are working overtime to silence their voices and strip away their access to the ballot box. Fellow activist, we are not going to stand for it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project __ __

name: Corey DeAngelis
subject: Benefits of the Sunshine State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
Florida puts parents in the driver’s seat and allows them to make the decision that’s BEST for their children.

| | | **
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl5ihkkrn63014teqs7a12r1q8c0ivc36v7rotrg_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti6cor0cth238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt0c3hmccj36lhmb89gccp3b8b0sdjmb87363i6b8r3c4p34or46cr64o72cug7acbkm5qbfctlkhg60pj048iv0)
---
| | **41,048.**

That’s how many students attended Florida’s Catholic schools last year using school choice scholarships, Friend – **and that’s 3X as many as a decade ago.**

You know why there’s such a sharp uptick of Catholic education in the Sunshine State?[ **It’s because of school choice opportunities.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm8fl9ua8ob010mah925ph4n9m89gotfpslj8meo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti6cor0cth238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt0c3hmccj36lhmb89gccp3b8b0sdjmb87363i6b8r3c4p34or46cr64o72cug7acbkm5qbfctlkhg60pj048iv0)

Florida puts parents in the driver’s seat and allows them to make the decision that’s BEST for their children.
---
| | **[Benefits of Florida’s School Choice Program:](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqmsa65nf4tlm6mgasgsi0qo38fismk6njd08hi0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ei37d9h6uon79hnmmrq0o73cop66db3cmgj0opi6mgm1or7cmge6c74cmhm6o9i69hm8cpmc9ge4pt0ekon9cbkmuprb930c1j608h1k8gn48n24hjm0pj7chj66o37c8iv0)** ☀️ Parents are in control of their children’s education.☀️ Scholarship programs provide families with direct funding.☀️ Parents choose where they spend their scholarship dollars.
---
| | Friend, over the last decade and especially in the early days of the pandemic, states without school choice – like New York and New Jersey – saw a dramatic loss in enrollment in Catholic schools. **_Parents could no longer afford to send their children to Catholic schools, resulting in a 30% drop in attendance, and some Catholic institutions closed their doors for good. _** Catholic schools in Florida, on the other hand, didn’t just survive. They THRIVED – all because parents were empowered. **_Friend, the school choice movement is now more important than ever as Catholic education comes under fire. _** **[Will you sign the American Federation for Children’s petition in support of Catholic education and school choice?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf7mn2hbedcthtn1585oko14mksnq8gl03kl7c48_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t6ekr3asjl6ei37d9h6uon79hnmmrq0o73cop66db3cmgj0opi6mgm1or7cmge6c74cmhm6o9i69hm8cpmc9ge4pt0ekon9cbkmuprb930c1j608h1k8gn48n24hjm0pj7chj66o37c8iv0)**
---
[**YES, I SUPPORT SCHOOL CHOICE**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkrogq10v6k6eepp3emgb88f07j19i2u6t7lebpo_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti6cor0cth238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt0c3hmccj36lhmb89gccp3b8b0sdjmb87363i6b8r3c4p34or46cr64o72cug7acbkm5qbfctlkhg60pj048iv0)
---
Thank you,
Corey DeAngelis
Senior Fellow, American Federation for Children

_P.S. You can sign the petition at this secure URL:_**[www.federationforchildren.org/catholic-schools/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv1novhdrjl8vrvvgfoe3e6k5sahponp7355mv2g_rp22sh2s8i6eo36cti6cor0cth238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuj7adhle9qj791jmkojfcbjkorrbdt0c3hmccj36lhmb89gccp3b8b0sdjmb87363i6b8r3c4p34or46cr64o72cug7acbkm5qbfctlkhg60pj048iv0 "www.federationforchildren.org/catholic-schools/")**

subject: Clarence Thomas is CORRUPT!!
body:
Clarence Thomas has dominated news about the Supreme Court this year, and not for good reasons.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75893932/446050574/444630146?refcode=12-27-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzMDIyNTYyLWQ4YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aOLbK2SoeSnEbpLOgxMB4THdA0KQERDt4bNtX_vcb0I=)
---
| | Friend, Clarence Thomas has dominated news about the Supreme Court this year, and not for good reasons. He has failed to disclose luxury trips and transactions with billionaires, fundraised for the Koch Dark Money network, and refused to recuse himself from cases related to January 6th. Last week, _ProPublica_ reported that in 2000, Clarence Thomas complained to a Republican Congressman that his salary was too low and that he may resign from the Court if Justices’ salaries weren’t raised. He started receiving luxury trips and gifts from billionaires and conservative megadonors after this conversation. **[**This is just another example of the long history of corruption that Clarence Thomas brings to the Supreme Court. It is unethical and casts the entire Court in a bad light. If you agree that Thomas should be held accountable for his actions, chip in $10 now so we can keep working to pass comprehensive Supreme Court Ethics Reform.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75893933/446050575/444630146?refcode=12-27-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzMDIyNTYyLWQ4YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aOLbK2SoeSnEbpLOgxMB4THdA0KQERDt4bNtX_vcb0I=)** Listen, corruption is a problem at all levels of our government, but Clarence Thomas’s blatant disregard of ethics laws is beyond the palet. When Clarence Thomas is jetsetting with conservative mega-donors and refusing to recuse himself from cases involving his own wife (that are about an attempted insurrection nonetheless!), we know that the current Code of Ethics is nothing but a sham. **[Clarence Thomas has gotten away with this unethical behavior for far too long, and it’s time for him to face some consequences. Please contribute $10 today so we can keep pushing for Supreme Court ethics reform to hold Clarence Thomas and the other billionaire-bought Justices accountable.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75893934/446050576/444630146?refcode=12-27-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzMDIyNTYyLWQ4YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aOLbK2SoeSnEbpLOgxMB4THdA0KQERDt4bNtX_vcb0I=)** We have spent far too much time in 2023 thinking about the Supreme Court’s inappropriate relationships with Republican mega-donors and corrupt billionaires. **[If you’re ready to hold the Supreme Court accountable for their unethical behavior, please chip in $10 today so we can support ethics reform in 2024.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75893935/446050577/444630146?refcode=12-27-23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzMDIyNTYyLWQ4YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aOLbK2SoeSnEbpLOgxMB4THdA0KQERDt4bNtX_vcb0I=)** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75894047/446050950/-312956818?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGZjMDBhOC1kOGE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pXWLlPlmT8f9hs0LjIedZ0ZMEn3PHwVkOKmc6fY2bhU=&emci=705b01c4-649f-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=a4fc00a8-d8a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=6787172) Hey team, At the last GOP debate, professional bully Nikki Haley said that Ron DeSantis “didn’t go far enough” with his "Don’t Say Gay" bill. And you know what we have to say about that? Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. **Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay.** **Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Gay. Last year alone, 93% of LGBTQ+ youth voted to defeat Republicans in elections nationwide. You can bet we’re going to do everything we can to help them fight against being silenced and erased. We refuse to allow far-right extremists to keep attacking the LGBTQ+ community without doing something about it. **[So we’re calling on you to let them know that the youth vote doesn’t get cast for hate. We need Congress to act NOW to protect one of our most vulnerable community’s rights. body:
| Wisconsin is home to some of the most competitive races in the nation.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1775%2E35263%2Eg_HF4n)
**Peter — _Axios_ recently reported that Senate control is “tilting red” and a Republican Senate majority is looking “increasingly likely.”** **[We’ll explain more in just a moment, but first, please rush a donation to reelect Tammy and help defend the Senate:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231227_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1775%2E35263%2Eg_HF4n)** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20231227_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1775%2E35263%2Eg_HF4n)

After Senator Joe Manchin announced he’s not seeking reelection in West Virginia, Republicans only need to flip ONE more Democratic seat to take back the Senate.

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: I need your help – please don’t abandon me now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
My concern is growing. Please take a moment to step up right now. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=8e379a7e93334b3a912307a986e7a147&_t=g3b2gxcUYNicpiDO71W4Px5HZ8xDlUi2CSHlhGd0dBsO3zwMuWnAOdXW4mmqWCR8SRh5iXadocRmw9Ck-4Ny0IPNQSitFcIjyxCH2FMiCYs%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=8e379a7e93334b3a912307a986e7a147&_t=g3b2gxcUYNicpiDO71W4Px5HZ8xDlUi2CSHlhGd0dBsO3zwMuWnAOdXW4mmqWCR8SRh5iXadocRmw9Ck-4Ny0IPNQSitFcIjyxCH2FMiCYs%3D)

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e379a7e93334b3a912307a986e7a147&_e=RRa9A35ZdOV8j_Zn5qk8Czh9-azIY9I73eOd23wwKtDJmtItwY7cNs1tT1Ewpoi63CwoowOwitUrQDZOAM4cBKKyI6ftSlq70cNHr22g82XFVes3ba_Hk-9jI40NiD2y7oA7x47Gg5I6PHc59Dm_tkfLXGd5sRKYj9iVN_JfTJ-N3AdPqgWEEukeJBd3qDlyVNqOC_j8dcQP2r6RkB1vTxCSl89Wh2jwwyPl77Pw7ZuFRVA1T5jtIjydhRgpXignY-bq898f-QMMHEKG70lQb7Bid-VmrFK5S2elvHgN3LaGE7vb96E4URpm2MHvOeeDYtrmnPp4WRgACSceuA40ZU1mWrIw89vXe0l98lwbE-9WqPNL0Ww9QK2Qzij9hECtc22ZZkwTjF5BGDw91yadZw%3D%3D)

Peter,

**I’ll keep this brief:** if we don’t get our online fundraising on track today, we won’t hit our goal before Sunday’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.

We all knew November would be slow, with everyone enjoying their time with family for Thanksgiving, _**but it’s looking like December is on track to be even slower**_ , if you can believe that.

I’ve been told by folks who’ve run for office before that the Fourth Quarter is tough, but until you’re in the thick of it, it’s hard to know just how difficult it can be to reach supporters around the holidays.

I’m never one to back down from a challenge, so now I’m using what time we have left to **[plead for your help](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e379a7e93334b3a912307a986e7a147&_e=RRa9A35ZdOV8j_Zn5qk8Czh9-azIY9I73eOd23wwKtDJmtItwY7cNs1tT1Ewpoi63CwoowOwitUrQDZOAM4cBKKyI6ftSlq70cNHr22g82XFVes3ba_Hk-9jI40NiD2y7oA7x47Gg5I6PHc59Dm_tkfLXGd5sRKYj9iVN_JfTJ-N3AdPqgWEEukeJBd3qDlyVNqOC_j8dcQP2r6RkB1vTxCSl89Wh2jwwyPl77Pw7ZuFRVA1T5jtIjydhRgpXign4gTxUksF8Y9LP5O6TahtRf8Bf_0iiBRNi2W6xCvLXNtQ56gbx7vhiQVKa_WJ8kfxF4kQHyV0sPC-GT2AfmWov75CAI-yyM1q3hIwls3NOZzpK0xj42yFw8yIySJYmtaucRCEbX8XWAHGClNf90fprg%3D%3D)** ahead of the upcoming end-of-year fundraising deadline on December 31st.

I spoke with my finance director, and here is where things stand today:

_**We need to raise an additional $39,600 by Sunday.** I know we can do it._ But we need conservatives like you to step up and make gifts of **[$5, $50, or even $500](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e379a7e93334b3a912307a986e7a147&_e=RRa9A35ZdOV8j_Zn5qk8Czh9-azIY9I73eOd23wwKtDJmtItwY7cNs1tT1Ewpoi63CwoowOwitUrQDZOAM4cBKKyI6ftSlq70cNHr22g82XFVes3ba_Hk-9jI40NiD2y7oA7x47Gg5I6PHc59Dm_tkfLXGd5sRKYj9iVN_JfTJ-N3AdPqgWEEukeJBd3qDlyVNqOC_j8dcQP2r6RkB1vTxCSl89Wh2jwwyPl77Pw7ZuFRVA1T5jtIjydhRgpXignJRL5Tp8tCGVBYJ7wpnuCTdiSyzPCdhDLcGNdu6OVL2QDIjsyUAXytl7H6pENjtKFRB7DOpC_MKe6NqNpwhO3nWO5IKJ7fqV8HwO6A_xBHDAnPvBaht7OA3uEMt7KJtlVPEMpAPNCfOo8DloZ95o57g%3D%3D)** right now and every day for the next four days.

[**DONATE GENEROUSLY ->** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e379a7e93334b3a912307a986e7a147&_e=RRa9A35ZdOV8j_Zn5qk8Czh9-azIY9I73eOd23wwKtDJmtItwY7cNs1tT1Ewpoi63CwoowOwitUrQDZOAM4cBKKyI6ftSlq70cNHr22g82XFVes3ba_Hk-9jI40NiD2y7oA7x47Gg5I6PHc59Dm_tkfLXGd5sRKYj9iVN_JfTJ-N3AdPqgWEEukeJBd3qDlyVNqOC_j8dcQP2r6RkB1vTxCSl89Wh2jwwyPl77Pw7ZuFRVA1T5jtIjydhRgpXignf19jOvg4rhNZbyj_ytGls1PUj6t1B-HEo_6NrmrE9IiwemfKgw3zwooUz1451O5b17EE0mHl6wnciACOVUBRDyra3VhvX6JTk9YCUzw_DF7UUh5uMcO4aKsXdgIhn3BZhorLlJC4ewbyptrWNRGMUw%3D%3D)

I’m asking for your help today because America’s future is on the line.

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e379a7e93334b3a912307a986e7a147&_e=RRa9A35ZdOV8j_Zn5qk8Czh9-azIY9I73eOd23wwKtDJmtItwY7cNs1tT1Ewpoi63CwoowOwitUrQDZOAM4cBKKyI6ftSlq70cNHr22g82XFVes3ba_Hk-9jI40NiD2y7oA7x47Gg5I6PHc59Dm_tkfLXGd5sRKYj9iVN_JfTJ-N3AdPqgWEEukeJBd3qDlyVNqOC_j8dcQP2r6RkB1vTxCSl89Wh2jwwyPl77Pw7ZuFRVA1T5jtIjydhRgpXignr2louh7tXAdj8EbgwOFnyut2ntuZjW9XPwOhl_VNzi5r7mDTnofJvxTZPtoTZARvq-YgNppzfGx4fGAwYg2P5mF8K4PIBNX2K3Y1BTnIfUhPRR1QjzaollzluOEnqBMqVe7SNrdl2BqteUUS-gn_PQ%3D%3D)

* * *
---

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e379a7e93334b3a912307a986e7a147&_e=RRa9A35ZdOV8j_Zn5qk8CzV0Sc1bEspJkRXhpjfSD-0HqMsAY-xoAmEBtYszkwG1NlYgKHXl2CpNXx3KgxvFjSprml-jhZx3L4C4mlVRSq8Y0632C4XUTBEb5cmkaO2jMD9W8NUDac73Gkfdp-dqBwaZ_1YVKOzlW6YNVY23zga5W-G5fdCE5Y0CM6gtLinpW7bWuN_N9D-nbiyOQfh-_w%3D%3D) [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e379a7e93334b3a912307a986e7a147&_e=RRa9A35ZdOV8j_Zn5qk8CzgSZBuFiiH3Etdz1KsIO6L0vPtOAsOx39RQFLRWmiJigd4012e4L0kZ-41RTAifjNggJS3BADfuwRCG6XEN0wEEIGND7J4hXncMo9nCcykw4UMIkh1QVRfAAG9GaFPRsaU9E5SIc4jQm8Ru05ANMejk0Invw8gAOfVNII14nbLthvhQLwb8GIUzpioptvmxMg%3D%3D) [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8e379a7e93334b3a912307a986e7a147&_e=RRa9A35ZdOV8j_Zn5qk8C0WjtgpTE5-094V9oLN-6-Vz058qevoEzG-mBXT6kYrglBlXBkQWNV-zI1qa0y0iNXNF_cXuZaRj_u4Z6j2LfyRHyUW556OUNG8jm6SlIO9wpiQzrqw5wajsX6vuJg_shWBT2QzA9isqyfcSBCV6j__cX6U4bRLor0OwWc3Tw17DH4ZJ82Rot0MroLjzUTuiQadJ3qQxlPMPOVi8BHID3Pk%3D)

| PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Help me train the next generation of leaders…
body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37387%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YyzLHsS33pnx2mvtYFurXg&sysid=1)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you’d like to give online, here’s a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37388%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9qBtNJHDOAPKU5LTZyqtWw&sysid=1)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity’s show that I’ve partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I’m the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left’s cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America’s freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that’s when you know you’re saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America’s founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37389%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f7fK%2bb4fhU0INVxId3Jpdg&sysid=1)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women’s identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37380%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fl9Wh3lk6KRaMVzmjwOGWQ&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Your America News

Peter, for almost three years, President Biden has worked tirelessly to put our nation back on the path to progress.

And those efforts have not been in vain. Thanks to the Biden administration's unyielding efforts, he has:
* **Signed the Respect for Marriage Act** , which created new federal protections for same-sex and interracial marriages.

* **Signed a once-in-a-generation bipartisan gun safety bill into law.**

* **Signed the Inflation Reduction Act** , which put money toward expanding Social Security, lowering prescription drug costs, fighting climate change, and creating more good-paying jobs.

* **Passed a series of executive orders aimed at protecting everyday working Americans –** providing student loan relief, lowering health care costs, and defending reproductive rights.

Peter, President Biden has moved the needle for progress forward – and far-right extremists _despise_ him because of that. ** That's why they have officially launched an impeachment inquiry into the president without _any_ evidence that he has committed wrongdoing. **
**We cannot let them get away with this – not with the general election less than a year away. That's why Attorney General James is standing by the president, but we need to know if _you're_ standing with us too. So before MIDNIGHT tonight, tell us:**
| | **Do you approve of President Biden?**

name: Courier Newsroom HQ
subject: We provide the coverage others won’t
body:
The mainstream media is already showing signs that they're ready to repeat the same mistakes they made in 2016.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75895356/446054327/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFjNTcyN2YtZDlhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WHBscXK4_etYdXaN_WmvnGH-OOhFBVibGn72Q4kNyXw=&emci=7196bc83-caa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=e1c5727f-d9a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Last week, when Donald Trump seemed to channel xenophobic, white supremacist rhetoric mirroring Adolf Hitler — fear mongering about immigrants “poisoning” the blood of America — many in the mainstream media rightfully condemned him.
**Yet what you might not know is that this wasn't a one-off.** Trump made the hateful rhetoric a part of his next campaign stump speech in Iowa, but very few in the media covered it when he said it again.
**However, Courier's own newsroom, _Iowa Starting Line_ did:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75895361/446054333/1803987988?refcode=em20231227&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFjNTcyN2YtZDlhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WHBscXK4_etYdXaN_WmvnGH-OOhFBVibGn72Q4kNyXw=)
[**Will you donate $5 to help our newsrooms keep covering the stories that matter in states all over the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75895363/446054335/1803987988?refcode=em20231227&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFjNTcyN2YtZDlhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WHBscXK4_etYdXaN_WmvnGH-OOhFBVibGn72Q4kNyXw=)
With local newsrooms dying and Trump taking his hateful rhetoric to every part of our country, it's more important than ever that we keep building a local news alternative to hold Trump accountable.
At Courier, our journalists are on a mission to provide high-quality, fact-based journalism to our readers — and in the process, we’ll stop Trump’s fear mongering and lies from spreading into our communities.
**But we can’t do it without you, Peter. All of our stories are free to read online, which means we count on donors like you to keep up our work.**
**[**So if you can, please pitch in $5 today to help us keep providing the coverage that others won't ahead of the 2024 election.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75895365/446054337/1803987988?refcode=em20231227&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFjNTcyN2YtZDlhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WHBscXK4_etYdXaN_WmvnGH-OOhFBVibGn72Q4kNyXw=)**
****[Donate $5 ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75895366/446054339/1803987988?refcode=em20231227&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTFjNTcyN2YtZDlhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WHBscXK4_etYdXaN_WmvnGH-OOhFBVibGn72Q4kNyXw=)****
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: What matters most to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
As we head into 2024, I want to hear from you about what matters most because that’s how we build a movement that brings everyone together.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75896006/446056255/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWU0ZjllYi1kOWE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rCHUPUjaKmIP6GXx2NxhKo86BvMit2zXlUYbDLXM3r8=&emci=f22a1512-6d9f-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=2ee4f9eb-d9a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=7731215)
---

Our Founding Fathers warned that America would be _“A Republic,_**_IF_** _you can keep it...”_
---
So, will __WE__ “keep it?”
---
As we now prepare to close out 2023 – _one of the darkest years in American history where a tyrant attempted to _**_JAIL_** _his leading opponent for life as an innocent man and_** _NULLIFY_** _your vote_ __before__ _voting even begins_ – this question rings louder than ever.
---
Truthfully, it’s the ONLY question that matters.
---
This is the moment that will either go down in the history books as the moment we lost our Republic and the _FREEST_ country in the world forever...
---
**_...Or it will be written as the moment WE THE PEOPLE triumphed over the dark forces of tyranny!_**
---
**If you’re like me, Patriot, and you will** _**NEVER**_**,**_**_EVER_**_****_**SURRENDER**_**our country to the Radical Democrats who seek to destroy her, then I ask that you stand with me when it matters most as we close our books on 2023 and set our sights on the most consequential election year in American history.**

clean_body: It’s the only question that matters... | | | | | Patriot, Our Founding Fathers warned that America would be “A Republic,IF you can keep it...” So, will WE “keep it?” As we now prepare to close out 2023 – one of the darkest years in American history where a tyrant attempted to JAIL his leading opponent for life as an innocent man and NULLIFY your vote before voting even begins – this question rings louder than ever. Truthfully, it’s the ONLY question that matters. This is the moment that will either go down in the history books as the moment we lost our Republic and the FREEST country in the world forever... ...Or it will be written as the moment WE THE PEOPLE triumphed over the dark forces of tyranny! If you’re like me, Patriot, and you will NEVER,EVER**SURRENDERour country to the Radical Democrats who seek to destroy her, then I ask that you stand with me when it matters most as we close our books on 2023 and set our sights on the most consequential election year in American history. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. name: America First War Room
subject: The #1 Mistake That Makes Bad Knees Worse
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kL9OwzAQh5_msjWy72JfM3goVGEAMTAgdUwdhxjZTWqnjfr2qKGg2-7Pd59-bZyC728G-AkQB99lQATaAeL5sMR0-Y6vL5ur_tyc9XtU9yE-A-J8m9z_5gNSutj6cO_yvugM9Z2oCmckC9K1rgmLwchtryppBfX1vcRWKaVqlEqz6jXrwhsUSBKRJQsmLnt5VKhsR65jV2kHlVj_lG10ydtW5nlpUxrHWNoxFsEM8zzlVawBbJY0lqeLDe6Sf8_sGAGbhzJgcwVsaJvnw2BP1RGoWUOg_S18DG-8oyKZblp8CD5rhkp8_VF-AgAA__8oo17i)
| | How do some folks stay active well into their 70's, 80's, and even 90's... enjoying all kinds of activities like hiking, gardening, and golfing...

...while others find themselves hobbling down stairs... or needing to rock back and forth just to get out of a chair?

Well, according to a new breakthrough discovery by Harvard University, scientists now know it comes down to a single mistake...

A mistake, that... when avoided, not only reverses joint discomfort and everyday aches... but can actually make joints healthier than they've been in years.

And here's the best part: avoiding this mistake is easy. There's just one problem...

Doing this defies common sense. In fact, it's so counterintuitive, a recent survey found that up to 77% of folks with sore joints are making this mistake every day because they think it's helping. When, in fact, it does just the opposite.

That's why when they stop making this mistake, their recovery can be quite dramatic.

To date, more than 180,547 people have tried this with life-changing results...

Ordinary folks who were once couch-bound are now walking a few miles per day again...

Others have resumed exercise classes they were once forced to give up.

And some have even started long-distance jogging after decades of sitting on the sidelines...

A Boston medical doctor recently recorded a short presentation which shows you this [#1 mistake and why you should avoid it at all costs](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx8jzGP1DAQhX-N0yWyx469KVIAq6VAokSiiiaeCWvOPudsw-r49SjRCVFd--bNe9_DtMewvc7CfRQA90BVAAj9QQC8fH-k8utn-vK5_22_9S_2axqPI3wSAO1153_Ot5CBE4Z4qO7a0aw3kqbjWTmp7WQnDd19NmaSvI5SXnAznsDI1SBfHDI4J1fqwgwStAJwykmn3bCpdYTRk2ZybCwLI8-eAROX4FHV9sBSck6Dz6mL8721vZ5gNwG3VtA_DVjaveQ__MyHScCN1MQTXEyvp4l6s2nXX2Bz_ag2Zk2SEEno2x7Rc-LnJvS1NixrxkJLzTEvb6XLgQpagEUKJPRVpVAbPvFSoxJg2ylSKOzburybsfz_2pWZ9keIMVTrhJE_zs0-p78BAAD__0g5iJY). His video quickly went viral, racking up more than seven million views. And thousands of folks around the country are singing the praises of this method across social media.

Karen Potter from Tremont, Pennsylvania said, _"I can hardly believe it. I have been able to start back walking daily and I have not been able to do that in months and months."_

Kay Gilbert from Athens, Alabama wrote, _"I'm 73 and feel like running all over the place again. My kids say I outwalk them in Walmart."_

And Robert Henninge from Castle Rock, Colorado exclaimed, _"Back to walking the dog and hiking... 81 years old."_

Now, what about you? Could your joints use some relief? How would you like to take back control of your life?

If so, [click here to learn more about this mistake and put an end to those everyday aches stopping you from living your best life](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx8jzGP1DAQhX-N0yWyx469KVIAq6VAokSiiiaeCWvOPudsw-r49SjRCVFd--bNe9_DtMewvc7CfRQA90BVAAj9QQC8fH-k8utn-vK5_22_9S_2axqPI3wSAO1153_Ot5CBE4Z4qO7a0aw3kqbjWTmp7WQnDd19NmaSvI5SXnAznsDI1SBfHDI4J1fqwgwStAJwykmn3bCpdYTRk2ZybCwLI8-eAROX4FHV9sBSck6Dz6mL8721vZ5gNwG3VtA_DVjaveQ__MyHScCN1MQTXEyvp4l6s2nXX2Bz_ag2Zk2SEEno2x7Rc-LnJvS1NixrxkJLzTEvb6XLgQpagEUKJPRVpVAbPvFSoxJg2ylSKOzburybsfz_2pWZ9keIMVTrhJE_zs0-p78BAAD__0g5iJY).

[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJx8jzGP1DAQhX-N0yWyx469KVIAq6VAokSiiiaeCWvOPudsw-r49SjRCVFd--bNe9_DtMewvc7CfRQA90BVAAj9QQC8fH-k8utn-vK5_22_9S_2axqPI3wSAO1153_Ot5CBE4Z4qO7a0aw3kqbjWTmp7WQnDd19NmaSvI5SXnAznsDI1SBfHDI4J1fqwgwStAJwykmn3bCpdYTRk2ZybCwLI8-eAROX4FHV9sBSck6Dz6mL8721vZ5gNwG3VtA_DVjaveQ__MyHScCN1MQTXEyvp4l6s2nXX2Bz_ag2Zk2SEEno2x7Rc-LnJvS1NixrxkJLzTEvb6XLgQpagEUKJPRVpVAbPvFSoxJg2ylSKOzburybsfz_2pWZ9keIMVTrhJE_zs0-p78BAAD__0g5iJY)

_We lost._

Republicans failed to show up at the polls last month and that cost us in 3 crucial states: **_Ohio, Kentucky, and Virginia._** If these trends continue, the 2024 election will be rough for conservatives, and I don't need to tell you the consequences of that.

We're not trying to scare you, but this is serious. How we perform in the next 12 months will determine how our country will look for decades to come. It's not an election that we can just let pass us by. This election will change EVERYTHING for a generation.

clean_body: = Hi friend, With the new year around the corner, we’re trying to accomplish our final goal for 2023: our end-of-year fundraising goal of $10,000. With only a few days left, we need your help to close the gap. We’ve created a personal link just for you to chip in $5 or whatever you can: = From making Maryland a safe haven for abortions to building up programs to protect our environment to bringing more jobs to Maryland — the Moore administration accomplished so much in this past year. And it’s all thanks to your help. But our work is far from done, with plenty more to accomplish in 2024. We can’t do it without your support. = = With gratitude, Team Wes

name: Powered By People
subject: Postage costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
We’re about to mail out pre-stamped voter registration forms to make it as easy as possible for new voters to participate in the 2024 elections. But the number of forms we’re able to send will depend entirely on the amount of funds we raise in the weeks ahead.
The stamp alone on each form costs 70 cents — and with over 3 million unregistered Democrats in Texas, these costs are going to add up quickly. **That’s why we’re reaching out today to ask if you can help us pay for postage!**
**Will you support our voter registration program by making a donation today?** **⇢[Pitch in $7 to help register 10 Democratic voters.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60626?c0=pbp-em-20231227.MLyApb&refcode=ema20231227-236987&t=1&akid=236987%2E444211%2EALBsWt)** **⇢[Pitch in $14 to help register 20 Democratic voters.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60627?c0=pbp-em-20231227.Pd58VZ&refcode=ema20231227-236987&t=2&akid=236987%2E444211%2EALBsWt)** **⇢[Pitch in $21 to help register 30 Democratic voters.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60628?c0=pbp-em-20231227.l5EIJU&refcode=ema20231227-236987&t=3&akid=236987%2E444211%2EALBsWt)** **⇢[Pitch in $49 to help register 70 Democratic voters.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60629?c0=pbp-em-20231227.B8_Arb&refcode=ema20231227-236987&t=4&akid=236987%2E444211%2EALBsWt)**
---
As you know, Texas Republicans have banned online and automatic voter registration in an effort to maintain their grip on power and prevent new voters from participating in our elections.
That’s why we’re sending voter registration forms directly to people’s doors. After we mail them out, our volunteers will reach out to each recipient to remind them to fill out their form and stick it in the mail.
That’s how we overcome GOP voter suppression, expand the electorate, and help Democratic candidates win up and down the ballot in 2024 and beyond. **[So thank you for pitching in what you can today to support this important work!](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231227.XshKaU&refcode=ema20231227-236987&t=5&akid=236987%2E444211%2EALBsWt)**
Grateful to be in this fight with you,
Gina Hinojosa
Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20231227-236987-footer&t=6&refcode2=236987_444211_ALBsWt&akid=236987%2E444211%2EALBsWt)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=236987%2E444211%2EALBsWt), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=236987%2E444211%2EALBsWt).

subject: Can you help us reach our end of year fundraising goal?
body:

In the past year, Sinema’s had THREE ethics and campaign finance complaints raised against her, including one alleging abuse of staff and our own PAC’s FEC complaint alleging illegal use of campaign funds on luxury travel and high-end restaurants. She **constantly ignores her constituents** to prioritize massages and her big industry and corporate donors who cut her six-figure checks. And she’s still yet to hold an in-person town hall in Arizona.

We’ve been talking about replacing Sinema for over two years—all the while**she’s continued to be one of the biggest obstructors of President Biden's popular agenda.** She's a major reason women across the country are still without access to critical healthcare because she refused to give up the filibuster to save abortion rights. She brags about saving the Senate filibuster after she blocked John Lewis's voting rights legislation.
Sinema’s indifference is not just infuriating. It’s dangerous.
**Kyrsten Sinema must be ousted from the Senate, and we're here to hold her accountable. Our work is only going to ramp up in 2024 — and between amplifying our message and supporting grassroots organizations on the ground in Arizona, we'll need as much support as we can get to be successful.**
**[That's why we've set a $10,000 end-of-year fundraising goal, so we can jump into 2024 with full force. Can you please chip in $3, or whatever you can, to help us get there?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wJB1PonLlUsOJ579cWB0CtcY5bmgnvZtC4B7BJOuHLRwEFuFcpEsOZpUq5MjSEDj30EWTUmZoNgpV5gMEIG0xwoD31vx-oDs1emapzAz7XIskroW4yCooexnM3Poi-oCzYgRqnlxRNF8gwaNPlZ6ITyPGj44mVq2lPsS-ZwF9zntgErAu2vR7yR4U60zPXN03twkbOtSZQCsNJVecj6JX9neukxGg80xWGou9CZ11wVppgh6MNb0D9kVVFc4Al4W2EexKEPEYibU-t6OGtpTSOLBqPYQAy4ns0Ye51TiThxqG3vZm7KvVMSsrSB04Mma6G5GZjlyv__q2Uj0heNYte439EuV_bI6z3MktC7ojQJA/42h/ZC_Tj81uSTe96wSheLt_Aw/h9/hIhXXM6xXHI074KFxfyOUthCADMy1OCdnUr-aUFwAxQ)**

name: WFP Digital Team
subject: Our records for this email address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
We value every member of this community — and we know financial support is far from the only way WFP members contribute to building a country that works for all of us. | | | Dear Peter, As the year draws to a close, we’re reaching out to you because **the records we have on file for this email address show that you haven’t yet made a contribution to the Working Families Party in 2023:** 2023 Donor Record for Peter Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com 2023 Donor? No — not yet! Suggested donation: $10 _(NOTE: If you donated recently, in the mail, or using a different email address, this record might not accurately reflect your contributions. Thank you for your support!)_ We value every member of this community — and we know that financial support is only one of the many ways WFP members contribute to building a country that works for all of us. But before the year is over, we wanted to extend one more opportunity to help build our collective power and hit our final online fundraising goal of the year. From city councils to state legislatures to Congress, your end-of-year contribution will help us block the authoritarian right, defend and elect hundreds of working families champions, build governing power for working people, and strengthen our collective voice on the national stage in 2024. **[A generous individual donor has offered to match all donations made by midnight on December 31, up to $30,000. No — not yet! Suggested donation: $10 (NOTE: If you donated recently, in the mail, or using a different email address, this record might not accurately reflect your contributions. Thank you for your support!) We value every member of this community — and we know that financial support is only one of the many ways WFP members contribute to building a country that works for all of us. But before the year is over, we wanted to extend one more opportunity to help build our collective power and hit our final online fundraising goal of the year. From city councils to state legislatures to Congress, your end-of-year contribution will help us block the authoritarian right, defend and elect hundreds of working families champions, build governing power for working people, and strengthen our collective voice on the national stage in 2024. Whether you are able to contribute right now or not, thank you for being a part of the WFP family, and hope you are having a joyful holiday season. In gratitude and solidarity, WFP Digital Team Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too.
