name: Brandon Herrera
subject: My aim has never been this bad....
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRANDON HERRERA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dear Patriot,
I have to share something with you that's frankly a little embarrassing: I'm badly missing my target.
And not the target you might expect, but my fundraising target for the end of the year. With just a few days left until 2023 ends, my team told me we are still $113,017.71 short of our goal.
But I decided to write this last-minute email to see if we could close the gap: Will you make an **_URGENT _**contribution today at [https://secure.anedot.com/brandon-herrera-for-congress/donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/h6IMaKhxuOQzgF6GnQhtCw/h6IMaKhxuOQzgF6GnQhtCw)?
I've even given a little extra encouragement: I'll be giving away one of my favorite rifles, an AKG Warfighter, to one lucky donor who makes a contribution before the deadline when the calendar flips over to 2024.
Why is this so important?

Because I'm just about two months away from the Texas Republican Primary where I'm challenging establishment RINO Tony Gonzales who has:
* Funded the war in Ukraine while our own country is being invaded.
* Encouraged states to seize your firearms with unconstitutional red flag laws.
* Partnered with Joe Biden to support new regulations to prevent US military veterans from purchasing firearms for self defense.
* Blocked common-sense Republican legislation that would end the migrant crisis.
* Coordinated with the Biden Administration to traffic unaccompanied minors throughout the US.

Need I go on? Can you believe this guy has the nerve to call himself a Republican?
He's got to go. Help me defeat him AND get a chance to win my beautiful AKG Warfighter rifle (that Tony doesn't think you have the right to own) by donating today at [https://secure.anedot.com/brandon-herrera-for-congress/donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/h6IMaKhxuOQzgF6GnQhtCw/h6IMaKhxuOQzgF6GnQhtCw).
Thank you!

Brandon Herrera

PS: My campaign is over $113,000 behind our fundraising goal for the year. Help us reach it and earn the chance to win my custom rifle, an AKG Warfighter, by donating to my campaign today at [https://secure.anedot.com/brandon-herrera-for-congress/donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/h6IMaKhxuOQzgF6GnQhtCw/h6IMaKhxuOQzgF6GnQhtCw).

PAID FOR BY BRANDON HERRERA FOR CONGRESS
---

[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/unsubscribe/M3dKmjvhR8CwRJ801N0zlTlDygVorb8PbaawXpI4LLQ/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/h6IMaKhxuOQzgF6GnQhtCw)

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the President?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a345db1f24bf4dbc93c1a9945629607b&_e=U22IACko3yyZ9b7MkwOB5BkcJWfaZgXANg-s75zgZJYDqy2dwPKcr4lG60HCKGhQEXUHHr1H7FBrbV0eTKZYDu5BvgaY202zFNiwhR9UdFs-Xls8RDfaTfYvjNjZqyRpRS6J69mbkc2FA1aTJEzABgvwQMncf6PIXBSEdY_uMZ51rtx9OEubGenIl5mGtituoPwutbXANkpdfGzTb1tU81-N1EEMYDU8FpN7SBNeE8ybdY68gVMuGS3_f3AV5OJGtWBLwpSbcmzRlE7-v77yfrW2tu23ESSSqN9Ut1ouV1slFGlawF9apqfqaCZpvjuLa9zXtuo3IvUND7AvH7-mTYqK7lZI66KDvuenD1dD_KsVvKvZYNoBdszu-fKWlx9NMotQkWWPb1VTawFjGlZZhpj06mWxooRzO7MIchgp690%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a345db1f24bf4dbc93c1a9945629607b&_e=U22IACko3yyZ9b7MkwOB5BkcJWfaZgXANg-s75zgZJYDqy2dwPKcr4lG60HCKGhQEXUHHr1H7FBrbV0eTKZYDu5BvgaY202zFNiwhR9UdFs-Xls8RDfaTfYvjNjZqyRpRS6J69mbkc2FA1aTJEzABgvwQMncf6PIXBSEdY_uMZ51rtx9OEubGenIl5mGtituoPwutbXANkpdfGzTb1tU81-N1EEMYDU8FpN7SBNeE8ybdY68gVMuGS3_f3AV5OJGXMg3FY2XLPWDPWrjgPuaCHlQlJxbY04r9iCMRwlv3vakWZtZodAgS9bYWEBca8-rAPJCOYyh7xtYB3bMHyOdKYzAp4a1LF3kNEHpoKOIldXUVsjIXQ2XPso7jmHt1xzoZU9wFjDBbbbLaZddGh2CM1UnkdmUCQW2eRGqjVzNeig%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a345db1f24bf4dbc93c1a9945629607b&_e=U22IACko3yyZ9b7MkwOB5BkcJWfaZgXANg-s75zgZJYDqy2dwPKcr4lG60HCKGhQEXUHHr1H7FBrbV0eTKZYDu5BvgaY202zFNiwhR9UdFs-Xls8RDfaTfYvjNjZqyRpRS6J69mbkc2FA1aTJEzABgvwQMncf6PIXBSEdY_uMZ51rtx9OEubGenIl5mGtituoPwutbXANkpdfGzTb1tU81-N1EEMYDU8FpN7SBNeE8ybdY68gVMuGS3_f3AV5OJG3eEYKXgHpHIN5Vtdc_dd9XSXQxJ6kESkosRmtYIPkFI7ZIJYT086iVyZKLeDkfIpC175jCLSPbyalJfJJUmqvcxNQHj1q5Np0Zsvu2qoiue3Dr-ZV1nxcxRR9jBQ5I36uauwXjwtNchdXeot420c6ZhHInzi29QJw2Z8GTKoxls%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a345db1f24bf4dbc93c1a9945629607b&_e=U22IACko3yyZ9b7MkwOB5BkcJWfaZgXANg-s75zgZJYDqy2dwPKcr4lG60HCKGhQEXUHHr1H7FBrbV0eTKZYDu5BvgaY202zFNiwhR9UdFs-Xls8RDfaTfYvjNjZqyRpRS6J69mbkc2FA1aTJEzABgvwQMncf6PIXBSEdY_uMZ51rtx9OEubGenIl5mGtituoPwutbXANkpdfGzTb1tU81-N1EEMYDU8FpN7SBNeE8ybdY68gVMuGS3_f3AV5OJGbSUllXoYK8v3MpKaf1YWwp0hLp1Ay15SpsQni--W-rismnEuxStq-uMov4VhmSH1tG-bVi-tC7w2_vttugBzcz47T0oMAhKmO9rWHLSfHr4oXvAtx3Vr5zNFZHdU05YkdO1HxszciTvbllITFh9hDNloSw662wZufM_fAbJ1vkw%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a345db1f24bf4dbc93c1a9945629607b&_e=U22IACko3yyZ9b7MkwOB5BkcJWfaZgXANg-s75zgZJYDqy2dwPKcr4lG60HCKGhQEXUHHr1H7FBrbV0eTKZYDu5BvgaY202zFNiwhR9UdFs-Xls8RDfaTfYvjNjZqyRpRS6J69mbkc2FA1aTJEzABgvwQMncf6PIXBSEdY_uMZ51rtx9OEubGenIl5mGtituoPwutbXANkpdfGzTb1tU81-N1EEMYDU8FpN7SBNeE8ybdY68gVMuGS3_f3AV5OJG00mKzsLanMEWXEoQIdt_BpPQCYaL0X-lf0skS3MtJaDeiswU3a-wMeQbX8GAkyEovwknAKjXc_dF9I03xbfEKKg-7ZAayXUmHJDija7kyKLxs7f3bw2z6o-CcZvcRiACw7bmvv_ZIGP1ZVCnI9BtlhhA5ydXf0eWcuU5UjGRrBI%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[**unsubscribe**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_s=a345db1f24bf4dbc93c1a9945629607b&_t=8XL9nW68GDfiZmNdKF8aBRvEBee5PymbAoU47VnUZuea9h--jB0xF21WXytAF_A8e_QLLFQVvEWGBXzSZ2IN9KZquL2jWxQKMW1YemzowG4%3D)

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. | | Peter,

Next year’s election may be the most important we’ve ever faced. The GOP is already ramping up efforts to hold onto their House Majority – which is why I’m reaching out today.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37397%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HxpljqeKB0vWSi%2fipLQUYA&sysid=1)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God’s Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37397%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HxpljqeKB0vWSi%2fipLQUYA&sysid=1)
---
| | We’re offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here’s an outline of what we’ll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we’ll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we’ll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we’ll gain wisdom from Solomon’s reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we’ll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37398%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GLDtEmY7QVDEUYhbA1khWQ&sysid=1).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I’m very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9644%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=DPam4FptMVOeZR%2b56yRI%2bQ&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37399%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=thAOzW4R7B25U2hLTn1XHg&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37390%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SfuyYfpDyXVyAM%2bP8BcKkg&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9644%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=DPam4FptMVOeZR%2b56yRI%2bQ&sysid=1)

body:
| | |

* * *
Across America, our freedom to read is under attack.

Right-wing extremists have taken LGBTQ+ books off many school library shelves, and they’re already coming after public libraries.
**Derek Marshall is an LGBTQ+ Democrat running for Congress to fight right-wing censorship and erasure. Will you stand with our campaign today?**
**[Sign the petition to Congress: Protect public libraries!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMQC6xUZTDbUcrXIDI9n1vy-ERCKfPyanp9S0u2-jap7PSFzNXf2HbEwhoiguliugyzpz4AG1cX4tAVImkfgJk9YaZadx3KYbuSK8TeJP-ib7-8tqCYXw5trHMTSlof_fgQZNbz3NImWCShDRKrSj6_tw7WBYm2paa5T3cI38J9nNq03aXC_YMHyQ8Cv-S-7Wt9jx2dF5EwKp5ZVtzGw4j15ES2es1poFFTiH-5l-r2l27QsigyF4EeUYPmysNMHDPeuiGMbK02QtmbZ3jMdYtOFqPY_44hqayTTS5J_vzvoD6BvvcFIgrZolM-YW41abU2lF0cEtc2M3ux44SIUmdVmpTuwpLbO3sOGAWugCMwHYDZ-wBxmoLNZlfFkTFnfEQbQD_9znku5fe_cxAb3ePmL4TLi5LHIytEGT1kVVPFy622uOIva5i2IbhyeLX7XSfsGhPm68zWOBWN9mp4hkQ75Qkk31XQjXOH7cuwz-P1xTdL0A9r3OQfKuxf7utNE_3Q/42h/LPXvg7QASASVPZSflodxTg/h1/sWv7lOpD87poSzSasLUZe39sqBx7kxso2tqpJZdiVtM)** [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMQC6xUZTDbUcrXIDI9n1vy-ERCKfPyanp9S0u2-jap7PSFzNXf2HbEwhoiguliugyzpz4AG1cX4tAVImkfgJk9YaZadx3KYbuSK8TeJP-ib7-8tqCYXw5trHMTSlof_fgQZNbz3NImWCShDRKrSj6_tw7WBYm2paa5T3cI38J9nNq03aXC_YMHyQ8Cv-S-7Wt9jx2dF5EwKp5ZVtzGw4j15ES2es1poFFTiH-5l-r2l27QsigyF4EeUYPmysNMHDPeuiGMbK02QtmbZ3jMdYtOFqPY_44hqayTTS5J_vzvoD08Gql_XnHhZ7p95kccKwiLyfgHMVeO2E67-0c1S6lC0n1S_XgnctYEV-MItX050Vh78tWhRz0-MyN_1ZUBKfAet_v8-Aaz6po4LU3DdPY9dFw44xGTcDWB7AZMVw0p5L8R1MAkFQdDX-AHfhxcB9lIr1_Ii6P31TRIQD_V7tsS6cKmAXZHUXtizBT2Q_dNgvuTp6l6DDAp7e3BBVLCJ45w/42h/LPXvg7QASASVPZSflodxTg/h2/j73VGsJlhnY12IAz2Ks_933KG2JIP4IAMj9P93wRUa4) _Vox_ reports that a “rising Republican movement to defund public libraries” is sweeping our nation.
Republican Rep. Clay Higgins denounces libraries as “liberal grooming centers,” and extremist activists agree.
Last year, an Iowa library temporarily shuttered after homophobic threats to library staff drove them to quit.
Hundreds of challenges have been filed against allowing anyone - not just children - to read LGBTQ+ books.
**[Enough is enough. clean_body: | | | Across America, our freedom to read is under attack. Right-wing extremists have taken LGBTQ+ books off many school library shelves, and they’re already coming after public libraries. Derek Marshall is an LGBTQ+ Democrat running for Congress to fight right-wing censorship and erasure. Will you stand with our campaign today? Vox reports that a “rising Republican movement to defund public libraries” is sweeping our nation. Republican Rep. Clay Higgins denounces libraries as “liberal grooming centers,” and extremist activists agree. Last year, an Iowa library temporarily shuttered after homophobic threats to library staff drove them to quit. Hundreds of challenges have been filed against allowing anyone - not just children - to read LGBTQ+ books. **For the freedom to read, Marshall for Congress is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 | | Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Derek Marshall for Congress, please .

name: Sean Feucht iPhone
subject: FWD: God gave me a dream for America 🙏🏽🇺🇸
body:
| | | Dear Friend,
---
I hope you had a wonderful Christmas with your families. I wanted to make sure you saw one of our 2024 initiatives-- the 100,000 strong PRAYER ARMY! We want to recruit 100,000 Believers from all across America who will commit to praying for our nation every single day. Some of you already do this, and to that I say YES AND AMEN! We want to be in a posture of intentional prayer for our nation, our leaders, and our future! If you'd like to add your name to the PRAYER ARMY and commit to praying for America all 2024,**[sign up here](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=c5d7906fe1bf4d19a57a3fb453ee7fbd&_e=bEe08IXOKBRu4XeytYzDzUnvE2KIDNvF9XYP5OLh4M2v6lBCIk-9hfTnrijCSZaDkPi09eNihM3CZWHe_6yLD-lAwOKbX-5ZWig-wEDLwOYzdlRZWnKAf0x5tTedpGSuOnD1SAXcqtZo7Ruh3ZMg4Ri5VAIPGh9xMIlGuHipXDdyl9a_96BtCE3IDGcZTk_LUJLZFTUKaiQPRmXqm_Pu1d0lQZNUqYLUdf1ypP5_anwH8E84T4AOQ5msWfbajdYNik0FJHis5Fda0SW63VN6VqY2OfiQ3QwWbsrXVzHTm7NSyopISp3jczCnb4qoJvI3)** or click the link below! God Bless,SeanSent from my iPhone

\-------Forwarded message-------From: Sean Feucht
Date: Wednesday, December 20, 2023

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the President?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce5d6dc08d484d999b12596b1ff7e7a2&_e=FqH1P4lwgLAU3FA1TgdxIz3ixVDwkTHLeQohbzkruDgLqNwbwENvvmO5Ejxo-l1DzMJXlMUbPoaNrNUMeXpfSsWnAsD240ilWi6BcFVQhcDwyRZw30GjGm5Qjfd-W9p5u8tvtUddHmqOXLeOUC4tktWdE1VZzS2YQKad1KuGtznqhSZSqOCiUsfal6lHF0YE_3WLRrvILb0wjvG7PnZ5tlfZFVfGm_oiZ60KLcW_Ob3PiHbQxD49b4nP-zif0M0co6J-jDjY9y3RiWftveVV92HixcwW9VgJ55kIiZql8KrklzFcQLPSp-C-VF7x1ExecZYeHDGoy8PdgR1bh67hrwAJ5Q_VD8zW85nGb7NlzyXE3AWyeWrQCLsEAVEt5kdan1K0S9Y81Y3yLZSpRptD6keOVfswJzhsgZhCbfwH6-8%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce5d6dc08d484d999b12596b1ff7e7a2&_e=FqH1P4lwgLAU3FA1TgdxIz3ixVDwkTHLeQohbzkruDgLqNwbwENvvmO5Ejxo-l1DzMJXlMUbPoaNrNUMeXpfSsWnAsD240ilWi6BcFVQhcDwyRZw30GjGm5Qjfd-W9p5u8tvtUddHmqOXLeOUC4tktWdE1VZzS2YQKad1KuGtznqhSZSqOCiUsfal6lHF0YE_3WLRrvILb0wjvG7PnZ5tlfZFVfGm_oiZ60KLcW_Ob3PiHbQxD49b4nP-zif0M0c130DbUtir3vA5ItAqDPPEbu13GaxwIW6maz7FRyxag8Y_CiCQlq78i2TEoedCw6RBE-QGg4oMeKQ8KbIFNIsewTGDVqwM4Uir5pvPeVxgqQH0FKH__-vz1ypXJzoW3iYhwac3x6MxpRwirYrf7qj-hbxEqlzFSAnJO1heGvaDAQ%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce5d6dc08d484d999b12596b1ff7e7a2&_e=FqH1P4lwgLAU3FA1TgdxIz3ixVDwkTHLeQohbzkruDgLqNwbwENvvmO5Ejxo-l1DzMJXlMUbPoaNrNUMeXpfSsWnAsD240ilWi6BcFVQhcDwyRZw30GjGm5Qjfd-W9p5u8tvtUddHmqOXLeOUC4tktWdE1VZzS2YQKad1KuGtznqhSZSqOCiUsfal6lHF0YE_3WLRrvILb0wjvG7PnZ5tlfZFVfGm_oiZ60KLcW_Ob3PiHbQxD49b4nP-zif0M0cMUfWYhkv00RY5FZm5xIxdb0acSG-8HGXbGy1GNpUeraTst2dXyD3cFhQ4dXHWb0jgm5cu6Ih0Xzz8m2ceYxcFmS34zqWB8dn2rPbQLG9M01ZV_IZ-a8-0hV2dVpit-RlSq09SgcnAM-7fyDsIPUAhYwKSLGFn8uZnENr4zX7huE%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ce5d6dc08d484d999b12596b1ff7e7a2&_e=FqH1P4lwgLAU3FA1TgdxIz3ixVDwkTHLeQohbzkruDgLqNwbwENvvmO5Ejxo-l1DzMJXlMUbPoaNrNUMeXpfSsWnAsD240ilWi6BcFVQhcDwyRZw30GjGm5Qjfd-W9p5u8tvtUddHmqOXLeOUC4tktWdE1VZzS2YQKad1KuGtznqhSZSqOCiUsfal6lHF0YE_3WLRrvILb0wjvG7PnZ5tlfZFVfGm_oiZ60KLcW_Ob3PiHbQxD49b4nP-zif0M0cP0iUJ0hJBkjkBNLIb557eLFz-N5D6OVIwG7jZpDRlfAOZS6QGeEVytO3TLD0NAgnMYaSesu-QzWqDNbeT9gvng7Uq8_VPg3VNQDAIVBd4xoogRgQpI2ku6mhh0VLMSq9q3TNmKw2ymVmDEr6QWjHrsxARJxLLyTh9BREg5YiaU4%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. | | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government? For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Don't forget what they did...
body:
You have an opportunity to help correct one of the worst injustices of the Covid era.

| |
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8af1b6b0a488464694f43c52c008ff92&_e=kD7gZVsHhMw2wsBxNel5nHp-vpLf-RgOE5WkMTE_Z6BZqNkVJpn8fpHh_5KKc3MXX0kdv9UI_8x1AVwwztcv1BRKhmaeqs_ENHcq14iurpRqi7_E92BQkY_bU2mUVv0_v8xNDSR4v9TE7qd8KvfVRqD5G0tDiQjoq-FB1dcoD2Lo9XHk_VF4BCSly87F9Qf5ncGsRxfuVN5fC6qdZxB8hlbSroqp-SpvjSb3QPFjT86pcge-DiaghfD0HYgPzvh12-j3rcVPFzms4gEiZGLls0PNn1cuj5dYXgLTL48BtUFg4kDDvqglTq5IDUpbJSvazUsJWeQLG24CukMAlAJg-nXi3Kiw8UAO4PC3-u3yujverPpIYPGH5L-1pPWDOW4f)
---
Fellow American, You have an opportunity to help correct one of the worst injustices of the Covid era. **Thou****sands of hardworking, competent people were fired -- all because they refused to get the Covid shot.** Doctors, nurses, teachers, members of the military, and many more. It's the natural tendency of the authoritarian left to punish people for refusing to go along with its schemes. And now that we know more of the truth about Covid, the vaccine, and the shady collusion between government organizations, Big Tech and Big Pharma... ...they'd love nothing more than to sweep this all under the rug and pretend it never happened. **That 's why I've instructed our attorneys at the Center for American Liberty to initiate legal action to hold them accountable.** For starters, we filed a lawsuit against the North Carolina Symphony on behalf of three musicians fired for refusing to get the COVID vaccine. _Each of them had been in the Symphony for over a decade._ **[**And if we can win this critical legal battle, we can put employers across the country on notice that they should reinstate victims of their COVID vaccine firings.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8af1b6b0a488464694f43c52c008ff92&_e=kD7gZVsHhMw2wsBxNel5nHp-vpLf-RgOE5WkMTE_Z6BZqNkVJpn8fpHh_5KKc3MXX0kdv9UI_8x1AVwwztcv1BRKhmaeqs_ENHcq14iurpRqi7_E92BQkY_bU2mUVv0_v8xNDSR4v9TE7qd8KvfVRqD5G0tDiQjoq-FB1dcoD2Lo9XHk_VF4BCSly87F9Qf5ncGsRxfuVN5fC6qdZxB8huYJnY06GBSFY7DuaC-EgYovSUlrv3-6bn6KF_uZJGYDBWc4SswaqG0dFzmcLSY71rqkqEIF3BR3rRi3TZHSWSziQ48shgiCJu2iwVEcmIbD87mVXyLpQ6X9CMvy57t9XROo5zD0DiwrMDrsL0EQ6XRwco3usXHRFqDFPQPkY2_j)** When the Symphony introduced their vaccine mandate, it offered both religious and medical exemptions. Dovid, Chris, and Rachel each held sincere religious beliefs, filed for exemptions, and expressed a willingness to take other measures--like regular COVID testing--to ensure safety. But the Symphony rejected ALL of them and put them on a year of UNPAID LEAVE. These three musicians were Buddhist, Christian and Jewish. **To you and me, the freedom to practice your religion is a sacred right.** **So is your right to bodily autonomy.** But in the eyes of the cultural Marxists who control so many institutions in America today, your body doesn't belong to you - it belongs to them. They'll decide where you go... They'll decide what you need... They'll decide what you can have... They'll decide what vaccines you must take... In other words: _Your individual liberties_ will cease to exist. The good news is that while cultural Marxism is popular on college campuses, legacy media press rooms, the boardrooms of woke companies and inside government bureaucracies... ...the vast majority of Americans are against it. This is a fight we can win - and we must win. **[**You can join me today by making a generous, tax-deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty to fund this lawsuit for medical and religious freedom, and set a precedent nationwide that puts these radicals on notice.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8af1b6b0a488464694f43c52c008ff92&_e=kD7gZVsHhMw2wsBxNel5nHp-vpLf-RgOE5WkMTE_Z6BZqNkVJpn8fpHh_5KKc3MXX0kdv9UI_8x1AVwwztcv1BRKhmaeqs_ENHcq14iurpRqi7_E92BQkY_bU2mUVv0_v8xNDSR4v9TE7qd8KvfVRqD5G0tDiQjoq-FB1dcoD2Lo9XHk_VF4BCSly87F9Qf5ncGsRxfuVN5fC6qdZxB8hv7vwsjjOc1wA5Uzgp9clYN7XZEeDH8XdGuY0fwLF16mTWBu60quTUzvZH1W8OiCZ-22UjccK0bNRrKyqg1x8sjbOCtC357_AZrH37kN8j_B6yqBQS1cqBcaCFIXqTwDMURBPU2Tw0x9exHMvXty_467eEHs_WleYlMXpjFqKGxk)** Even after the North Carolina Symphony lifted its vaccine mandate, it refused to give these musicians their jobs back. Because it was never about "science" or "health" - it was always about control. And it's time to tell the cultural Marxists who want to control every aspect of your life that we aren't backing down. I hope I can count on your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO
---

clean_body: You have an opportunity to help correct one of the worst injustices of the Covid era. | | | | Fellow American, You have an opportunity to help correct one of the worst injustices of the Covid era. Thousands of hardworking, competent people were fired -- all because they refused to get the Covid shot. Doctors, nurses, teachers, members of the military, and many more. It's the natural tendency of the authoritarian left to punish people for refusing to go along with its schemes. And now that we know more of the truth about Covid, the vaccine, and the shady collusion between government organizations, Big Tech and Big Pharma... ...they'd love nothing more than to sweep this all under the rug and pretend it never happened. That 's why I've instructed our attorneys at the Center for American Liberty to initiate legal action to hold them accountable. For starters, we filed a lawsuit against the North Carolina Symphony on behalf of three musicians fired for refusing to get the COVID vaccine. Each of them had been in the Symphony for over a decade. When the Symphony introduced their vaccine mandate, it offered both religious and medical exemptions. Dovid, Chris, and Rachel each held sincere religious beliefs, filed for exemptions, and expressed a willingness to take other measures--like regular COVID testing--to ensure safety. But the Symphony rejected ALL of them and put them on a year of UNPAID LEAVE. These three musicians were Buddhist, Christian and Jewish. To you and me, the freedom to practice your religion is a sacred right. So is your right to bodily autonomy. But in the eyes of the cultural Marxists who control so many institutions in America today, your body doesn't belong to you - it belongs to them. They'll decide where you go... They'll decide what you need... They'll decide what you can have... They'll decide what vaccines you must take... In other words: Your individual liberties will cease to exist. The good news is that while cultural Marxism is popular on college campuses, legacy media press rooms, the boardrooms of woke companies and inside government bureaucracies... ...the vast majority of Americans are against it. This is a fight we can win - and we must win. Even after the North Carolina Symphony lifted its vaccine mandate, it refused to give these musicians their jobs back. Because it was never about "science" or "health" - it was always about control. And it's time to tell the cultural Marxists who want to control every aspect of your life that we aren't backing down. I hope I can count on your support. | | Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO | | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 {\\optouturi} | Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

subject: Mike Feuer took on the gun lobby in California. He'll do the same in Congress.

body:
Mike Feuer is the gun reform champion we need.

Mike Feuer for Congress [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75903201/446073559/1100932385?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2023.12.27_B1_AnnReissLane_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDNjNGE0MjUtZTNhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ej_xuVeaAtmRmSKqnSLEr-7oikkNNuIYLYdzQ7-_hfA=&emci=9cb505ca-e6a0-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=43c4a425-e3a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=13691217) | Friend, Hi, I’m Ann Reiss Lane. More than 30 years ago, Betty Friedan and I co-founded an organization, Women Against Gun Violence* to save lives and end the gun industry’s influence on our culture and politics. **I need a relentless champion for gun reform fighting for us in Congress — and that’s why I’m urging you to support Mike Feuer’s campaign with a contribution today!** [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75903202/446073560/1693661536?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2023.12.27_B1_AnnReissLane_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDNjNGE0MjUtZTNhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ej_xuVeaAtmRmSKqnSLEr-7oikkNNuIYLYdzQ7-_hfA=) Mike and I have worked very closely together for more than 25 years. He is a tremendously effective advocate, coalition-builder, and lawmaker. **Believe me: Mike’s work as City Attorney to get guns out of the hands of domestic abusers has saved the lives of countless women.** He didn’t just author many of the strongest gun laws in the country. Mike co-founded the first organization of prosecutors working to fight gun violence and spoke at the Obama White House about effective violence prevention strategies. Mike’s already a national leader, and with gun violence ripping through our communities, it’s time to send Mike to Congress to fight for federal gun reform. [_**Mike’s campaign is facing the LAST end-of-quarter deadline before voters cast their ballots in the primary. Please, if you’re able, donate to his campaign today so we can send a relentless gun reform champion to Congress →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75903203/446073561/580515288?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2023.12.27_B1_AnnReissLane_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MjAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDNjNGE0MjUtZTNhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ej_xuVeaAtmRmSKqnSLEr-7oikkNNuIYLYdzQ7-_hfA=) Thank you so much, and happy holidays, — Ann Reiss Lane *Title for identification only. Peter Willis,

With Israel carrying out an illegal bombing campaign in Gaza that has murdered thousands of innocent civilians, we're so proud of Peace candidates like Barbara Lee, Bernie Sanders, Ro Khanna, and others who have spoken out demanding an end to indiscriminate bombing.

In response, right-wing allies of Bibi Netanyahu, like AIPAC, have waged a dishonest and well-funded campaign to smear anyone calling for peace.

With AIPAC having pledged to spend "at least $100 million" defeating progressives and primary challenges underway for Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman and others, Our Revolution gearing up now to defend these important voices of moral clarity in 2024.

That's why we're asking you to send in a $5 recurring contribution or a $10 one-time donation to support progressives standing up for peace. body:
STOP WHAT YOU'RE DOING!

| |

---
| | | _STOP WHAT YOU 'RE DOING AND READ THIS UPDATE:_

- FIRST: The Biden Administration took a sledgehammer to Trump's Remain-in-Mexico policy.

- THEN: Joe Biden restarted catch-and-release.

**- NOW: Texas Republicans took matters into their own hands to make it legal for police officers to arrest illegal immigrants!**

This landmark law is a strong policy to prevent illegal immigrants from entering our country - but there is still so much more to do. Just this week, illegal border crossings hit an ALL-TIME HIGH!

If you're sick and tired of seeing our border overrun... If you're sick of seeing our Border Patrol agents being overworked and underappreciated... And if you're sick of open-border Democrats...

_We need to hear from you right here and right now:_
***********************
Should it be law in ALL 50 STATES for police officers to be able to arrest illegal immigrants?

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Year-end 3x Match Offer for Peter: ACTIVE NOW
body:
Time sensitive

Peter - our Membership Drive deadline is a few days away, and we're reaching out because we haven't heard from you yet (renew your membership here and your contribution will be tripled https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMXp~_ ).

The truth is your membership matters, and it's particularly critical right now.

Here's the situation: Earlier this month, Senator Joe Manchin backed away from a climate deal after months of negotiations, choosing to side with Big Oil and Republicans. It leaves the deal one vote short -- stalling any real action in Congress for now.

In response, we're redoubling our efforts on pushing the White House to act decisively on climate. The Biden administration has massive amounts of power to curb climate pollution - but that will only happen if the environmental movement makes it happen.

Right now, we're facing a critical test: the Biden administration is weighing a plan to block all new oil and gas drilling leases on public waters.

This could be huge -- and a decision is coming. Right now, we're organizing volunteers from all over the country to flood the administration with letters, pressuring Biden to hold to his promises.

Peter -- it's your membership support that makes victory possible here. But we have to do more. A group of donors has put together a fund to triple match every contribution before Sunday's membership deadline:

Can we count on your support? Claim your membership now - it only takes $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-

The ban on new oil and gas leases is the first of many huge environmental decisions, Peter. And right now, we're pushing for serious action on so many fronts -- including:
Setting tight standards for power plants and other major emitters of climate pollution
Placing strict limits on air pollution to safeguard all communities Expediting requirements of 100% tailpipe pollution-free new cars by 2035 and trucks by 2040
Protecting communities from hazardous and super-polluting methane Conserving 30% of our public lands and waters by 2030 Declaring a climate emergency - and so much more. The best way you can help win each and every one of these fights right now is to claim your LCV membership - all it takes is a gift of $5 or more. https://links.messages.lcv.

Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter. This is such a critical moment for the environment, and we're so fortunate to have you on the team.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10387187&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg4MDM4OTE3OQS2&spReportId=MTg4MDM4OTE3OQS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10387187&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg4MDM4OTE3OQS2&spReportId=MTg4MDM4OTE3OQS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10387187&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg4MDM4OTE3OQS2&spReportId=MTg4MDM4OTE3OQS2

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Critical decisions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
When this deadline passes, we have some critical spending decisions to make for the year ahead. Your support today will help make those decisions a lot easier.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=818%2E791427%2EKV5hwg)

Hey there, it's Ilhan. I'll be direct:
I'm reaching out this morning because just 4 days from now, we're facing an official FEC fundraising deadline, and I need to ask if you can [**make a $3 contribution to our campaign before it ends.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec23.Lgr9Ln&refcode=em231227-1-t3&t=2&akid=818%2E791427%2EKV5hwg)
When we file our public report, _everyone_ — the media, the right-wing super PACs, and our establishment opponents — will all go through our books. They'll want to see how much money we've raised and how many donations we've received, and we'll tell them.
But your contribution today is so much more important than just showing off strong numbers or keeping up appearances.
That's because we need to build the kind of campaign that can _win_ — and the truth is that what we raise here in the final week of the year is incredibly important to our chances in the fight.
This race is going to require a lot of resources. AIPAC alone has committed to spending over $100 million interfering in Democratic primaries next year. And the right-wing and their super PACs would love nothing more than to try and defeat us.
When this deadline passes, we have some critical spending decisions to make for the year ahead. Your support today will help make those decisions a lot easier.
So please. This is a big week for our movement, and I need to ask:
[**Can I count on your support — $3 or anything you can — before our final FEC fundraising deadline of the year comes to a close?](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec23.Lgr9Ln&refcode=em231227-1-t3&t=3&akid=818%2E791427%2EKV5hwg)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_

This is how we're funding this thing — together. Thank you for chipping in if you can.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: I need your $3 to reach our $9,000 FEC deadline goal.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
**The Long Run FEC Fundraising Deadline**
**Goal:** $9,000
**Deadline Day:** December 31, 2023
**Long Run PAC Donor? No, not yet!
Suggested Donation: [$3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dec23.PPEU6P&refcode=em231227-1-t2&t=1&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dec23.PPEU6P&refcode=em231227-1-t2&t=2&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dec23.PPEU6P&refcode=em231227-1-t2&t=3&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
Hey there, it’s Mandela Barnes.
I am reaching out today with an important update: I am launching the Long Run’s FINAL FEC deadline fundraising drive before the election year and need your support to reach our all-important fundraising goal.
We have set a critical fundraising goal of $9,000 before our official deadline on the 31st. With just four days remaining in the quarter, our goal seems steep but I have no doubt we will hit it as long as we have your support.
[**So I am asking: Can you please rush a $3 contribution to our movement ahead of our final FEC deadline before the election year? Our movement relies on your support.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dec23.PPEU6P&refcode=em231227-1-t2&t=4&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=longrunpac-em-dec23.D8m-8r&amount=3&refcode=em231227-1-t2&t=23&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-dec23.H4kjrZ&refcode=em231227-1-t2&t=24&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-dec23.xCbnH4&refcode=em231227-1-t2&t=25&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-dec23.bYri1I&refcode=em231227-1-t2&t=26&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-dec23.77Xyel&refcode=em231227-1-t2&t=27&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dec23.PPEU6P&refcode=em231227-1-t2&t=28&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
In just four days, we will wrap up our final quarter of 2023 and reach a public reporting deadline. Soon after, we are legally required to report our fundraising data — from how many supporters we have to how much money we have raised.
This is our final opportunity of the year to report our fundraising data publicly. And as we approach the 2024 election, a lot of eyes will be looking to dissect our results — the press, political pundits, and the GOP — to see if we have the resources and the momentum to continue making a difference in races across the country.
We have a ways to go before we hit that $9,000 goal, but I'm not worried, because this team has shown up time and time again to fight for our democracy. You did when we helped elect Justice Janet Protasiewicz in Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race and when we helped Virginia Democrats take back the legislative majority earlier this year.
I know 2024 will be no different because our movement is powerful and that power begins with you and this grassroots team. But we cannot continue making a difference without your support so I need to ask:
[**Can you please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to help us reach our $9,000 goal before our FEC deadline? Our path to meeting our goals depends on this grassroots movement.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dec23.PPEU6P&refcode=em231227-1-t2&t=29&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
Thank you for your continued support. Let’s finish 2023 strong!
Mandela Barnes
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dec23.PPEU6P&refcode=em231227-1-t2&t=30&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=31&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=32&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=33&refcode2=5100_196590_26KjDD&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=34&akid=5100%2E196590%2E26KjDD)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: Checking in on our 2023 resolutions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-dec2023-fr-december?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-dec2023-fr-december?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Eric began the year with a promise: to hold the MAGA extremists and alt-right radicals accountable for derailing and endangering our democracy.

And friend, as we close out the year, we’re marking that resolution complete. ✅

Despite being kicked off the House Intelligence Committee by a vengeful Kevin McCarthy back in January, Eric hasn’t stopped fighting at the frontlines to keep Trump off the ballot in Colorado and taking lunatics like Jim Jordan to task.

But we know that muting the MAGA megaphone has put a target squarely on his back, and as we head into 2024, we’re gearing up for Mike Johnson and his Republicans to retaliate.

Friend, we’re in the home stretch of the year, and we’re aiming to raise another $10,000 before the ball drops on New Year’s Eve. Can we count on you to rush a contribution of any amount so Eric can reach his goal, flip the House, and keep these MAGA extremists out of the People’s House in 2024? body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75905157/446077588/-1415976427?refcode=em-12.27.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVkM2VkMTQtZTZhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZfNHQJVxoOox-3TFOaRsRiS6FEacErxHqG8RCf3VOTs=)

Friend,

**[This is a long, but important email about the approach I will take in Congress. Please take a moment to read it, then consider chipping in $3 to help me meet my final FEC deadline of 2023 to be best positioned to succeed Adam Schiff in CA-30.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75905158/446077589/-1415976427?refcode=em-12.27.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVkM2VkMTQtZTZhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZfNHQJVxoOox-3TFOaRsRiS6FEacErxHqG8RCf3VOTs=)**

There’s no question that CA-30 should be an example for the rest of the country.

**Unfortunately, today’s Congress is led by extremists focused on advancing their fringe political agenda and stripping away our rights. They’ve shown little interest in caring about the people I represent.**

As a mother and an Angeleno, I'm worried about the future of our county. That's why as a legislator and activist, I'm stepping up to do something about it.

In Congress, it’s my promise that every vote I take will be grounded in whether or not it truly meets the needs of this district -- whether it’s combating climate change, fighting for dignified wages and a public health option, or defending reproductive freedoms and the rights of our LGBTQ+ friends and family from far-right attacks.

That’s why I’m in this race, and it’s why I’m asking for your support:

**[We're officially in the final week of 2023, facing our last FEC deadline of the year. Now that you know what type of representative I’d be, please pitch in $3 today to help us meet the mark.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75905161/446077591/-1415976427?refcode=em-12.27.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVkM2VkMTQtZTZhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZfNHQJVxoOox-3TFOaRsRiS6FEacErxHqG8RCf3VOTs=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, = | **= There’s no question that CA-30 should be an example for the rest of the country. Unfortunately, today’s Congress is led by extremists focused on advancing their fringe political agenda and stripping away our rights. They’ve shown little interest in caring about the people I represent. As a mother and an Angeleno, I'm worried about the future of our county. That's why as a legislator and activist, I'm stepping up to do something about it. In Congress, it’s my promise that every vote I take will be grounded in whether or not it truly meets the needs of this district -- whether it’s combating climate change, fighting for dignified wages and a public health option, or defending reproductive freedoms and the rights of our LGBTQ+ friends and family from far-right attacks. That’s why I’m in this race, and it’s why I’m asking for your support: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you for your support, Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: Christian
subject: You can help. . .
body:
Dear Peter,

There are only 69 days until Primary Election Day, and only 50 days until Early Voting Begins.

The race is on!

I'm trying something out of the ordinary. I'm not asking you to send me a large a $3,300 or even $1,000 contribution - of course, you're welcome to do so.

**_It is more important to me that I have patriots, conservatives, and reliable voters like you supporting my campaign! Please send me $50 or $69 TODAY!_**

[****](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/q4_deadline)

Let's send a message to The Swamp!

_We don 't need career politicians more concerned about their agenda. And we don't need bought and paid for lobbyists working for special interests. _

I am $5,113 short of my year-end of fundraising goal. I need to meet this target. If my campaign meets this target, we will be able to fund the rest of our campaign for the primary.

**Please make a contribution of $50 or $69 TODAY!**

_I 'm Christian Castelli. I'm not a career politician breaking my term limit pledge to seek my next opportunity. I'm not a lobbyist pushing the Big Insurance agenda. I'm a retired Lieutenant Colonel in the U.S. Army, decorated combat veteran, Green Beret, and senior advisor at the Pentagon. _

America faces challenges at home and abroad. Our freedom is under attack. Our border is vulnerable and unsecured. Gas, groceries, and rent prices are rising higher than wages.

We need an [experienced, proven conservative leader](https://castellifornc.com/about/) representing the 6th Congressional District of North Carolina. We don't need retreads. And we don't need newbies.

We need to eliminate Bidenomics and inflation. We need to close and secure the border. We need to defend American freedom at home and abroad.

Let's send a Green Beret to Congress. Career politicians or lobbyists can't get the job done!

**We are just $5,113 short of our fundraising goal. But if you make a donation for $50 or $69, we can and we will win this campaign. Please make a donation TODAY!**

[****](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/q4_deadline)

****

Christian Castelli
Lieutenant Colonel (Retired)
U.S. Army Special Forces
Republican Candidate for the U.S. House of Representatives
(336) 810-8100
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **colonel@castellifornc.com**.
If you do not wish to receive further messages from us, [ please click here to unsubscribe](https://emailtracking-cm.aristotle.com/frmEmailUnsubscribe.aspx?databaseId=b33a3810-9cbf-4584-a3d2-01672886537a&activityID=5b47f012-ecaf-436a-a7c1-4815497df2bf).

Hey Peter, As we work to reshape the political landscape of rural America, we wanted to pause and reflect on how much we accomplished this year. Democrats in rural states across the country stood up and proudly rejected Republican attempts to take away a woman’s right to choose. We made significant gains in states and districts that pundits have traditionally counted out. Despite all of our accomplishments this year, we weren’t funded by large PACs or corporate donors. In fact, our average donation this year was just **$20.34**. Democrats in rural states across the country stood up and proudly rejected Republican attempts to take away a woman’s right to choose. We made significant gains in states and districts that pundits have traditionally counted out. Despite all of our accomplishments this year, we weren’t funded by large PACs or corporate donors. In fact, our average donation this year was just $20.34. = That’s right — all of our work has been funded by small-dollar donors. Average folks, just like you, who want to help Democrats succeed in rural areas. Progressives who understand the critical importance of making liberal gains in traditional Republican strongholds. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = We’re hard at work, striving to cut rural Americans in on the deal. We’re powered by grassroots donors like you, and we need your help. = United Rural Democrats | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: What I'm Looking Forward to Next Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
2024 is going to be a big year!
| | Derek - With 2024 starting next week, I wanted to give you an idea of what I'm looking forward to - both in New Hampshire and beyond. #1 - First off, and this has to top my list - I'm getting married! In Melissa I have truly found the love of my life and we are so eager and excited to get married and build our lives together. We'll be getting married in July. #2 - The 2024 Legislative Session - this is a clear downgrade from the wedding but the upcoming Legislative Session presents so many great opportunities to advocate for the people of New Hampshire and pass legislation and debate policy solutions that will shape the 2024 election season. I'll be advancing legislation on child care, consumer tax relief, educational freedom accounts, and more. I'm excited to see how the legislation is received by my colleagues in the House and I hope we can enact some solid policy solutions for the Granite State. #3 - A new Mayor in Manchester - Jay Ruais is sworn in next week as Manchester's Mayor and I am so excited to see what impact his leadership and the fresh approach he is going to take will have on the people of Manchester and all Granite Staters who work or do business in the city. Manchester has a real shot of entering a period of revival and I'm excited to see all that a Mayor Ruais will accomplish! #4 - The 2024 Elections - Being a political person I am obviously looking forward to the Fall 2024 elections, but I am just as focused on the local municipal elections as well. In Salem we'll be campaigning for a new police station that meets the needs of the community while utilizing all available financing tools at our town's disposal to ease the tax burden of such an endeavor. I know other towns are having debates on a wide variety of topics on the town side and school side and I look forward to engaging with and helping local candidates get elected and served their communities throughout New Hampshire. #5 - Continued growth for Granite Solutions - 2023 was a big year for Granite Solutions and I know 2024 will be even bigger. As we continue to build up our organization to be a force for good and promote fiscal conservatism throughout New Hampshrie, I know we can achieve even more victories in the years to come and that 2024 will be a pivotal year for our movement. I'd love to hear about what you're most excited about as well! Feel free to shoot me an email at [info@GraniteSolutions.org ](mailto:info@GraniteSolutions.org)or give me a call or shoot me a text at 603-327-7184. Sincerely, Rep. Joe Sweeney Founder, Granite Solutions [Support the Fight for a Stronger New Hampshire's at Granite Solutions](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.)
---
| | Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman. P.O. Box 266, Salem, NH 03079 [Unsubscribe.](https://link.emails.granitesolutions.org/click/e427981/HZW1haWxzX2dyYW5pdGVzb2x1dGlvbnNfb3JnMjMxMjI3LG5jbHowMWYzWixodHRwczovL3NuaC5udWNsZXVzZW1haWwuY29tL2FtcGxpZnkvc3Vic2NyaXB0aW9ucy91bnN1YnNjcmliZQ/qP2hpZHM9bmN6MDFmM1pGQnpybHM/s7g55a68a6c)
---

subject: Do you know this motto?
body:
Live Free or Die

| Peter,
General John Stark's, New Hampshire's most distinguished hero of the Revolutionary War, famous words Live Free or Die are not only on our license plates but it's our beautiful state's motto.
As a New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, I grew up in Exeter and now live with my beautiful family in Kingston.
Wanting to give back to my community, I served five terms as a proud New Hampshire State Senator for Senate Districts 19 and 23.
While I have been fighting for our state, my opponent, Chris Pappas has forgotten the Live Free or Die values that we pride ourselves on here in New Hampshire.
This is WHY I am running to represent NH-01 in Congress. New Hampshire needs someone who lives by and believes in our Live Free or Die values.
I can't do this alone, that is why I need YOUR help. Our FEC-mandated End-of-Year fundraising deadline is rapidly approaching.

| More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.
---

As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963. Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook. Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company. Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce. He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business. | | == == == | | | | | | | Prescott for Congress | PO Box 26, Kingston, NH 03848 | | Sent by mailto:info@prescottforcongress.com powered by

# _HELP ME STOP_
# _SUSAN WILD!_
|
---
Dear Friend,
**$4,112.00**
That’s how close we are to reaching our December 31st year-end fundraising goal and we need your help right away to get there.
**That may seem like a lot...but, if everyone who receives this email chips in just a little, we can make it.**
| [DONATE TODAY](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=e99d9045e8&e=5ccada9200)
---
**Why is reaching our goal so important?**
Because it sends a strong message to the establishment and the uniparty in Congress that we’re tired of their failed policies for America...and we are going to take back Pennsylvania’s 7th Congressional District - For The People.
My promise has been clear since the first day I entered this race: bring proven, conservative leadership back to Congress to get our economy back on track, make our communities and country safer, and provide real opportunities for success to every American. I even put forth my “Four Principles” Plan that tells you exactly what I’ll fight for in Congress.
**My plan has already made our campaign a target of the far left - people like “The Squad” of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Rashida Talib, Ilhan Ohmar, and Ayanna Pressley. These are the same people Susan Wild is beholden to after taking thousands of dollars from them to help her campaign.**
We need to fight back now by making sure we reach our fundraising goal by December 31st. There’s not a minute to waste, so please donate right away.
| [DONATE TO STOP WILD](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=9dee5c0499&e=5ccada9200)
---
I know this is a tough time of year to ask you for any contribution. I wouldn’t do it if it weren’t absolutely necessary, but it is. The future of our country depends on winning back the 7th District, and that depends on patriots like you joining the team today.
**I hope you will donate today.**
Thank you,
| [DONATE TODAY](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=a507c1db34&e=5ccada9200)
---
|
---
If you would like to be part of our team, please reach out at [info@mackenzieforcongress.com](mailto:info@mackenzieforcongress.com) or call my campaign at (484) 347-8777.
|
---
| [Volunteer Today!](https://mackenzieforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=62252a4538e3fe848298033c5&id=c10089f606&e=5ccada9200)

Hi friend, it’s Andrea.
I’ll get straight to the point because I know that you’re busy this time of year. **_This Sunday at midnight_ is our final end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year.**

**After the month ends on December 31st, our campaign is required to submit our internal fundraising numbers to the FEC.** That means these numbers will be made _publicly available_ , and reporters and Republican strategists can scour our fundraising report for signs of weakness.

But here’s the issue: Right now, my team and I are running $12,000 short of our must-hit Q4 goal. I know budgets are tight during the holidays, but I really need your help to catch up.

[**Every single dollar makes a difference, so can you contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can today to help us reach our final FEC fundraising goal of the year?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75907254/446080765/-2066741384?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.27_b1_as_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzgxOWQ5Mi1lOWE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tigV_zXDfYdp_bqcUaNryJ8AWdMvBTXmomusamHew0c=)

Look, meeting our end-of-year goal will enable our campaign to head into 2024 (election year!) with the momentum we need to win this hyper-competitive election.

**Your support has meant the world to me, and I know that with you on our team, we can meet our $12,000 goal and close the fundraising gap.**

[**Chip in today to help us reach our goal before the FEC deadline →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75907255/446080766/-2066741384?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.27_b1_as_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzgxOWQ5Mi1lOWE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tigV_zXDfYdp_bqcUaNryJ8AWdMvBTXmomusamHew0c=)

You’ve shown up for me time and time again in this fight. I can’t thank you enough for your support.

_Congresswoman Andrea Salinas_

name: BREAKING BORDER NEWS ----------------- House GOP
subject: (Yes or No) Should cops be able to arrest illegal immigrants?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
STOP WHAT YOU'RE DOING!

| |

---
| | | _STOP WHAT YOU 'RE DOING AND READ THIS UPDATE:_

- FIRST: The Biden Administration took a sledgehammer to Trump's Remain-in-Mexico policy.

- THEN: Joe Biden restarted catch-and-release.

**- NOW: Texas Republicans took matters into their own hands to make it legal for police officers to arrest illegal immigrants!**

This landmark law is a strong policy to prevent illegal immigrants from entering our country - but there is still so much more to do. Just this week, illegal border crossings hit an ALL-TIME HIGH!

If you're sick and tired of seeing our border overrun... If you're sick of seeing our Border Patrol agents being overworked and underappreciated... And if you're sick of open-border Democrats...

_We need to hear from you right here and right now:_
***********************

name: Kim, personal
subject: Before Sunday’s end-of-year deadline, I need to know I can count on your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
We need to raise $30,000 before the end of the year Peter, On Sunday night, my campaign will face our final fundraising deadline before the 2024 election year! To ensure our campaign is prepared for a contentious 2024 election, we've set an ambitious goal to raise **$30,000** by the end of this month for our FEC end-of-year goal. This fight is personal, Peter. As a doctor, I've witnessed what patients have had to go through. And recently, Donald Trump once again called for the repeal of the ACA. If Republicans have their way in 2024, they'll repeal the ACA and make cuts to Social Security and Medicare, all programs that I've seen people benefit from firsthand. That’s why I know I’ll need your support now more than ever if we want to make another stand and defend WA-08. The $30,000 raised will go directly towards ensuring our campaign can fight against Republican attack ads while setting the record straight on the progress we've made together. **Before our end-of-year deadline, please use this link and chip in to help defend this seat and retake the House majority in 2024:** **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-december23-eom](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75908017/446082825/1020945093?refcode=em23_231227_EOY1_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231227_EOY1_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=f156171e-eaa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTU2MTcxZS1lYWE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQTNalMLioRdtrsHyucMinSwvmdGuQTb90i9Chaooxk=)** Thank you,

body:
****_What a year it’s been, Peter._

And day after day, issue after issue, the GOP-led House has consistently shown that they’ll prioritize dysfunction over doing the work of the American people.

**So what are we doing about it? We’re going to take back the House in 2024.**

Of course, that means we need to have the resources on hand to defend the all-important Philadelphia suburbs.

We are just days away from the final Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline before 2024, and make no mistake – the national GOP will look to our reports to inform their overall swing state strategy in Pennsylvania. We must show the strength of this grassroots team.

Peter, we’re facing a MAGA GOP that is desperate to ram through an agenda most Americans oppose. As hard as we’ll fight, their big money donors will match our efforts in hopes of taking the House, the Senate, and the White House.

**After a tumultuous 2023, Democrats are ready to bring sanity back to Congress and get back to making progress for _all_ Americans. [If you’re able, chip in before the December 31st deadline to restore a Democratic majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75908014/446082830/979907179?amount=25&refcode=12272023_md_eoy_fr_1&refcode2=0457171e-eaa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDU3MTcxZS1lYWE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gpzwz554AK7ZCi00R7RN8EhyS2FcxiMCs-aQe-6VF_U=)**

With gratitude,

Madeleine
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75908015/446082832/979907179?amount=25&refcode=12272023_md_eoy_fr_1&refcode2=0457171e-eaa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDU3MTcxZS1lYWE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gpzwz554AK7ZCi00R7RN8EhyS2FcxiMCs-aQe-6VF_U=)

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties.
