clean_body: **What a year it’s been, Peter. And day after day, issue after issue, the GOP-led House has consistently shown that they’ll prioritize dysfunction over doing the work of the American people. So what are we doing about it? We’re going to take back the House in 2024. Of course, that means we need to have the resources on hand to defend the all-important Philadelphia suburbs. We are just days away from the final Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline before 2024, and make no mistake – the national GOP will look to our reports to inform their overall swing state strategy in Pennsylvania. We must show the strength of this grassroots team. -
Securing our border and completely revamping America's immigration policy.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=48fb03cc53fc75123e76c0a4f7e2873f45ab34b4b44344ff637a7ddaf7ece8af07098d41406d0f52ea1423cf2aab3651d31d42e82ed7b82870f106f28821217e

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=48fb03cc53fc75123e76c0a4f7e2873f45ab34b4b44344ff637a7ddaf7ece8af07098d41406d0f52ea1423cf2aab3651d31d42e82ed7b82870f106f28821217e

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.

The Michigan Supreme Court declined Wednesday to remove former President Donald Trump from the state’s 2024 ballot. The court wrote that it was “not persuaded that the questions presented should be reviewed by this Court” before rejecting the case on procedural grounds, according to a brief order. Before I explain more, will you give right now to help us reach this ambitious goal? | [DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75908639/446083621/2084576589?sourceid=1052596&refcode=20231227_TextLaunch_ND&refcode2=WTEFEL41&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjU3MTcxZS1lYWE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fi9xpO15D1Tcdrv3xB0Bl7H1tLCaey5T7kUIg85iiHY=)

This year, the pro-choice movement fueled historic victories up and down the ballot — from flipping the Virginia House to passing a pro-choice ballot measure in Ohio and reelecting a Democratic governor in Kentucky.

And now as we head into 2024, the U.S. Senate and House majorities are at stake, and EMILYs List women are running to flip red seats, hold blue seats, and defend and restore reproductive freedom nationwide. **We fought HARD to secure our 2023 victories against GOP anti-choice extremists, and we need to be ready to keep up the fight on day one of 2024.**

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Unlocking the Untold Traits of the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1edef28abb884111b1fb81120478af55&_e=a8euMHbpPUR7y0MpshX4vsM7t7KNF0TAYBj4FMM2oKlVS182KoBvOguAqOZE637STWgEU3PPmbFXIoqguH69GMXIPOw2AOZPXD50Ff9KwDAH_8Fwp6TV3in0h6h3Uy4YE0vHANDmh5OmQ7xq1HDOdDNyU5uAnzEMSFvk0W7KEhLlxUpfdehMECVxx7R0x0d2wpj3Xyk8XgqC9D9eKygG1cOe9EmvLoENGDukrBTHB3OGiizO6DbuWQ99yjlcuECQKV9DeSX4Ti8PlsnuOlnaeyulIPUAdpt-HO4ufKxX3MvXWGjxv1D06j8soA1FpxlCiiNWkVqymSxK2Pv0OTHudazoHToJpoBG39mJChXby6fuVjbz8FgZA_qmMRPbC9RVqS3eMzMAkqIyUoLUK55NEw%3D%3D)

| | Dear Friend, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1edef28abb884111b1fb81120478af55&_e=a8euMHbpPUR7y0MpshX4vsM7t7KNF0TAYBj4FMM2oKlVS182KoBvOguAqOZE637STWgEU3PPmbFXIoqguH69GMXIPOw2AOZPXD50Ff9KwDAH_8Fwp6TV3in0h6h3Uy4YE0vHANDmh5OmQ7xq1HDOdDNyU5uAnzEMSFvk0W7KEhLlxUpfdehMECVxx7R0x0d2wpj3Xyk8XgqC9D9eKygG1cOe9EmvLoENGDukrBTHB3MtPdF5zr5PTC99bwOZEzknEk_VCw_J3KPy59gvXtp-bP95xdxmVCsMNuPux778aSdz13LxTy63UkzuocJBO04EGcJ_zPf1tHxSYkRany0Bs7x7NRSuQwUMi4ifz1z9h0a8E-txufW_zOt2l4TWO37mWFjQcchHj9IpzuoOcv_y3g%3D%3D)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1edef28abb884111b1fb81120478af55&_e=a8euMHbpPUR7y0MpshX4vsM7t7KNF0TAYBj4FMM2oKlVS182KoBvOguAqOZE637STWgEU3PPmbFXIoqguH69GMXIPOw2AOZPXD50Ff9KwDAH_8Fwp6TV3in0h6h3Uy4YE0vHANDmh5OmQ7xq1HDOdDNyU5uAnzEMSFvk0W7KEhLlxUpfdehMECVxx7R0x0d2wpj3Xyk8XgqC9D9eKygG1cOe9EmvLoENGDukrBTHB3PqngOWIv7axO820ud4FJ46E0HEPcd22BpTkSLGA0mRYXtbkLaugWUrm84ojBv21YoQGc3cotK-N2arky77H2WhUFClJmGibF1iEhL7YTMnEGcKAXzQ5RTBc_Jv6ThuH7tWNWRwW_4zvCnxMK-Sj5_Cm5N4G_HyPieEm_96QqBQYQ%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1edef28abb884111b1fb81120478af55&_e=a8euMHbpPUR7y0MpshX4vsM7t7KNF0TAYBj4FMM2oKlVS182KoBvOguAqOZE637STWgEU3PPmbFXIoqguH69GMXIPOw2AOZPXD50Ff9KwDAH_8Fwp6TV3in0h6h3Uy4YE0vHANDmh5OmQ7xq1HDOdDNyU5uAnzEMSFvk0W7KEhLlxUpfdehMECVxx7R0x0d2wpj3Xyk8XgqC9D9eKygG1cOe9EmvLoENGDukrBTHB3MuaTUn1dpFH2S0Wuy9RnLs1Wjj__rJCnR-PAoJqeofs_F3q25cDn2ajVheVyDAHvMI2WwWxJ5ORy2HZ8H9lS_nptvkrUr7yW9yRidDzI7wh0nl1pP_KEzBQTB-qghsH-B2KrvSn0zXmaPeXJG5HrGPEWqa2dNCuPze2V6EVHTEBw%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94632094f73b4ab18159e2ff8a44e762&_e=i_B1cULmzmlU3bE1-ojwzdRkTDN7-ubQ4tDZKgaO4psP1x_C36glznA6exnBJCBJiuam0ddpvTX3y7rf9jsgFcVtCLGwU1_mt8kYA44RWoFfaL0iaQ6A3v1ZHELU-Sktrf3II4TyIKBtQLwVyf9PHevY7rpXj-GuBxsXpqWARxqlU_iJTiXnlebu135vMZ8k4RLI0RXLt15wNjWIFsza5K5Lzx5uHv_vPRqiYjQh6Z5zipTArobJEhHjpjZEZMZRAwlOz5Oycp2W5Y3CNV2ixBpvOFyiC7bq3zTmxqoVdpbUHoZ7kn-Swam8uLEBA2PpKINU87vjetg7zAlwRqRB6-BLgFWpwA4lrDY-hTdJqS0%3D)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:
* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=94632094f73b4ab18159e2ff8a44e762&_e=i_B1cULmzmlU3bE1-ojwzdRkTDN7-ubQ4tDZKgaO4psP1x_C36glznA6exnBJCBJiuam0ddpvTX3y7rf9jsgFcVtCLGwU1_mt8kYA44RWoFfaL0iaQ6A3v1ZHELU-Sktrf3II4TyIKBtQLwVyf9PHevY7rpXj-GuBxsXpqWARxqlU_iJTiXnlebu135vMZ8k4RLI0RXLt15wNjWIFsza5HVBR4cwJym6DrWeEdHAMNqn6iVmSgYohEhvZoggwgjABwfccd8Og8qQq-V7VUle0wAta_irDX_9lpJrWBq134gcQFfpbfWp2FJpuZ5E3DDoUgrOI6d5GD0hwQ71Gw9xZfEaBncmP-5rpfNo8qsYfcE%3D)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute

clean_body: Please open this email – it’s an important read. | Y’all — I’m a former public school teacher and current state legislator. I’ve spent my career advocating for kids and families and working to make our state the best place it can be. I’ll always stand tall in the fight for gun violence prevention, women’s rights, and education. (Just ask any one of my Republican colleagues who’ve tried to shut me up before, I don’t back down from a fight!) My opponent is the senior Senator from Tennessee. Marsha Blackburn has spent over two DECADES in Washington voting on behalf of her friends in the pharmaceutical industry and the gun lobby, not her constituents in Tennessee. The only fight she cares about is the one for the biggest campaign check from her donors. Simply put – Marsha Blackburn has to go. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Marsha Blackburn might be flat-out WRONG for Tennessee but the fight to defeat her won’t be easy and it won’t be cheap. She has spent years building a campaign war chest for her re-election campaign. It’s now overflowing with contributions from corporate PACs and political insiders. Meanwhile, I’m building our campaign the right way – from grassroots donors like you. And right now, we’re up against our biggest challenge to date: the end-of-year fundraising deadline. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Gloria = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Look, Montanans deserve someone who will crack down on the special interests and corruption in Washington, not play political games and cut backroom deals.

We need to fight to lower costs for hardworking families, create good-paying union jobs, and ensure rural communities have what they need, like reliable internet and hospitals within driving distance.

Folks, I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. **I still farm the same land my grandparents homesteaded 100 years ago, and I try every day to do what’s right for the people of Montana and across the country.**

Because of that, I don’t have much patience for the fancy billionaires and shady super PACs that think they should be in charge. **Instead, I listen to and depend on grassroots supporters like you.**

That’s why I’m grateful you even opened this email. My team assures me that emails like this one make up a big part of our budget—and chipping in five or ten bucks goes a long way in a campaign like ours.

**So, here’s the part where I ask:[_Can you make a contribution of $17.77 (our average online donation) today to help us meet our fundraising goal? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help us respond to the onslaught of out-of-state money coming in to attack my record._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75909479/446086368/665036970?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2023-12-27_1&amount=17.77&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmNTJjOTE4LWViYTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cH2qNNOqV85qZh0PnXSe8iaM0safTd-thbPccgGfycg=)**

name: Colin Allred
subject: In Texas, we believe in freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
But anti-choice extremists are chipping away at those freedoms. |
---

| | | | In Texas, we believe in freedom: to live your life, to make decisions about your own body and health, to travel where you want to go, and to do so without interference from the government. Recently, however, anti-choice extremists have been steadily chipping away at those freedoms.
---
| | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75909892/446087428/-995389955?refcode=lpfe231227split-ca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTliNDNiMS1lYmE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jAvazxdOO2GkNsbKRpxZ8cflNbermM5RliO3-B7MnKk=)**
---
After the Texas Supreme Court ruled a Dallas woman couldn’t receive potentially life-saving abortion care, she was forced to leave the state to get the time-sensitive care she needed. That’s after our state enacted one of the strictest abortion bans in the country. And now, even the right to travel out of state for reproductive care is at risk. Taking away people’s right to travel freely is at odds with our values as Texans and Americans—that’s why I support Lizzie’s bill to protect the right to travel across state lines for abortion care and why, as Texas’ next Senator, I will work to make sure the protections of Roe v. Wade are the law again in all 50 states. I’m running to replace Ted Cruz in the Senate, and remember—Cruz not only supports Texas’ near-total abortion ban, he wants to go even further and ban abortion nationwide. [_**Abortion is on the ballot in 2024. So am I, and so is Lizzie. We both need your help ahead of the upcoming end-of-year FEC deadline, the biggest deadline of our campaigns to date.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75909893/446087429/-995389955?refcode=lpfe231227split-ca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTliNDNiMS1lYmE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jAvazxdOO2GkNsbKRpxZ8cflNbermM5RliO3-B7MnKk=) Together, Lizzie and I can give Texans the leadership they need and deserve. [_**Your contributions strengthen our campaigns as we head into the election year.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75909894/446087430/-995389955?refcode=lpfe231227split-ca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjY3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTliNDNiMS1lYmE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jAvazxdOO2GkNsbKRpxZ8cflNbermM5RliO3-B7MnKk=) Thank you, Colin Allred

clean_body: A State Supreme Court just ruled against Soros-funded Democrats... | | | Friend, After Soros-funded Democrats got my name REMOVED from the ballot in Colorado, they immediately intensified their efforts to try and disqualify me across the country. But today, the Michigan Supreme Court just dealt a massive blow to these Soros-funded Dark Money Democrats who are hellbent on rigging the 2024 election. “Michigan Supreme Court rejects case to remove Trump from 2024 ballot” [SOURCE: NBC] Let this serve as a powerful reminder: when we fight back against the radical Left, we WIN! But make no mistake: we have not heard the end of the Democrats' attempts to STEAL the 2024 election. Soros and his globalist donors will spend whatever it takes to cheat the system and BUY the White House for Crooked Joe in 2024. clean_body: | = Peter, I am about to ask you to chip in $1 to support my campaign. That’s right – all I am asking for is four quarters to keep CA-47 blue. = | **= Here’s why your $1 donation is so important: Every donation -- no matter how small -- powers our campaign. Your support directly funds our efforts to turnout voters across the district. This race could come down to a few hundred voters, so every dollar could have a game-changing impact in getting our supporters to the polls. (My friend and supporter Rep. Harley Rouda won his primary in 2018 by 125 votes!) Your $1 sends a message. Every donation (yes even $1) sends an important message about the number of supporters behind us. When more people give, it shows we have widespread support that can sustain us through Election Day. Individual donors are our best line of defense against super PAC attacks. We expect GOP super PACs to dump millions into CA-47 on attack ads. Dark money groups legally pay much more for their ads. Direct support to our campaign from real people goes much further on the airwaves. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** In unity, Joanna | Joanna's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: Diane Sare
subject: This Friday's Symposium -- New Years' Resolution: Turn Swords Into Ploughshares! The Secrets of the Military-Industrial-Intelligence-Financiers Complex
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=symposium_december_29_2023&n=1)
---
Friend **_Our "New Year's Resolution" for 2024 must be: To "Turn Swords into Plowshares" or, as explained by the Prophet Isaiah (2:4): “They shall beat their swords into plowshares, and their spears into pruning hooks; nation shall not lift up sword against nation, neither shall they learn war any more.”_**
* * *
This Friday's Symposium at 8 pm will feature _Executive Intelligence Review_ author Richard Freeman, whose team recently concluded a report entitled: **"Turn the Military-Financial Complex to Useful Production."** In the report, Freeman quotes Christian Sorenson who wrote in his book _Understanding the War Industry:_ _" The big banks and investment firms are in actuality, the foremost propellants of the war industry’s influence.... When war corporations are merging or acquiring other corporations ...banks like Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley serve as financial advisors. The top five investors in shares of Lockheed Martin are giant financial firms.... They know war production is a reliable, steady investment."_ The US debt is now 123% of GDP, and the interest on the debt is over $1 trillion. The military budget is over $800 billion. The US spends more on "defense" than the next 10 countries combined. Yet on U.S. military bases, American troops and families complain of food insufficiency. Join us this Friday at 8 pm on the Sare Symposium to learn how the United States could completely retool this massive, wasteful weapons industry to produce components for high speed rail, nuclear power plants, and many other necessary products to rebuild America.
### [NY Symposium, Friday, December 29, 8:00 pm: "Swords to Plowshares: Retooling the US Military Financial Complex"](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kx-Qfq-YkAnrAclmeHHcd9Q&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=symposium_december_29_2023&n=2)
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kx-Qfq-YkAnrAclmeHHcd9Q&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=symposium_december_29_2023&n=3)
* * *
| [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=symposium_december_29_2023&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=symposium_december_29_2023&n=4)

\--Diane

clean_body: We’re less than a year away from the 2024 Election, and I already have four extremist opponents trying to defeat me. | = | Peter, It’s hard to believe, but 2023 is nearly over — and that means we’re approaching our last FEC filing deadline before our election year. It’s crucial that we have a strong fundraising showing this quarter, so my team and I have set an ambitious goal of raising $25,000 before the end of the month. = | = | = This is the most urgent FEC deadline yet. We’re less than a year away from the 2024 Election, and I already have four extremist opponents trying to defeat me. Whoever the nominee is will surely receive the full backing of the National Republican Congressional Committee, along with financial support from dark money groups. But the thing is, Republicans wouldn’t be targeting me like this if they didn’t think they had a real chance of flipping my seat. = | = | = | = Thanks, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. Hi there,

Let me introduce myself: My name is Audrey, and I’m one of Janelle Stelson’s Student Fellows! I wanted to write a short note about **why Janelle’s campaign to represent PA-10 in Congress matters and why you should support her.**

Like so many women, I was devastated when I heard the news that _Roe v. Wade_ had been overturned. I was in D.C. at the time and protested at the Supreme Court that day. I couldn’t believe that a right that the women before me fought so hard for was just taken away right before our very eyes.

**As a young woman with my whole future ahead of me, reproductive freedom is an issue that my friends and I worry about on a regular basis. And our current Congressman Scott Perry wants a national abortion ban.** That’s part of the reason I wanted to get involved in Janelle’s campaign. Janelle is a fighter: for women, for underprivileged communities, for all of us. I couldn’t be more proud to be in this fight with her.

But here’s the thing: Janelle is facing her big End-of-Quarter deadline, and meeting that deadline will be critical to her ability to defeat Scott Perry and his extremism. [Will you consider making a donation to Janelle’s campaign so that we can send her to Congress to fight for all of us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75911427/446092254/-398252547?source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_122023_1_2_EOQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdhZmY1NmEtZjBhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kVhVoWPT7Rw6lcOlu6ec3ZsrcvFC-uph_mMhqtCnCDk=)

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dec-eoq-23](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75911433/446092255/-398252547?source=SBD_JS_EM_FR_122023_1_2_EOQ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3MTMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjdhZmY1NmEtZjBhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kVhVoWPT7Rw6lcOlu6ec3ZsrcvFC-uph_mMhqtCnCDk=)

clean_body: Janelle Stelson has spent her career advocating for truth and integrity, and now she's running to unseat extremist Scott Perry and represent Pennsylvania's 10th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | | = Hi there, Let me introduce myself: My name is Audrey, and I’m one of Janelle Stelson’s Student Fellows! I wanted to write a short note about why Janelle’s campaign to represent PA-10 in Congress matters and why you should support her. Like so many women, I was devastated when I heard the news that Roe v. Wade had been overturned. I was in D.C. at the time and protested at the Supreme Court that day. I couldn’t believe that a right that the women before me fought so hard for was just taken away right before our very eyes. As a young woman with my whole future ahead of me, reproductive freedom is an issue that my friends and I worry about on a regular basis. And our current Congressman Scott Perry wants a national abortion ban. That’s part of the reason I wanted to get involved in Janelle’s campaign. Janelle is a fighter: for women, for underprivileged communities, for all of us. I couldn’t be more proud to be in this fight with her. But here’s the thing: Janelle is facing her big End-of-Quarter deadline, and meeting that deadline will be critical to her ability to defeat Scott Perry and his extremism. = = It matters, Audrey Campaign Fellow Janelle Stelson for Congress | | | ---|---|--- = Janelle Stelson has been speaking directly to the people of Central Pennsylvania for more than three decades as an Emmy-award-winning journalist. Now, Janelle is taking on Scott Perry and fighting for what we deserve — good-paying jobs to support our families, abortion rights, the highest quality healthcare and education, and someone we know we can trust. Janelle needs your support to unseat MAGA extremist Scott Perry and flip Pennsylvania's 10th District blue.** | = = Paid for by Friends of Janelle Stelson Friends of Janelle Stelson P.O. clean_body: We're emailing our strongest supporters ahead of our deadline. | Peter, We're just days away from our end-of-year fundraising deadline. We set a goal to raise $15,000 to ensure we can hit the ground running in January to defend Matt's seat and retake the House majority. Time is quickly running out to reach our goal. We're combing through our records and emailing our strongest supporters (that's you!) to see if they can help push us over the finish line before the ball drops on December 31. Here's what we have on file: | 2023 Supporter Record for dpwillis67@gmail.com: 2023 Donor Status: Non-Donor Suggested Donation: $10 According to our records, you haven't yet made a donation in 2023. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- If you've recently donated at an event or with a different email address, thank you! Your online record may not be up to date, but don't worry – we've received your donation and will update our records accordingly. Control of the House majority could come down to what happens here in PA-08 and Matt has another tough race ahead of him. Election experts are calling this race a "toss-up," and national Republicans are ready to spend whatever it takes to defeat Matt. We need to ensure we have the resources to take on whatever comes our way – but we can't do it without your help. = Thank you, Team Cartwright Last year, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. Rush a donation right away to help Matt protect his seat. | = | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Twitter" | Paid for by Cartwright for Congress | Cartwright For Congress PO Box 414 Scranton, PA 18501 United States Click here to from the Cartwright for Congress.

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: The most important race in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress
body:
The most important race happening in 2024 isn't just the race for the White House. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/tTBUZwcBH_2q13Ow12s-jc-9PHkp7BkSZ-MbOY7TNqbHMZZ7e6z8fxUUbQYxgrxk6a2v4Aw9Ux80o37VicMJ_2RUROn59OUiTeeVHLXdV7VQ6UP0B003zvnUXl-_g03dPiE8wu75-KffAPs7KeGUcO25NTp7yWsXwt3U7EzrPGN54KTdV8eu3ThPufvIHEuQI3HnHnOqSFl0791_E4BXdNjOrtxyeiYkXxBqlCuT4ax7grMxLkZXVXfRWwvvifs8/42h/Nrs8HPq-QgGZ5iE8xVY_6A/h0/hxXnA4q88a3_SsxXyeqKcU1JFjDOasqkj6o9GWRByJI)

Peter, the most important race happening in 2024 isn't just the race for the White House. It's the race for Senate control.
The future of everything we care about – from health care and voting rights to abortion rights – will depend on who holds the Senate majority after the election. That's why I'm writing to you today. With the retirement of Sen. Joe Manchin, we could hold every single seat we have and still lose Senate control. **That's why it's so imperative that we help Colin Allred defeat Ted Cruz in Texas.** Polls are showing these two neck and neck, and Ted Cruz is the most vulnerable GOP senator in the country. We can win this race, but the GOP knows it too – they're preparing to pour millions of dollars into Texas to lie about Colin's record and try to stop us. **Peter, if we can match the GOP's millions, we can win in Texas and virtually guarantee our Senate majority. But if Colin misses his fundraising goals, we'll lose the best chance we have to secure Senate control.[Please, I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $22 or more between Colin Allred and Michelle Vallejo for TX-15 to help Colin defeat Ted Cruz and protect our Democratic Senate majority?! name: Mark Kelly
subject: Bob’s race is mission-critical
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
_It’s Mark Kelly. Before I get into it, Bob has an important FEC deadline coming up. With all eyes on this race, it’s mission-critical that he meets his goal._[**_I hope you’ll make a donation to Bob’s campaign today so he can continue to deliver for Pennsylvanians in the Senate._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-2?refcode=em20231227-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1517_552475_BkYA0H&akid=1517%2E552475%2EBkYA0H)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-2?refcode=em20231227-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1517_552475_BkYA0H&akid=1517%2E552475%2EBkYA0H)**
* * *
Hey Peter, it’s Mark Kelly.
I’m reaching out on behalf of my friend Bob Casey. He’s running in one of _the most_ competitive and expensive Senate races of 2024, and he needs our help.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20231227-2&refcode2=1517_552475_BkYA0H&akid=1517%2E552475%2EBkYA0H)
Here’s the deal: With an open seat in West Virginia, Mitch McConnell would only have to flip ONE other seat to take back the gavel, meaning **this race will very likely determine the Senate majority.**
To make matters worse, Bob is up against an anti-choice extremist who has unlimited resources to fund his own campaign... _and_ he has the full force of the GOP establishment behind him.
That’s why I’m reaching out today. I know what it takes to win battleground races like this one, and that’s your support. It was because of people like you, Peter, chipping in when you could that I won my election in Arizona in 2020 and again in 2022.
Now, as we fight to keep Pennsylvania blue in 2024, I’m personally asking for you to step up and help re-elect Bob. [**Will you chip in $5 or $7.50 to help power Bob Casey’s campaign to victory? Any amount will go a long way in the fight to protect our Democratic Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-2?refcode=em20231227-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1517_552475_BkYA0H&akid=1517%2E552475%2EBkYA0H)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20231227-2-el&refcode2=1517_552475_BkYA0H&akid=1517%2E552475%2EBkYA0H) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20231227-2-el&refcode2=1517_552475_BkYA0H&akid=1517%2E552475%2EBkYA0H) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20231227-2-el&refcode2=1517_552475_BkYA0H&akid=1517%2E552475%2EBkYA0H) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20231227-2-el&refcode2=1517_552475_BkYA0H&akid=1517%2E552475%2EBkYA0H) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20231227-2-el&refcode2=1517_552475_BkYA0H&akid=1517%2E552475%2EBkYA0H) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20231227-2&refcode2=1517_552475_BkYA0H&akid=1517%2E552475%2EBkYA0H)

name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: The only candidate of either party to reject federal lobbyist cash in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=35477%2E3422442%2EfNhjxA)
Derek, Katie is the only candidate in this race who doesn't take a cent from federal lobbyists.
Now we’re financially behind another candidate in this race who has accepted these checks for decades. **[Can you chip in $5 before our end of quarter deadline to help us close the gap?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231227-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_COR_20231227_V1_F&refcode2=35477_3422442_fNhjxA&akid=35477%2E3422442%2EfNhjxA)**
2023’s federal lobbying spending is set to break records. Already, the first six months of 2023 saw $2.1 billion in spending, and more than 12,000 lobbyists registered with the federal government. The top spender was the pharmaceutical industry.
Katie always says, if lobbyists want to meet with her, they better bring their good ideas, not their checkbooks.
That means we run this campaign differently—Katie is one of just eleven members of the House to reject federal lobbyist money.
**[So, we really do count on people like you chipping in through emails like this one. Our end of quarter deadline is Sunday at midnight. Can you donate today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231227-2?refcode=EMAO23_2_COR_20231227_V1_F&refcode2=35477_3422442_fNhjxA&akid=35477%2E3422442%2EfNhjxA)**

Thanks so much!
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_2_COR_20231227_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=35477_3422442_fNhjxA&akid=35477%2E3422442%2EfNhjxA)**

name: Anna, Team Williams
subject: Taking back the House majority in 2024 isn’t a pipe dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Hey Peter,

Anna here, back with another critical update from Team Williams.

We’re wrapping up 2023 this week, but we’re also setting our sights on a MAJOR fundraising goal: **Raising $100,000 ahead of our FEC end-of-year deadline on December 31. Yeah, you read that right, we need to raise $100,000 by the end of the year to ensure we’re in the best possible position going into the election year.**

Taking back the House majority in 2024 isn’t a pipe dream; it’s a necessity. To make that happen, we need to flip 5 seats AND hold onto every **blue** district – **including TX-32.**

Peter, this is a very real deadline. I’m not exaggerating when I say we cannot afford to fall behind. The House needs leaders like Dr. Brian Williams, a seasoned trauma surgeon, veteran, and advocate for gun safety. He’s ready to take his expertise and dedication to Washington, but he can’t do it without your help.

We’re wrapping up 2023 this week, but we’re also setting our sights on a MAJOR fundraising goal: Raising $100,000 ahead of our FEC end-of-year deadline on December 31. Yeah, you read that right, we need to raise $100,000 by the end of the year to ensure we’re in the best possible position going into the election year. Peter, this is a very real deadline. I’m not exaggerating when I say we cannot afford to fall behind. Fellow Conservative,

**I’ll keep this brief:** if we don’t get our online fundraising on track today, we won’t hit our goal before Sunday’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.

We all knew November would be slow, with everyone enjoying their time with family for Thanksgiving, _**but it’s looking like December is on track to be even slower**_ , if you can believe that.

I’ve been told by folks who’ve run for office before that the Fourth Quarter is tough, but until you’re in the thick of it, it’s hard to know just how difficult it can be to reach supporters around the holidays.

I’m never one to back down from a challenge, so now I’m using what time we have left to **[plead for your help](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=24d09b9f82574a91947718479735a2c1&_e=xKQqJTZ0BK3iKPJ0dXDx71HzoBqLgdbZA-QWc51OTtlBD9LSpKoZd7LBle6E0isr4JuOEJP9Nl04-ltZLAY090azQMLzmys0VSbLwsdR58uxc11ttr99iC2yIAtq59tQ4GG3bp3-e9v8O0eXsI6hLI_w1O85bkkKD2cygx2_pQHF04N3JYy_ZTXnCDLR2xrhucM1c2i9PF8E_WU-FuxcPw-5BBElsL1sAoLbJwKkFnigq7F-m28OtLoHUvYEgEILEr8jK4RdTXHyRGSeyuM_Fe0xoXSna2-t4mfxqxp918YmSPDv4Bjwrm4HjGu9Tee0QFVmYGg5ZtLg6otGu64PtuRbcDP9mI6WEOyTQwApX4OSWuRWK9TiDPNjz9dRvZ_1y8PDloPCjDdsI61BFCjmsw%3D%3D)** ahead of the upcoming end-of-year fundraising deadline on December 31st.

I spoke with my finance director, and here is where things stand today:

_**We need to raise an additional $39,600 by Sunday.** I know we can do it._ But we need conservatives like you to step up and make gifts of **[$5, $50, or even $500](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=24d09b9f82574a91947718479735a2c1&_e=xKQqJTZ0BK3iKPJ0dXDx71HzoBqLgdbZA-QWc51OTtlBD9LSpKoZd7LBle6E0isr4JuOEJP9Nl04-ltZLAY090azQMLzmys0VSbLwsdR58uxc11ttr99iC2yIAtq59tQ4GG3bp3-e9v8O0eXsI6hLI_w1O85bkkKD2cygx2_pQHF04N3JYy_ZTXnCDLR2xrhucM1c2i9PF8E_WU-FuxcPw-5BBElsL1sAoLbJwKkFnhk5TrcLQZymstSSZ3U8B8vNNdsO8xiJAu9V-57MJMn3VHP1SDxOBmv5I0lDk52AjGZqG7YEtS-brI8VazcqrjDPZtEh-cHDfsl1TN59c_9GYSr2eM-x0YmcR0em49UcK_oCpU3g9vVGvhRroGL1ssfzzuWd5c3oth0J_TZBM1Q3w%3D%3D)** right now and every day for the next four days.

clean_body: My concern is growing. Please take a moment to step up right now. | | Fellow Conservative, I’ll keep this brief: if we don’t get our online fundraising on track today, we won’t hit our goal before Sunday’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. We all knew November would be slow, with everyone enjoying their time with family for Thanksgiving, but it’s looking like December is on track to be even slower , if you can believe that. I’ve been told by folks who’ve run for office before that the Fourth Quarter is tough, but until you’re in the thick of it, it’s hard to know just how difficult it can be to reach supporters around the holidays. I’m never one to back down from a challenge, so now I’m using what time we have left to ahead of the upcoming end-of-year fundraising deadline on December 31st. I spoke with my finance director, and here is where things stand today: We need to raise an additional $39,600 by Sunday. I know we can do it. But we need conservatives like you to step up and make gifts of right now and every day for the next four days. I’m asking for your help today because America’s future is on the line. Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

clean_body: The election in November 2024 may seem far away, but we need to hit the ground running early to build the foundation for a winning campaign. | = | | | FEC DEADLINE: SUNDAY @ MIDNIGHT = | = Peter, We wanted to take a moment to explain why your contribution today would mean so much to our campaign to elect Laura: 1. The election in November 2024 may seem far away, but we need to hit the ground running early to build the foundation for a winning campaign. 2. Laura’s Republican deep-pocketed opponent, Anthony D’Esposito, already has over $600,000 in his campaign war chest. We have to be prepared for the tough race ahead of us to flip this seat. 3. Our race is in the national spotlight, with political experts at Cook Political Report and Roll Call calling our race a ‘TOSS-UP.’ Your investment will help us build stronger momentum. We rely on generous contributions from grassroots supporters like you. = | = | = We are so grateful for your support, Team Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Why we’ve endorsed these candidates in MI, PA, and NV
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Hi team, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Nevada were three of the most competitive states nationwide in 2020. **In 2024, we can expect those states to be just as close, and Cook Political Report lists them as toss-ups, meaning we need to work hard to keep these states blue.** We have a real opportunity to build on our progress, which is why we want to take a moment to talk about 4 candidates we endorsed running in these states: Reps. **Hillary Scholten** (MI), **Susan Wild** (PA), **Chris Deluzio** (PA), and **Steven Horsford** (NV). **Control of Congress and the White House could hinge on the outcomes of these four races.[Will you split a contribution between these candidates and Fight Like Hell PAC today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75912610/446096222/1414143458?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE3NDQ3MTgtZjNhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XmMtWE3_nqEKDQW9knUc1jFkA6B99s6lQOuQIJHZcwE=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75912611/446096223/1414143458?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE3NDQ3MTgtZjNhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XmMtWE3_nqEKDQW9knUc1jFkA6B99s6lQOuQIJHZcwE=) **Rep. Hillary Scholten (MI-03)** is the first Democrat to represent Grand Rapids in 45 years and has made history as the first woman ever elected to this seat. Whether she’s working to make health care more affordable or fighting to reduce prices, Hillary will do whatever it takes to improve the lives of working families. We need her back in the House. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75912612/446096224/1414143458?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE3NDQ3MTgtZjNhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XmMtWE3_nqEKDQW9knUc1jFkA6B99s6lQOuQIJHZcwE=) **Rep. Susan Wild (PA-07)** is focused on making government work for Pennsylvanians. Her advocacy for justice and equality has made her a leader on issues like reproductive rights and a fair economy. But redistricting has made her district much more competitive, and she won re-election in 2022 by just 2 points after relentless attacks from the GOP. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75912613/446096225/1414143458?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE3NDQ3MTgtZjNhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XmMtWE3_nqEKDQW9knUc1jFkA6B99s6lQOuQIJHZcwE=) **Rep. Chris Deluzio (PA-17)** understands the importance of service. As an Iraq War veteran, he’s deeply committed to defending democracy against those who want to attack it by protecting voting rights and working to secure our elections. He ran for Congress to fight back against MAGA extremism, and he’s part of a new generation of leaders that we need to keep in the House. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75912614/446096226/1414143458?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE3NDQ3MTgtZjNhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XmMtWE3_nqEKDQW9knUc1jFkA6B99s6lQOuQIJHZcwE=) **Rep. Steven Horsford (NV-04)** has worked hard to improve the lives of Nevadans, fighting for affordable health care, lower prescription drug costs, good-paying jobs, and more, and is currently the chair of the Congressional Black Caucus. The GOP has named him as one of their top targets, and we need to make sure he has the resources to mobilize his supporters and win. **[Pennsylvania, Nevada, and Michigan will be three of the most competitive states in 2024. We’ll need all hands on deck to make sure these four fighters win reelection. Will you split a donation between Reps. Scholten, Wild, Deluzio, Horsford and Fight Like Hell PAC today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75912615/446096227/1414143458?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE3NDQ3MTgtZjNhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XmMtWE3_nqEKDQW9knUc1jFkA6B99s6lQOuQIJHZcwE=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75912617/446096229/1414143458?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE3NDQ3MTgtZjNhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XmMtWE3_nqEKDQW9knUc1jFkA6B99s6lQOuQIJHZcwE=)

clean_body: | Hi team, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Nevada were three of the most competitive states nationwide in 2020. In 2024, we can expect those states to be just as close, and Cook Political Report lists them as toss-ups, meaning we need to work hard to keep these states blue. We have a real opportunity to build on our progress, which is why we want to take a moment to talk about 4 candidates we endorsed running in these states: Reps. Hillary Scholten (MI), Susan Wild (PA), Chris Deluzio (PA), and Steven Horsford (NV). Control of Congress and the White House could hinge on the outcomes of these four races.= = Rep. Hillary Scholten (MI-03) is the first Democrat to represent Grand Rapids in 45 years and has made history as the first woman ever elected to this seat. Whether she’s working to make health care more affordable or fighting to reduce prices, Hillary will do whatever it takes to improve the lives of working families. We need her back in the House. = Rep. Susan Wild (PA-07) is focused on making government work for Pennsylvanians. Her advocacy for justice and equality has made her a leader on issues like reproductive rights and a fair economy. But redistricting has made her district much more competitive, and she won re-election in 2022 by just 2 points after relentless attacks from the GOP. = Rep. Chris Deluzio (PA-17) understands the importance of service. As an Iraq War veteran, he’s deeply committed to defending democracy against those who want to attack it by protecting voting rights and working to secure our elections. He ran for Congress to fight back against MAGA extremism, and he’s part of a new generation of leaders that we need to keep in the House. = Rep. Steven Horsford (NV-04) has worked hard to improve the lives of Nevadans, fighting for affordable health care, lower prescription drug costs, good-paying jobs, and more, and is currently the chair of the Congressional Black Caucus. The GOP has named him as one of their top targets, and we need to make sure he has the resources to mobilize his supporters and win. = | = Thank you, Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

clean_body: Thanks to YOU, we can continue fighting for the American Dream. | Peter, We are just days away from closing the books on 2023 and I need your help. Last quarter, generous donors like YOU gave an average gift of this amount to our grassroots campaign: Grassroots like you are the backbone of our campaign and are the reason we are able to keep fighting to defend the American Dream. Your generosity continues to help us combat the Left’s relentless multi-million-dollar attacks as they do everything to derail our campaign and BUY back the House majority. As the Left’s top target, we can’t afford to fall short of our FINAL fundraising goal of the year. That’s why I’m counting on the continued support of grassroots donors like YOU to be ready to defend this seat and the American Dream against the Left’s millions in 2024. The American Dream is the greatest threat to the radical Left’s agenda. That’s because it eliminates their power and control over YOU and shows you that anything is possible with hard work and perseverance. Just look at my experience. A first-generation immigrant, I grew up in a working-class family and was the first in my family to achieve a higher education which I paid for by working several jobs and earning scholarships. Now, I stand before you as a U.S. Congressman. But under Biden and the Left’s leadership, these types of opportunities are being erased as they do everything to make you reliant on them with their socialist policies. We can’t let them destroy the American Dream and the foundation this country was built on. With your help, I know we can defend this seat, END the Left’s radical agenda, and ensure the American Dream lives on for generations to come. Thank you, Rep. Juan Ciscomani Arizona’s 6th Congressional District PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Our goal these next four days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
In just four days, we’ll close the books on our quarterly fundraising and then submit a report to the FEC. After that, everyone will be able to see our fundraising numbers.
We need to raise $1.3 million for the quarter to prepare for what we know will be an extremely expensive race to keep Alexandria in Congress. In 2020, AOC’s opponent raised and spent more than $10 million.
[ Will you pitch in $5 – or any amount that is meaningful to you – to help us reach this critical goal by midnight on the 31st? Every donation will make a difference.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231227.fd_Msq&refcode=em20231227-5543-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5543%2E2526796%2EC7BvVw)
Alexandria is leading the fight for racial, social, economic, and environmental justice in Congress.
But she can’t do it alone. She needs this entire movement at her side to counter Republicans’ disinformation, defeat her Republican opponents, and continue to work for the progressive future we know we deserve.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231227.fd_Msq&refcode=em20231227-5543-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5543%2E2526796%2EC7BvVw)
[ Thank you so much for being a part of this campaign. If you’ve been waiting for the best time to make your first donation, this is it. Will you contribute $5 to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal by midnight on the 31st?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231227.fd_Msq&refcode=em20231227-5543-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5543%2E2526796%2EC7BvVw)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231227.fd_Msq&refcode=em20231227-5543-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=5543%2E2526796%2EC7BvVw)**
On behalf of Alexandria and our entire team: thank you.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4c68a446c1dc49ac82673aa7edcee7ab&_e=xUwRhtO_VGjqcWugh8RMJJbHUs7l7KDN9phP4DEehzyxPOHeFEet7-l5wFYanx4wrPXTwg-JzoegUgrLBoyQEX8k5NtP4NEYHBb3Ctf-xJ8JbFFjtAWNJC-t2jG9H-82Nhspu6DJjzPC-_er3hB-hKUI036o6MrYK-kMN1bC6oX_qYuB4AlaiC53mvSQ6zGYH3F_sTzxQd2x400gisHNrVQY-FrYEeiHf1gs0DmrP6OPniaHPLygs7n_v-Mc_zMvgN-kvaxcG4QDB01EdSaGMHB-jnHh-iLIsWMiYD5KT-dtSUjeEwOnbcBGH_qEyBR9FAXgHyDesCddplC5L9gh4Gg6hkg_vUDdMBUS7xsZ1J-QZ2bgxqb1Ww26_17Qa0pc1rJfaK4VWxzUlUDDOXkc6GgaoFlN2Q9tY6h20dgViaY%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4c68a446c1dc49ac82673aa7edcee7ab&_e=xUwRhtO_VGjqcWugh8RMJJbHUs7l7KDN9phP4DEehzyxPOHeFEet7-l5wFYanx4wrPXTwg-JzoegUgrLBoyQEX8k5NtP4NEYHBb3Ctf-xJ8JbFFjtAWNJC-t2jG9H-82Nhspu6DJjzPC-_er3hB-hKUI036o6MrYK-kMN1bC6oX_qYuB4AlaiC53mvSQ6zGYH3F_sTzxQd2x400gisHNrVQY-FrYEeiHf1gs0DmrP6OPniaHPLygs7n_v-Mc_zMvgN-kvaxcG4QDB01EdSaGMCBWwmUYazlw2s0TmYUdNlr56Hmd1jI0IZmDafeSVNnj69smbDlCCXy6ICf8tfsvNQVBEa7xvgdnySLid1piI-Enga2E5bi89s9gUp-rlANHzgADGbQh84Yr5uCx-i6TYfxOrgmk_-ki2vVRsseiU00%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4c68a446c1dc49ac82673aa7edcee7ab&_e=xUwRhtO_VGjqcWugh8RMJJbHUs7l7KDN9phP4DEehzyxPOHeFEet7-l5wFYanx4wrPXTwg-JzoegUgrLBoyQEX8k5NtP4NEYHBb3Ctf-xJ8JbFFjtAWNJC-t2jG9H-82Nhspu6DJjzPC-_er3hB-hKUI036o6MrYK-kMN1bC6oX_qYuB4AlaiC53mvSQ6zGYH3F_sTzxQd2x400gisHNrVQY-FrYEeiHf1gs0DmrP6OPniaHPLygs7n_v-Mc_zMvgN-kvaxcG4QDB01EdSaGMPoVY5aiRTO5RcWXwFCMEJvukuoiiS3U1g41GVoC6-HPbm-Kdl0fUeNjBGxDiAwFEdEGGyqnlQheRSbgDm6nNhWvqYKqGhx3k_NetkN7ZNEPWWHqLzZneGLasRLiwR5U2qA-EVIJdnDnpV_ZwRjbxcM%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---
**[](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4c68a446c1dc49ac82673aa7edcee7ab&_e=xUwRhtO_VGjqcWugh8RMJJbHUs7l7KDN9phP4DEehzyxPOHeFEet7-l5wFYanx4wrPXTwg-JzoegUgrLBoyQEX8k5NtP4NEYHBb3Ctf-xJ8JbFFjtAWNJC-t2jG9H-82Nhspu6DJjzPC-_er3hB-hKUI036o6MrYK-kMN1bC6oX_qYuB4AlaiC53mvSQ6zGYH3F_sTzxQd2x400gisHNrVQY-FrYEeiHf1gs0DmrP6OPniaHPLygs7n_v-Mc_zMvgN-kvaxcG4QDB01EdSaGMMNBAFTXdLInzLQBCTBj8c2Xh96pd4RcUC7HVpxilR7J_5Ok_ItLnWpnGoP7XvuqW-nYpmy2j3Wo25CJM-ok4X6W3ohXgXcE-_HaEtZ_M_SBwSq25jb7_KI2C7QsjAWbLX9pZxataO_hFMRDruvCAy0%3D)[**YES >>**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4c68a446c1dc49ac82673aa7edcee7ab&_e=xUwRhtO_VGjqcWugh8RMJJbHUs7l7KDN9phP4DEehzyxPOHeFEet7-l5wFYanx4wrPXTwg-JzoegUgrLBoyQEX8k5NtP4NEYHBb3Ctf-xJ8JbFFjtAWNJC-t2jG9H-82Nhspu6DJjzPC-_er3hB-hKUI036o6MrYK-kMN1bC6oX_qYuB4AlaiC53mvSQ6zGYH3F_sTzxQd2x400gisHNrVQY-FrYEeiHf1gs0DmrP6OPniaHPLygs7n_v-Mc_zMvgN-kvaxcG4QDB01EdSaGMMK0D2odHFC5whekUVgDlq6RQIiQCIyy11YIvWsPwwm-Q4PknRjYuGh562LeMH85elZGdwueSLzcBrbNDUVLDRIjEsWCYkQN5sF7_IkbNgOPuMCCXK2KranOUzFhVbhXprsJ6sRkTl1L29DRR0OLeHc%3D)_[**NO >>**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4c68a446c1dc49ac82673aa7edcee7ab&_e=xUwRhtO_VGjqcWugh8RMJJbHUs7l7KDN9phP4DEehzyxPOHeFEet7-l5wFYanx4wrPXTwg-JzoegUgrLBoyQEX8k5NtP4NEYHBb3Ctf-xJ8JbFFjtAWNJC-t2jG9H-82Nhspu6DJjzPC-_er3hB-hKUI036o6MrYK-kMN1bC6oX_qYuB4AlaiC53mvSQ6zGYH3F_sTzxQd2x400gisHNrVQY-FrYEeiHf1gs0DmrP6OPniaHPLygs7n_v-Mc_zMvgN-kvaxcG4QDB01EdSaGMJsFipFkf_BOVDUG-MyDGMhiSTWtUL0MKfBAv6K6mS9-IipU_aG5-8kZHSfa6k7AHopCBu7Fh3jETROzqRgJqpEGOJ-wShIpBSWq5lw_7WBD-C5gAE2rAf7jY6G-NY07b9Na9uzCsiAlnReMlYZbz8M%3D)**
---
Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. subject: OMG this is great
body:
| |
---
Jordan faceplanted on Fox News and epically embarrassed himself. | [View in browser](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDg3NDU5NTg2NDExMDgzODMsXCJyXCI6MTA4NzQ2MDAwNDIxNjE5MTI2fSIsInMiOiJiMGVjMTM2ODcwNzQ5Mjg3In0)

---
|
---
Friend,
When Jim Jordan popped off on what was supposed to be an easy Fox News interview, he came off sounding like he was attacking the Republicans’ Dear Leader, Donald Trump:
“When you do something that benefits your family financially and you’re a public official,” Jordan said, “that’s not supposed to happen.” _
__Whoops!_ [](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDg3NDU5NTg2NTc4ODU2MDMsXCJyXCI6MTA4NzQ2MDAwNDIxNjE5MTI2fSIsInMiOiJlN2M4N2Q5ZTBlMGU5ZDk0In0)
|
---
| [ ](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDg3NDU5NTg2NjYyNzQyMTIsXCJyXCI6MTA4NzQ2MDAwNDIxNjE5MTI2fSIsInMiOiJjNWU4NWQyYzk4OGRjMGRhIn0)
---
|
---
Let us count the corrupt GOP officials implicated in Jordan’s comment: Trump, Clarence Thomas, Oversight Committee Chairman James Comer (who seems to have done precisely what he baselessly accuses President Biden of doing: laundered large sums of money to a family member), and _perhaps Jim Jordan himself?_
__Political corruption must be dealt with: Congress should pass laws to ban Members of Congress and the President from trading stocks and should prevent future presidents from grifting the Secret Service and enriching themselves and their businesses at the taxpayers’ expense. **
****Jordan is right about one thing: we should hold Trump and everyone who got rich from his corruption accountable for their actions.**
****[**Jim Jordan is not a serious person, and cannot be trusted to do anything but benefit himself and his political cronies. Can you help Tamie defeat him by contributing whatever you can, $5, $10, $25, or more today before our end of quarter, end of year, deadline?**](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDg3NDU5NTg2NzU3MTEzOTcsXCJyXCI6MTA4NzQ2MDAwNDIxNjE5MTI2fSIsInMiOiI5NzEzNDFjZDM3MDBlYTNjIn0)[****](https://eqjdwl.clicks.mlsend.com/te/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjUwODYzOCxcImxcIjoxMDg3NDU5NTg2ODQxMDAwMDYsXCJyXCI6MTA4NzQ2MDAwNDIxNjE5MTI2fSIsInMiOiJlMDY0NTVjMzJkN2Q5ZWExIn0)

name: Katie Hill

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75913690/446099619/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOY_AC_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGUwOTAxNzgtZjZhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=N5NcKRkxuQ2A8rBSN0Uo52xBGAf4K-xwSmfjrv5COzQ=)
---
Peter, In just a moment, I’m going to ask if you can spare $1 to help fund our efforts to elect more women into Congress. **If you want, you can cut to the chase by donating your four quarters right here >>,** but here’s why it’s so important. Fundraising has really slowed down, we’re behind where we should be at this point in the year. $1 may not seem like a lot to you — especially compared to the billionaire mega donors and shady super PACs Republicans have in their corner — but we have the power of the grassroots on our side. $1 from every single person reading this email will add up quickly, and give us the kind of momentum we need to elect more women and take back the House majority in 2024. We already know that the more our government looks like us, the more it works for us. We need more women in positions of leadership in order to make sure our voices are heard, and that we have a seat at the table. name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68507b19d6d04e11abf105d6643a11b4&_e=r4to8ckdHKWFxoztIsZ-2xDczGZFtFSFlIyJjGI4L47lwUtIhNA0xpoDrKNmQsw_hFaPfC7eDAkSD84OrhnrINghduq8UY41rRnCPGSw5T0xWxhm8msxJgHBinKBebkPI1clNB_iyLL8CksYAzGLw9L8e1_uJG9SUurCGtYdionmG-7-aUnC4dqj8hpWP12YULhmC1cak5i6eyYBBzakqU6YdT5U8LuihLAB9erM2RzY1S3ha7te3_DDy6fJsHLUVndEEqz_UXsjxm-bt3SHQhJpWq7MXOWQuUABr9_w20vzC3VvXPZsMfkcGyvVCaF4Tyk8Ga_UqxSvHouFjPueui6IFkPfZDGELSgbfvVL0U549Us3JcMqZV_dTd4Q7Qr1x4nZuKBr7oxoWBFKpHiQgg%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it... Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights
Hides the corruption of the ruling class
Attacks those with traditional viewpoints **That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68507b19d6d04e11abf105d6643a11b4&_e=r4to8ckdHKWFxoztIsZ-2xDczGZFtFSFlIyJjGI4L47lwUtIhNA0xpoDrKNmQsw_hFaPfC7eDAkSD84OrhnrINghduq8UY41rRnCPGSw5T0xWxhm8msxJgHBinKBebkPI1clNB_iyLL8CksYAzGLw9L8e1_uJG9SUurCGtYdionmG-7-aUnC4dqj8hpWP12YULhmC1cak5i6eyYBBzakqU6YdT5U8LuihLAB9erM2Ry7lxoYe6IJgHTkBJX0xHZdzr5L2l39swXAupWjgy95OUfhmG__x4jsx7O80_kB9MevShqHgplohPufkgJG8CKq9oziOB8oPeB1X7bLsI4kddOXMUl1kYe2d-b_VKpluQ47OODOfLaCY3CW16sotMvge4cEUeMWcMtX0C383uwqsg%3D%3D)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include: **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution
**Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon
**Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics
**Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68507b19d6d04e11abf105d6643a11b4&_e=r4to8ckdHKWFxoztIsZ-2xDczGZFtFSFlIyJjGI4L47lwUtIhNA0xpoDrKNmQsw_hFaPfC7eDAkSD84OrhnrINghduq8UY41rRnCPGSw5T0xWxhm8msxJgHBinKBebkPI1clNB_iyLL8CksYAzGLw9L8e1_uJG9SUurCGtYdionmG-7-aUnC4dqj8hpWP12YULhmC1cak5i6eyYBBzakqU6YdT5U8LuihLAB9erM2RwHzKs6SdcN7BmA6c_Ki9qVtqrROyHUdHmhj2-vyJtv0jv-r02nsCXVp3t5dCrGMtOz8wENRwmjviUaqZgJ__fqYiPO48QMgjoXgGd1snTJXDJE7-R7SMTWZD6CfH1_z3OeEgSSIpYg6UEDdCpR04ij7lkaWZKJOZYLnvJ9nsL-Bg%3D%3D)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=68507b19d6d04e11abf105d6643a11b4&_t=7Na0aowpv-55WyJRGAWKxcActx-LH8OxGcFhxPRtNmnpYeDDLihNbhTZkRttDIMQrBUtW1oCsez7Fl0_hsTk6Q-3fAAFdMsNI4fvFVClmQ3O6Me2mVlQDgZ-vYSbLHSgJ-eUJMBJ7fFFgqYT0_oB8eflV5CHL59ShT1JmKSodac%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68507b19d6d04e11abf105d6643a11b4&_e=18Sf-XjDk2vLNyb7G9luEMHHC1Kd6oygR9FerxrHkxySG4fcZbV8aIA1NuzegAA0vszJqj3pgP_O3MAwIsfW4AaCCB_2Tb-jQnUmThkcefYAQLRDowaZ19kIUubOeOxBwc2jDn9a47I9wry4fP8IP06rBkyBfem_yUV8UvVFGZVr6v2z-Wx6jfGIBDzLOpWiWZd9OxSbMGba0f6cd8WAz0oZJ2RESl2ulrv66APtOHnwaFOrGFgOyLQBCAr-d7d_aTbBP8ncMmTmFjqmMFoG7g%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=68507b19d6d04e11abf105d6643a11b4&_e=r4to8ckdHKWFxoztIsZ-2xIZGIcG4Nms2mhtkC0RbCZiwaTFdzFDhvNwNUX5kSMuvi0qJgkDB697tpZzq4haIeNL5MYqUymx-cmI_HRZUHSeN0JD0iM4b7KWU35A18LFh2Bh270VrUXGVzs5ZxdDsL6T5jNP1L9y41vvzAiuAhYzAXHoWgIR5C6xjtD2PbwRsZerGR0KrsyuybwWd_LhCLqo1OEpNNOoGaUlIDq8MlA%3D)_

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: An important campaign update (please read)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
This may be the most important note I’ve ever sent you
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75914012/446100484/476240636?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.27_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjhiNzhiNjYtZjdhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jwf2B4CBen2GR46nZm20-XUfmxN56W-g0wu4DiMq1lU=)
Hi everyone – It’s Janelle! I hope you all had a wonderful holiday.

Now that the Christmas chaos has passed, I wanted to reach out with a really critical campaign update. **And I’ll be honest: This may be the most important note I’ve ever sent you.**

**[This Sunday at midnight, our campaign will be facing our final FEC end-of-quarter deadline of 2023.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75914013/446100485/476240636?refcode=em_fr_2023.12.27_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjhiNzhiNjYtZjdhNC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Jwf2B4CBen2GR46nZm20-XUfmxN56W-g0wu4DiMq1lU=) **As you may remember from September, this means we’re **legally required to publicize our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission for the general public to see.**

body:
Derek, will you join me in supporting his reelection?

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75914060/446100638/-1807168276?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=231227_zb_eoq2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDFiNzljZS1mN2E0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2mmiRXdhPm2YZMCqVJ9LvxmSpfwFrk5fGDs6n-a6cw=)
