Hi Derek, I'm Zoe Bunnell, and my husband Chris Deluzio is running for reelection in Pennsylvania's 17th Congressional District. Chris gave me your contact info so I could reach out to you about something important to me and our family. Chris has been fighting for the Common Good since I met him over a decade ago, Derek. He's a veteran, a union organizer, an amazing father to our kids, and a fighter for our family and our community. Service has been, and always will be, his top priority in all aspects of life. I’ve seen firsthand over the last year just how hard Chris has worked to serve the people of Western Pennsylvania, and how grateful he is to have the opportunity to do so. Unfortunately, right-wing extremists and dark money organizations have put a target on his back, naming our race as one they hope to flip red in 2024. Chris is up against a Republican Party that desperately wants to keep its House majority – even if that means sacrificing the needs of families across Western PA. [**Chris needs your help in this race so he can keep fighting to protect the Common Good in Western PA. Will you join me on Team Deluzio and commit to chipping in today to support his reelection campaign for PA-17?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75914061/446100639/-1807168276?refcode=231227_zb_eoq2_l1&ms=231227_zb_eoq2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDFiNzljZS1mN2E0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2mmiRXdhPm2YZMCqVJ9LvxmSpfwFrk5fGDs6n-a6cw=) **[Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75914062/446100640/-1807168276?refcode=231227_zb_eoq2_b1&ms=231227_zb_eoq2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDFiNzljZS1mN2E0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2mmiRXdhPm2YZMCqVJ9LvxmSpfwFrk5fGDs6n-a6cw=)** Derek, your support means the world to me and my family. – Zoe Bunnell
| Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country.

name: Jessica Carter
subject: Yurok Tribe restores their ancestral redwood lands
body:
The transformation of the former Orick Mill Site

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75914065/446100645/-750918211?contactdata=4oXpt/m7Fh7GnEV2/tqI3mx8nJo8PAWbeB4YhoV8GugyaHaaPlHBi9rBqHkcOuIgstuqm6tAF8fnQGXqwsajI8dcbGAuYd1CjOcef1b2QbY14CDPsf7BhERysYhr13Uhnvn6VjANdaYwP6tXM9xX2Lb87/rM1NNFKU6UfMWJSGU=&&ms=Logo-Email-Link&sourceid=1164986&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzN2JhMWFlLWY3YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bpHQxpmuX6mHQU9RN4DxBAdlbiaBneGD-v45-tqQo3g=&emci=a0413b3d-2e99-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=637ba1ae-f7a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1504551)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75914066/446100646/-750918211?contactdata=4oXpt/m7Fh7GnEV2/tqI3mx8nJo8PAWbeB4YhoV8GugyaHaaPlHBi9rBqHkcOuIgstuqm6tAF8fnQGXqwsajI8dcbGAuYd1CjOcef1b2QbY14CDPsf7BhERysYhr13Uhnvn6VjANdaYwP6tXM9xX2Lb87/rM1NNFKU6UfMWJSGU=&ms=Logo-Email-Link&sourceid=1164986&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzN2JhMWFlLWY3YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bpHQxpmuX6mHQU9RN4DxBAdlbiaBneGD-v45-tqQo3g=&emci=a0413b3d-2e99-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=637ba1ae-f7a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1504551)
Peter, an incredible story is unfolding on Yurok ancestral lands in the heart of Redwood National and State Parks.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75914067/446100647/-750918211?contactdata=4oXpt/m7Fh7GnEV2/tqI3mx8nJo8PAWbeB4YhoV8GugyaHaaPlHBi9rBqHkcOuIgstuqm6tAF8fnQGXqwsajI8dcbGAuYd1CjOcef1b2QbY14CDPsf7BhERysYhr13Uhnvn6VjANdaYwP6tXM9xX2Lb87/rM1NNFKU6UfMWJSGU=&ms=YE23-Em5-Photo&sourceid=1164986&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzN2JhMWFlLWY3YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bpHQxpmuX6mHQU9RN4DxBAdlbiaBneGD-v45-tqQo3g=&emci=a0413b3d-2e99-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=637ba1ae-f7a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1504551)
The League and our partners, including the Yurok Tribe, are transforming the former Orick Mill Site into a stunning visitor gateway to some of the world’s most famous old-growth groves.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75914068/446100648/-750918211?contactdata=4oXpt/m7Fh7GnEV2/tqI3mx8nJo8PAWbeB4YhoV8GugyaHaaPlHBi9rBqHkcOuIgstuqm6tAF8fnQGXqwsajI8dcbGAuYd1CjOcef1b2QbY14CDPsf7BhERysYhr13Uhnvn6VjANdaYwP6tXM9xX2Lb87/rM1NNFKU6UfMWJSGU=&ms=YE23-Em5-Photo&sourceid=1164986&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzN2JhMWFlLWY3YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bpHQxpmuX6mHQU9RN4DxBAdlbiaBneGD-v45-tqQo3g=&emci=a0413b3d-2e99-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=637ba1ae-f7a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1504551)
[ GIVE TODAY: All Gifts Matched ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75914069/446100649/-750918211?contactdata=4oXpt/m7Fh7GnEV2/tqI3mx8nJo8PAWbeB4YhoV8GugyaHaaPlHBi9rBqHkcOuIgstuqm6tAF8fnQGXqwsajI8dcbGAuYd1CjOcef1b2QbY14CDPsf7BhERysYhr13Uhnvn6VjANdaYwP6tXM9xX2Lb87/rM1NNFKU6UfMWJSGU=&ms=YE23-Em5-Button1&sourceid=1164986&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzN2JhMWFlLWY3YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bpHQxpmuX6mHQU9RN4DxBAdlbiaBneGD-v45-tqQo3g=&emci=a0413b3d-2e99-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=637ba1ae-f7a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1504551)
Gone are acres of asphalt from the old-growth timber mill era. They’ve been removed by Yurok Tribe crews working in their traditional lands to restore a once-degraded section of Prairie Creek and improve critical habitat for imperiled salmon.
Over time, we’ll see the natural world reclaim this space, a healthy creek teeming with fish and amphibians, a vibrant floodplain with sustainable native plant communities, and wildlife building their homes where asphalt once covered the ground.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75914070/446100650/-750918211?contactdata=4oXpt/m7Fh7GnEV2/tqI3mx8nJo8PAWbeB4YhoV8GugyaHaaPlHBi9rBqHkcOuIgstuqm6tAF8fnQGXqwsajI8dcbGAuYd1CjOcef1b2QbY14CDPsf7BhERysYhr13Uhnvn6VjANdaYwP6tXM9xX2Lb87/rM1NNFKU6UfMWJSGU=&ms=YE23-Em5-Photo&sourceid=1164986&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzN2JhMWFlLWY3YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bpHQxpmuX6mHQU9RN4DxBAdlbiaBneGD-v45-tqQo3g=&emci=a0413b3d-2e99-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=637ba1ae-f7a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1504551)
The new gateway will also welcome visitors and local communities back to this site, featuring an array of amenities and interpretive experiences, a traditional Yurok site, and accessible trails connecting visitors to our most storied redwood parks.
[**Your support for the League makes transformations like this possible.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75914071/446100651/-750918211?contactdata=4oXpt/m7Fh7GnEV2/tqI3mx8nJo8PAWbeB4YhoV8GugyaHaaPlHBi9rBqHkcOuIgstuqm6tAF8fnQGXqwsajI8dcbGAuYd1CjOcef1b2QbY14CDPsf7BhERysYhr13Uhnvn6VjANdaYwP6tXM9xX2Lb87/rM1NNFKU6UfMWJSGU=&ms=YE23-Em5-Link1&sourceid=1164986&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzN2JhMWFlLWY3YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bpHQxpmuX6mHQU9RN4DxBAdlbiaBneGD-v45-tqQo3g=&emci=a0413b3d-2e99-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=637ba1ae-f7a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1504551) Right now, Ken and Michelle Burkus are **DOUBLING all gifts to the Redwood Land Fund** up to $250,000 in memory of John Arthur Burkus.
[ Make 2x the Impact for healing Redwood Forests ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75914072/446100652/-750918211?contactdata=4oXpt/m7Fh7GnEV2/tqI3mx8nJo8PAWbeB4YhoV8GugyaHaaPlHBi9rBqHkcOuIgstuqm6tAF8fnQGXqwsajI8dcbGAuYd1CjOcef1b2QbY14CDPsf7BhERysYhr13Uhnvn6VjANdaYwP6tXM9xX2Lb87/rM1NNFKU6UfMWJSGU=&ms=YE23-Em5-Button2&sourceid=1164986&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYzN2JhMWFlLWY3YTQtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=bpHQxpmuX6mHQU9RN4DxBAdlbiaBneGD-v45-tqQo3g=&emci=a0413b3d-2e99-ee11-8925-002248223cbb&emdi=637ba1ae-f7a4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=1504551)
There’s nothing better than seeing the look on someone’s face when they visit the redwoods for the first time. Your gift will help the League and our partners create more welcoming, engaging, and inclusive redwoods experiences, like this one at the former Orick Mill Site.
We must be ready to respond to critical opportunities to increase the acreage of protected redwoods in order to create and expand the special places where people and nature thrive.
By making a gift to the League’s Redwood Land Fund, you can drive these efforts to ensure we purchase, protect, restore and connect people to the remaining unprotected coast redwood and giant sequoia properties.
Your matched gift will create beloved places for future generations to visit and treasure.
Thank you for investing in forest transformations.
| Jessica Carter
Director of Parks and Public Engagement

clean_body: The transformation of the former Orick Mill Site Peter, an incredible story is unfolding on Yurok ancestral lands in the heart of Redwood National and State Parks. The League and our partners, including the Yurok Tribe, are transforming the former Orick Mill Site into a stunning visitor gateway to some of the world’s most famous old-growth groves. Gone are acres of asphalt from the old-growth timber mill era. They’ve been removed by Yurok Tribe crews working in their traditional lands to restore a once-degraded section of Prairie Creek and improve critical habitat for imperiled salmon. Over time, we’ll see the natural world reclaim this space, a healthy creek teeming with fish and amphibians, a vibrant floodplain with sustainable native plant communities, and wildlife building their homes where asphalt once covered the ground. The new gateway will also welcome visitors and local communities back to this site, featuring an array of amenities and interpretive experiences, a traditional Yurok site, and accessible trails connecting visitors to our most storied redwood parks. Right now, Ken and Michelle Burkus are DOUBLING all gifts to the Redwood Land Fund up to $250,000 in memory of John Arthur Burkus. There’s nothing better than seeing the look on someone’s face when they visit the redwoods for the first time. Your gift will help the League and our partners create more welcoming, engaging, and inclusive redwoods experiences, like this one at the former Orick Mill Site. We must be ready to respond to critical opportunities to increase the acreage of protected redwoods in order to create and expand the special places where people and nature thrive. By making a gift to the League’s Redwood Land Fund, you can drive these efforts to ensure we purchase, protect, restore and connect people to the remaining unprotected coast redwood and giant sequoia properties. Your matched gift will create beloved places for future generations to visit and treasure. Thank you for investing in forest transformations. | Jessica Carter Director of Parks and Public Engagement ---|--- * | | | | ---|---|---|--- Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States tel:415-362-2352 | |

I’m proud to be one of the youngest women ever elected to state government and represent my neighbors in Virginia’s House of Delegates.
Now, I’m running for Congress because Virginians deserve someone who will fight for what’s right, who knows how hard it is to make ends meet, and who won’t let Congress take away our freedom to make decisions about our own bodies.
But I can’t get to Congress without you. Virginia’s 7th District has been home to some of the most competitive and expensive elections in recent years, and you can bet everyone is watching to see if we have what it takes to win in 2024.
[_**If you’re able, will you chip in $5 to my campaign today? **Now, this fundraising deadline goes beyond just ensuring that we have the resources necessary to win here in 2025.

Your donation will:** **✅ **Send a powerful message across the country that we have grassroots support on our side.

**✅ **Build a strong foundation for our campaign and send a strong message that Democrats are fired up to defeat Republican extremism in Virginia and across the country.

name: Team Pramila
subject: Good or bad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Today marks the start of our end-of-the-year fundraising push before the clock strikes midnight on December 31.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20231227-3324-footer&t=1&akid=3324%2E420207%2ENnpw8z)
Peter,
Today marks the start of our end-of-the-year fundraising push to raise $25,725 before the clock strikes midnight on December 31.
Not only is this our final fundraising deadline of the year, it’s also our final chance to boost our fundraising numbers before the FEC publishes our fundraising efforts for all to see.
That means everyone — _from our own supporter base to our opposition_ — will get to weigh in on our campaign’s progress and make judgments, **good or bad** , about where we’ll land in 2024.
This work wouldn’t be possible without you, Peter, and we won’t be able to maintain this momentum in 2024 without your support now. [**If you are able, please consider rushing a donation of $5, $10, $15, or anything you’re able to contribute to help kick off our end-of-year fundraising efforts today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20231227.E1wbuG&refcode=em20231227-3324&t=4&akid=3324%2E420207%2ENnpw8z)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20231227.E1wbuG&refcode=em20231227-3324&t=23&akid=3324%2E420207%2ENnpw8z)**
Throughout the week, we’ll keep you well up to date on our progress. Thank you for believing in the work that we’re doing together.
Let’s do this,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231227-3324-footer&t=24&refcode2=3324_420207_Nnpw8z&akid=3324%2E420207%2ENnpw8z)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Becca Balint
subject: Running for Congress is a massive undertaking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont

body:
We’ve seen incredible energy across New Jersey, and our campaign has the momentum.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75914807/446103243/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmQwM2NlNS1mYWE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uV9lPhEgNOyAxBt2Y6xIb5DO9ABk1v4GBmrjxSCvw3Q=&emci=e2dafab1-17a0-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=c6d03ce5-faa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=26261389)

| | We've seen incredible energy across New Jersey, and our campaign has momentum. People are stepping up across the state and supporting Andy's historic campaign. It's going to take all of us to win this competitive race. We're up against well-connected, wealthy opponents, but we have a strong grassroots team that will propel us to victory.

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Abortion rights are once again under threat. I need your help, Peter.
body:
|
#
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75915012/446104057/-1463570009?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTJkN2Q3My1mYmE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZajtasEfJCgGaxxaJUHl87e3WZGTqcf1e4R7bML-1U=&emci=eb061402-dfa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=252d7d73-fba4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=23190490) Peter, Earlier this year, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas reversed access to a safe, at-home abortion pill, mifepristone, after anti-abortion activists brought the case to his courtroom in an attempt to ban access to the medication nationwide. The Supreme Court initially blocked the decision while it faced appeals in lower courts, but now, the Court has announced that they will review the case — potentially placing access to medication abortion in grave danger. **Remember, this is the same ideologically-motivated Court that overturned**** _Roe v. Wade_****, so I don’t trust for a second that they will stand up in defense of our reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy. ** [**That’s why I’m asking if you will add your name to my petition and join me in demanding that the Senate pass the**** _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_****immediately.****Peter, will you sign on and help me ensure right-wing judges can’t take away our freedoms?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75915013/446104058/-1463570009?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTJkN2Q3My1mYmE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZajtasEfJCgGaxxaJUHl87e3WZGTqcf1e4R7bML-1U=&emci=eb061402-dfa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=252d7d73-fba4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=23190490) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75915014/446104059/-1463570009?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTJkN2Q3My1mYmE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZajtasEfJCgGaxxaJUHl87e3WZGTqcf1e4R7bML-1U=&emci=eb061402-dfa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=252d7d73-fba4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=23190490)
---
I’ve said since the beginning that this isn’t about “conservative values” or “states’ rights” — it’s about exerting power and control over women’s bodies and freedoms with complete impunity.
Nearly 50% of people seeking abortion care across the country rely on mifepristone, and we are in this position because anti-choice activists intentionally brought their case to the courtroom of Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk — who has long demonstrated deep skepticism about reproductive freedom — to ensure he’d decide it. They played the long game, knowing that this would likely find its way to the same Supreme Court majority that eviscerated reproductive freedom just last year.
[**That’s why I am fighting to pass the**** _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_****, but I need your help to show the obstructionist GOP that I have a team standing behind me. So please, add your name in support of the**** _Protecting Access to Medication Abortion Act_****today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75915015/446104060/-1463570009?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTJkN2Q3My1mYmE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZajtasEfJCgGaxxaJUHl87e3WZGTqcf1e4R7bML-1U=&emci=eb061402-dfa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=252d7d73-fba4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=23190490)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75915016/446104061/-1463570009?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTJkN2Q3My1mYmE0LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZajtasEfJCgGaxxaJUHl87e3WZGTqcf1e4R7bML-1U=&emci=eb061402-dfa4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=252d7d73-fba4-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=23190490)
---
No matter what happens next, I won’t stop fighting for our reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy. Thank you for standing up and making your voice heard with me today.
— Mazie

Friends of Mazie Hirono

clean_body: | Peter, Earlier this year, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas reversed access to a safe, at-home abortion pill, mifepristone, after anti-abortion activists brought the case to his courtroom in an attempt to ban access to the medication nationwide. The Supreme Court initially blocked the decision while it faced appeals in lower courts, but now, the Court has announced that they will review the case — potentially placing access to medication abortion in grave danger. Remember, this is the same ideologically-motivated Court that overturned Roe v. Wade, so I don’t trust for a second that they will stand up in defense of our reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy. | | I’ve said since the beginning that this isn’t about “conservative values” or “states’ rights” — it’s about exerting power and control over women’s bodies and freedoms with complete impunity. Nearly 50% of people seeking abortion care across the country rely on mifepristone, and we are in this position because anti-choice activists intentionally brought their case to the courtroom of Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk — who has long demonstrated deep skepticism about reproductive freedom — to ensure he’d decide it. They played the long game, knowing that this would likely find its way to the same Supreme Court majority that eviscerated reproductive freedom just last year. | No matter what happens next, I won’t stop fighting for our reproductive freedom and bodily autonomy. Thank you for standing up and making your voice heard with me today. — Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

name: Michigan Legacy PAC Team
subject: Jocelyn's powerful message
body:
Friend,

In case you missed it, Jocelyn was on All In with Chris Hayes to talk about the latest revelations in Trump's attempt to overturn Michigan's elections in 2020. It's worth a watch:

https://www.msnbc.com/all-in/watch/trump-rnc-chair-caught-on-tape-meddling-in-michigan-2020-vote-report-says-200842821624

Happy holidays and thank you for all that you do for democracy.

-Jocelyn, Lonnie, and the Michigan Legacy PAC Team

Here's Jocelyn's message from the weekend, in case you didn't get a chance to read it:

Friend,

I'm sure you're following the Detroit News report about just how much pressure Donald Trump was exerting on Wayne County's board of canvassers. It is clear the Trump team had a plan in every key state. This was not a random coincidence - it was a strategy to overturn the election. And Michigan was a key part of this strategy.

Remember that in 2020, Michigan was first among the battlegrounds to go in the certification calendar. Had Trump succeeded in delaying or preventing a county or statewide certification in Michigan, that precedent would have been used to delay or block certification in Pennsylvania (which was certifying the following week), Georgia and so on, paving the way for the false slate of electors. We knew we were the first domino to go and that what Michigan did would impact the others.

But rather than rehash the details of the rest of the article - which you should read in its entirety if you haven't - I want to take you back to the night of that meeting from my perspective. For me, the absolute lowest moment in the post election battle we endured to protect Michigan’s accurate and legitimate election results in 2020 was not when armed protestors stormed my home. It was the night of the Wayne County Board of Canvassers meeting.

I distinctly remember coming home that evening feeling completely defeated. We knew about the pressure not to certify (though until last night, I did not know about the recording). We were prepared to go to court to successfully ensure certification at the local and state level - and we were confident we’d win in court. But blocking certification in Wayne County and pushing this to the courts would still delay and create enough doubt and uncertainty to enable the Trump campaign to push Pennsylvania, which was certifying the next week, to delay as well. And we knew other dominos would fall after that. How could we overcome the pressure of the then-President of the United States on local and state officials? Were the facts and law not enough?

Well, then something I’ll never forget happened. Hundreds - hundreds (!) - of citizens showed up to the meeting of the Wayne County Canvassing Board to remind them of their duty under the law to ensure their votes counted. Their voices mattered. Their votes mattered. In my view, that turned the tide. Citizens and election officials in Wayne County and statewide didn’t flinch, stood firm, and demanded their votes be certified as required under the law. And in the end, the Wayne County Canvassing board fulfilled their legal duty, followed the law and certified the election. What started as the lowest moment of the post election melee became the most inspiring. The voters won. Facts and the rule of law carried the day. Democracy prevailed.

That pressure campaign was part of a coordinated strategy to overturn the election. Everything that has happened in the three years since is telling us Trump will try again. They are building the apparatus to exert pressure and challenge results in every way you can think of. We have to be ready.

We learned our lessons from 2020. Our successes in 2022 were clear proof that we have a movement and a plan, too -- one to make sure every citizen's voice is heard and every vote is counted. With 2024 around the corner, our movement of Democracy Defenders has never been more important. We need to be on the alert in every precinct and every district across the state. Our goal with the Michigan Legacy PAC is to build on our successes in 2020 and 2022 and empower everyone doing the hard work on the front lines to defend our democracy -- and ensure that an attempt like Trump's in 2020 can never again come close to succeeding.

Before the end of the year, I'm asking you to make a contribution to help further our efforts. Now more than ever, our democracy needs your support. Can we count on you? https://secure.actblue.com/donate/michiganlegacypac?refcode=Em122423

I'm thankful for all that you do for democracy. I hope you and your family have a happy holiday season.

-Jocelyn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe, please click here: unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/fqSK2PQg_UCkKErG0V0_Ew2?unsubscribedata=Y2hmTInu9h2QYolDoY2IKcFnuc1evLu8UU7MhDrlAq4hIW0%2BsHpDxlH3IK7uUC5a8DN8CrB6D7EiwzQcprhnMkV0qckeIyb5hJFxBdtxNh8zbHQE4IP5il%2BX27pkzS%2BMvHrsFrxfRuvxsDOOtq4ZDJCGFufyUE%2BH7WfCfiFJKmKqFPbdHTIpi%2FyasuAu3S7%2B23sFPepcmVhIbNmkw%2F88wsLTAoeIFSb7az3HiOnL8%2FtCSs86QfdAJvjSssodT52cKYRXMrRPk6Kb0SuKbgvECDcZ211lRMIV62XzdgT2EKKulkMfdpp2Iuhci6HvtdTmCKEIf82gyn%2FQ4O3%2B2wUY9csgPmkCJ5n8YMYgINJD%2BHR78sko7vV1dYPks4oCsH1zgbxoM4ttMsjx4OYabQ3ouz8H9r3bSPIoO3%2B%2BSuj9u4c%3D
PAID FOR WITH REGULATED FUNDS BY MICHIGAN LEGACY PAC. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE.
PO Box 21910, Detroit MI 48221.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6DwxJvjE_Yw2o50eIVZHbw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbzuEP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04tMjAyMzEyMjdXA3NwY0IKZYM6k4xl7uXfkVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6DwxJvjE_Yw2o50eIVZHbw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbzuEP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04tMjAyMzEyMjdXA3NwY0IKZYM6k4xl7uXfkVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6DwxJvjE_Yw2o50eIVZHbw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnbzuEP0SVaHR0cHM6Ly9wdHYub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8yMDI0LXBhdGh3YXktdG8tdmljdG9yeS1kYWlseS1kZXZvdGlvbmFsLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWVveSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04tMjAyMzEyMjdXA3NwY0IKZYM6k4xl7uXfkVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

subject: Our greatest test yet

body:
*This* is how our movement will be judged... | | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=64c4bc25b3a94741873e0a30fd1c25fe&_e=JuJR8V4oOKJ9x5en-TLSOXyKXb7MT1355f-J-bC-Bb4kvMiLHjEwOIo-rEW8121laBayVcJinJvXQal0BAP6vv4v_ggClwX8zCrrULv_d2ysbPwc3_Qwl2poa7ua6C1lqbAoDi2XWe3Za62l7x_nxlBchOo7H9ANZPBCGAuhXuWZ4DHMockrjr7mlslzMAzc4UT_z4GuJjPVX80_gDofL7vRg6UO2ZBpg2yfWx5mkMb9unbK9UCBYRIVJqivu7yvua413clsDq2GPHpkBKjXDRYomBCjkL9MPQA94isnMVrLJ-iVaYzeFV-1cnjMvuPk5Wv-M86K03ihnFwF33cvT_TcJZeHRUo4rHYVk15IUQh1zP_ZSegCShoM3nDa7hEtGqrVLtIT7veBGK_lPEcT_fzdR2i7EDULyj4Rv-FKtaLIHJOUDd3Sil86mDsLN8lWVmzzb2aUWT10tcjRkswR6cMYgh_0-5OsGQ_J1y-HpfZ3DoNv2YWHGRFceW0-YYWs)
---
| | Patriot,

---
After all the phony witch hunts, a mugshot, sham trials, threats of being jailed for life as an innocent man, and even being removed from the ballot, our movement __still__ has yet to face its greatest test.
---
**The ultimate sign of our resilience comes in just a few days’ time, when the Federal Election Commission MANDATES that we close our books on this dark year in American history...**
---
**_...And at that very moment, when we_** _**_OUTRAISE_**_** _Crooked Joe, we will PROVE that the greatest grassroots movement of all time truly is UNBREAKABLE!_**
---
Remember, Patriot, this campaign will never be judged by the amount our supporters give, but rather, by the sheer number of grassroots patriots who stand with us.
---
And with a movement as large and dedicated as ours, __even just $1__ alongside your fellow patriots could be the difference between SAVING our Free Republic and a lifetime of Third World Marxist tyranny.
---

body:
The people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years aren’t just the people who write the biggest checks.
#
Derek -
The people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years aren’t just the people who write the biggest checks.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Derek.

Your support, voice, and participation has helped us run some of the most powerful election ads out there and flipped races for Democrats.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. We’ve stopped more efforts to privatize the VA than we can count. Together we got Veterans the care they need through the PACT Act. And next, we’ll beat Trump one more time. For good.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. All that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation. There is no such thing as a small donation. Not in times like these when our work is so important.
We’ll put it right to work in the most important election cycle in modern American history — the one we’re in right now.
[**If helping VoteVets run some of the most effective election ads of the cycle, ads that win races seems worth $5 to you, we’re humbly asking you to make that donation before our end-of-quarter deadline on Sunday. We need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23.L4YfC7&refcode=em231227-1-30&t=1&akid=22746%2E3013755%2EjMDMHo)

| | Peter, Being a military spouse isn’t easy.

I stood by my husband Hung through constant moves, deployments, and injuries.

I had to answer “When is Dad coming home?” for my kids more times than I could count.

As a former Navy Captain, Hung is the kind of guy who likes to get things done on his own, and he certainly doesn’t like asking for help. I believe in Hung, not just as my husband, but as a leader and a patriot. He truly has dedicated his life to America. He served for 25 years in some of the most dangerous war zones in the world not knowing if he would come home. He faced countless injuries, setbacks, and challenges he never could have imagined. Everyone at Team Terán is putting in hard work – including you, Peter – and we want our fundraising numbers to reflect that. In these final five days of 2023, will you help our campaign end the year strong by chipping in $5? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_122723_5days&amount=5]

If we can count on your support monthly, it helps us plan ahead with more confidence. Want to donate $5 a month to our campaign? Click here right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_122723_5days&amount=5&recurring=1]

Muchas gracias,
DeAnna Alvarez

subject: "I like Elissa's forthright attitude, along with her policies."
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=961%2E135344%2EU17p5l)

Friends -
After people donate to Elissa's campaign, many write in with stories sharing a little bit about why they decided to contribute.
Today we wanted to share a few of those stories with you with the hope that they will inspire you to make your first online donation to Elissa.
_"I believe Elissa will represent me well in the Senate. She has in the House. American democracy needs dedicated, fair minded and clear thinking people who can negotiate in Congress."_ \- Elaine from Whitmore Lake, MI
_"The Senate race in Michigan is going to be very important in 2024 and it is vital that the Democrats keep it! I've held off until now but I will be donating more next year as things progress."_ \- Stephen from Saline, MI
_"Because I believe the Congresswoman is the best candidate to fill the Senate seat to be vacated by Sen. Stabenow in 2024. She'll come with a fresh pair of eyes and a younger, newer perspective, which will, of course, be in the best interests of the people of Michigan."_ \- Antoinette from Detroit, MI
_"I like Elissa's forthright attitude, along with her policies." -_ Dennis from Southfield, MI
[**Are you game, team? Join Elaine, Stephen, Antoinette, and Dennis by making a $3 contribution to Elissa's campaign for Senate today. The only way we'll keep Michigan blue is if we're in this together.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231227-2-tt&t=2&akid=961%2E135344%2EU17p5l)**

Everyone has their own reasons for supporting this campaign. But Stephen mentioned one of the most important reasons of all: Michigan is going to be crucial to not only holding the Democratic majority in the Senate, but also keeping the White House blue.
Elissa is in a strong position to win this open Senate seat in Michigan. But she cannot do it alone. With the polls showing this race in a dead heat, it is going to require all of us working together in the months ahead in order to hold this seat.

#
Peter,
This is a real quote from Jack Danforth, Missouri’s former three-term GOP U.S. Senator, about mentoring Josh Hawley during his 2018 campaign:
_**“Supporting Josh Hawley was... the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.”**_
**Here’s what happened:**
**[DEFEAT HAWLEY: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/40509?refcode=em20231227-4476&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4476%2E614464%2EmfI6Yn)**

clean_body: 3-term GOP U.S. Senator Jack Danforth: Supporting Hawley’s 2018 campaign was “the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life” Peter, This is a real quote from Jack Danforth, Missouri’s former three-term GOP U.S. Senator, about mentoring Josh Hawley during his 2018 campaign: “Supporting Josh Hawley was... the worst decision I’ve ever made in my life.” Here’s what happened: FIRST — In 2018, former Missouri Senator Jack Danforth recruited Josh Hawley to run for U.S. Senate. Danforth even cleared the crowded field of Republican challengers in Hawley’s primary. THEN — On January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley showed the world that he’s a coward and a fraud by raising his fist then running for his life at the U.S. Capitol. NOW — Danforth and a handful of Hawley’s other mentors + mega-donors are refusing to support his re-election campaign in 2024 — and recent reports from Morning Consult found Hawley’s approvals plummeting among Missouri voters. Republicans and Democrats across Missouri agree: Our state deserves better than a fraud and a coward like Josh Hawley representing us in the U.S. Senate — and we’re ready to vote him out in 2024. Now here’s why we need your help, Peter. Every dollar we raise gives us an opportunity to put Lucas and his message in front of Missouri voters between now and Election Day. And if we’re going to win this thing, we have to start off strong. So we’re asking: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thanks for all your help, Peter. Together, we’re going to defeat Josh Hawley and put everyday people in charge of our country. Team Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: It’s up to us to protect the Squad next year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I hope you’ve been able to enjoy some rest and relaxation during the
winter holidays. While we’ve rejuvenated with friends and family, this
year is rapidly coming to a close, and our progressive movement is facing
some tough fights ahead in 2024.

We’ve sent you headline after headline detailing AIPAC’s plans to spend
$100 million to try and oust the Squad from Congress during their upcoming
Democratic primary elections. It’s a very real threat, with the
GOP-funded, insurrectionist-supporting group actively recruiting and
backing moderate challengers to take on our progressive champions.

The 2024 elections may feel far away, but our Squad incumbents’ seats are
at stake in the primaries, which start as soon as April. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231227-2.gnuUtq&refcode=em20231227-32536&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32536%2E1203867%2E2pM8jo ]Will you
directly fuel our work to re-elect the Squad by pitching in
$3 before our December 31 deadline?

Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib are
not only leading the call for Palestinian human rights and a permanent
ceasefire in Gaza — they’ve spent their time in Washington fighting for
the bold progressive change our communities need and deserve, like
Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, affordable housing, the Green New
Deal, and more.

But groups like AIPAC that are funded by right-wing mega-donors aren’t
happy about that, and they’re giving it everything they’ve got to get
revenge on our progressive movement in 2024 by unseating those who
challenge the status quo.

I can’t imagine Congress without our Squad — can you?

We’re coming up on our end-of-year fundraising deadline in just four days,
and we’re still short of reaching our $75,000 grassroots fundraising goal
from emails like this one.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231227-2.gnuUtq&refcode=em20231227-32536&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32536%2E1203867%2E2pM8jo ]If you can, please chip in whatever is meaningful to you to power
Justice Democrats and directly support our efforts to protect the Squad in
the new year!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231227-2.gnuUtq&refcode=em20231227-32536&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=32536%2E1203867%2E2pM8jo ]Contribute $3

Unlike our opponents, we aren’t being bankrolled by corporate special
interests and right-wing millionaires. We exist because of people like you
contributing whatever you can, whenever you can.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=32536%2E1203867%2E2pM8jo ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=32536%2E1203867%2E2pM8jo ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231227-32536-footer&t=1024&refcode2=32536_1203867_2pM8jo&akid=32536%2E1203867%2E2pM8jo

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=32536%2E1203867%2E2pM8jo

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: LTC (Ret.) Alexander Vindman
subject: Adam, Eugene, and I all paid the price for doing the right thing.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| It’s more important than ever that we have staunch voices in defense of democracy in the House and Senate. Those voices are Eugene Vindman and Adam Schiff.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4873%2E5257348%2Eg8_fiw)
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em_vindman.Za93xO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4873%2E5257348%2Eg8_fiw)
Derek —
I’m writing to ask you to **[split a $10 contribution](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em_vindman.Za93xO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=5&akid=4873%2E5257348%2Eg8_fiw)** today between my brother Eugene Vindman’s campaign for Virginia’s 7th congressional district and Adam Schiff’s campaign for Senate.
Please let me explain why:
In 2019, in my role on the National Security Council, I witnessed a telephone call between then-President Donald Trump and Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky, during which Trump pressured Zelensky to launch a political investigation of Joe Biden as a quid pro quo to continue receiving United States military aid. I was shocked.
I alerted my brother Eugene who served as the NSC’s ethics attorney. We immediately informed our superiors and I eventually testified before a closed session of the House Intelligence Committee, on which Rep. Adam Schiff served as chair.
He led a thorough, honest investigation and eventually secured the first bipartisan vote in a Senate impeachment trial to convict a U.S. president in the history of our country. Each in our own ways, we exposed Trump’s abuse of power to the American public.
It was the right thing to do, Derek — but we all paid the price.
Then-President Trump retaliated swiftly and fired Eugene and me from the White House, ultimately ending our decades of military service.
And Trump, the Republican Party, and the right-wing media have spent every day since seeking to take down Adam Schiff, censuring him on a partisan vote and even trying to remove him from Congress — simply for championing the rule of law.
That’s why it’s up to us to have Eugene and Adam’s backs. Because they will always have our backs in the fight for our democracy and stand up for the integrity of our Constitution like they have for years.
Just look at January 6th and the ongoing attacks on fair elections. Look at Republican attempts to strip the fundamental right to vote. Look at Trump’s plans to purge the government if he wins again.
It’s more important than ever that we have staunch voices in defense of democracy in the House and Senate. Those voices are Eugene Vindman and Adam Schiff.
**[So please, split a contribution of $10 or whatever you can afford today between Eugene’s campaign for Virginia’s 7th district and Adam’s campaign for Senate. Every dollar makes a difference as we approach the end-of-year FEC fundraising deadline.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em_vindman.Za93xO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=6&akid=4873%2E5257348%2Eg8_fiw)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Eugene Vindman and Adam Schiff will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=dec2023_abs_em_vindman.g32T3v&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC90_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=7&akid=4873%2E5257348%2Eg8_fiw)
---

And Trump, the Republican Party, and the right-wing media have spent every day since seeking to take down Adam Schiff, censuring him on a partisan vote and even trying to remove him from Congress — simply for championing the rule of law. That’s why it’s up to us to have Eugene and Adam’s backs. Because they will always have our backs in the fight for our democracy and stand up for the integrity of our Constitution like they have for years. Just look at January 6th and the ongoing attacks on fair elections. Look at Republican attempts to strip the fundamental right to vote. Look at Trump’s plans to purge the government if he wins again. It’s more important than ever that we have staunch voices in defense of democracy in the House and Senate. Those voices are Eugene Vindman and Adam Schiff. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Eugene Vindman and Adam Schiff will go through immediately: | | | Thank you for taking the time to hear me out today, Derek. — Lt. Col. | | | Peter,

I can’t believe our end of year deadline is finally here.

Since I took office, I’ve been fighting day and night for people in Florida and across the country to be able to live the same American Dream I was lucky enough to experience.

I know that our best days are ahead of us, but only if we win in 2024 and stop Joe Biden and the radical Democrats from destroying the fibers of our nation.

Our end of year deadline is critical. It’s our last chance to build our war chest before we’re officially in an election year.

**When you step up right now, you’re not just giving a few dollars: you’re fighting for the kind of country you want your kids to live in.**

name: Sepi Shyne
subject: A major test of our strength
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=wrpr_hdr]
Hi friend,

Fundraising isn't fun, but it's critical to sustain a lasting movement and create real systemic change.

In a few days, our team will be reaching out to you about our upcoming end-of-quarter goal, and how important it is for us to reach it. After all of our hard work this year, on the frontlines for workers' rights, LGBTQ+ rights, safer communities, and to end discrimination and more, we cannot fall short of this major test of our movement's strength.

We have the momentum, the vitality, the spirit, and the joy to persevere through any challenge we face. We've been underestimated before, but we always push through to shine even brighter.

Friend, with our final FEC deadline coming up soon, we need our fundraising to reflect the strength and power of our movement. Please make a donation of any amount you're comfortable with today to further our mission for progress, equity, and justice. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231227_ss_eoq2_l1]

Power our movement [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=231227_ss_eoq2_b1]

Your support is always appreciated, friend. We couldn't do this without you.

With gratitude,

Mayor Sepi Shyne
#WomanLifeFreedom
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103922/images/Copy%20of%20Sepi%20high%20res%20headshot-min.jpg]
Mayor Sepi Shyne has taken on WeHo's biggest issues and delivered results. From raising the minimum wage to the highest in the nation to significantly reducing homelessness – she's running for Congress to fight for all of us. As the first out Iranian LGBTQ+ woman elected anywhere in the world, Sepi is committed to making the American dream a reality for everyone: For immigrants, the LGBTQ+ community, women, and anyone trying to make ends meet. It's our time to Shyne, make a donation today.
Will you join Sepi's team and support her for Congress?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=22559dae-03a5-ee11-bea1-002248223f36]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_shyne?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=22559dae-03a5-ee11-bea1-002248223f36]
PAID FOR BY SEPI SHYNE FOR CONGRESS

name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: Stand with Bob
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Instead of cozying up to megalomaniac billionaires, Bob is fighting for PA.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1508%2E552475%2EfVjnrv)
Peter – there are only a few days left until we close the books on the most important FEC deadline of the year, and what we raise will help demonstrate not only the strength of this campaign but also our values.
Contributions to emails like this one come from veterans, teachers, small business owners, and health care workers. It’s a testament to the kind of team we’re building across Pennsylvania – one made up of hard-working people who have Bob’s back. And this final end-of-quarter deadline of 2023 is a chance to demonstrate just that.
So please, stand with Bob Casey by giving what you can today: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-3?refcode=em20231227-3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20231227-3&refcode2=1508_552475_fVjnrv&akid=1508%2E552475%2EfVjnrv)**
While David McCormick is busy cozying up to megalomaniac billionaires like Elon Musk, Bob is focused on delivering for working families across the Commonwealth. Every day, it becomes clearer that McCormick is out for himself, not Pennsylvanianians. He couldn’t even be honest about where he lives.
Meanwhile, Bob Casey is a lifelong Pennsylvanian. He was born and raised in Scranton. He and Terese raised their family here. Pennsylvania is where he started his career in public service.
For those reasons and more, this race is personal to all of us. But it’s also the toughest one of Bob’s career. Mitch McConnell has promised to spend millions upon millions to defeat Bob and flip the Senate red. That’s why it’s so important that we have the resources to fight back.
[**This campaign’s strength comes from you, Peter. So please, chip in $5 or whatever you can today to help keep Bob in the Senate fighting for PA.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20231227-3&refcode2=1508_552475_fVjnrv&akid=1508%2E552475%2EfVjnrv)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-3?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20231227-3-el&refcode2=1508_552475_fVjnrv&akid=1508%2E552475%2EfVjnrv) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-3?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20231227-3-el&refcode2=1508_552475_fVjnrv&akid=1508%2E552475%2EfVjnrv) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-3?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20231227-3-el&refcode2=1508_552475_fVjnrv&akid=1508%2E552475%2EfVjnrv) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-3?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20231227-3-el&refcode2=1508_552475_fVjnrv&akid=1508%2E552475%2EfVjnrv) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-3?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20231227-3-el&refcode2=1508_552475_fVjnrv&akid=1508%2E552475%2EfVjnrv) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231227-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20231227-3&refcode2=1508_552475_fVjnrv&akid=1508%2E552475%2EfVjnrv)

Thank you,
Tiernan Donohue

subject: Ben is our guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ben Toma for Congress
body:

---
Fellow conservative,

This is Congresswoman Debbie Lesko, and I’m reaching out to ask for your support for **Ben Toma.**

Having announced my retirement from Congress after this term, **Ben Toma is the clear choice to fill this seat and continue fighting for the people of Arizona’s 8th District.**

Thanks to Biden and his Congressional allies, millions of illegal aliens are invading our unsecured borders, families continue to suffer under high inflation and interest rates, our freedoms are under attack, and the woke agenda is being forced down our throats.

Now, more than ever, we need principled, experienced leaders, _**like Ben Toma**_ , who will stand up for our values and advance our conservative priorities in Congress.

Ben wrote and passed legislation that included **the largest TAX CUT in Arizona history** and **universal SCHOOL CHOICE** , empowering parents to make decisions in their child’s education. He also passed **the Arizona Voter ID Act, and other bills to secure our elections.**

_**Congresswoman Debbie Lesko**_

**
Ben Toma’s family legally immigrated to the United States when he was just 9 years old. His family fled the dangers of communism at the time in Romania to seek freedom and build a new life here in America.

Ben is a small business owner and real estate broker, served on the Peoria City Council, and was appointed to the Arizona State House of Representatives in 2017. In 2018, Toma was elected in his own right and was quickly elevated to leadership roles by his peers. In the legislature, Toma authored and passed two landmark pieces of conservative legislation that were labeled “impossible” by both friend and foe.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Really need you to make your first contribution of $3, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I don't know about you, but when things get tough I find that the best thing to do is stay busy.
#

Peter,
I don't know about you, but when things get tough I find the best thing to do is stay busy. Knuckle down and work the problem, whatever it is.
That's one of the reasons I decided to run for elected office in the first place. It's one thing to see a problem and complain about it, and quite another to actually do something about it.
And today, I'm writing to you because my campaign is in a tough spot.
We took some time off for the holidays. We knew we'd take a hit to our numbers, but we've fallen WAY behind where we need to be to hit our goals before this critical end-of-year FEC deadline.
I'm not complaining, and it's not your fault. But it's a problem – one we have to fix. So I need you with me today.
I need you to make a donation and help us get back on track. Because if we don't hit these goals we can’t run the kind of campaign we need to – a campaign that can fight off both Kyrsten Sinema and Kari Lake. A campaign that can win, that can defend our majority in the Senate, that can protect our democracy itself.
[**So if you can afford to chip in $3, please do. Or if that's not the right amount for you, chip in whatever you can. The most essential, vital thing is that you make that donation.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231227-1-sm&t=1&akid=1611%2E734936%2EHTlhc-)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-dec23.THMJwK&amount=3&refcode=em231227-1-sm&t=2&akid=1611%2E734936%2EHTlhc-)**
---
****
| **[CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-dec23.THMJwK&refcode=em231227-1-sm&t=3&akid=1611%2E734936%2EHTlhc-)**
---
****
It might not seem like your donation can make a difference at a time like this, but believe me: It can.
Because with hundreds of others joining you it'll all add up fast. A few people have probably already put in their $3 or more by the time you get to this point in the email. And they're hoping you will, too.
So thanks in advance for your help. Really. It means a lot.
Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1611%2E734936%2EHTlhc-). Fellow American,

Green Beret Veteran Pat Harrigan is counting on YOU to help him meet his end of year goal to WIN in North Carolina. We need to absolutely CRUSH our goal if we’re going to have any chance of winning this November. This is our last end of month deadline before we’re officially in an election year, and our team wants to make sure we start our strong. There’s never been a better time to pitch in to elect a veteran to Congress. body:
| Peter, we know you’re busy with family and friends, so we’ll get right to it: Every dollar we raise through Dec. 31st at midnight will become public in the new year.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Immigration Court Backlog Explodes to a Record 3 Mil, Judges Average 4,500 Cases
body:
Besides crushing records for letting unparalleled amounts of illegal
immigrants into the U.S., the Biden administration’s catastrophic
open border policies are slamming the nation’s Immigration Court
System with an unimaginable backlog not seen under any president.

[alt_text]

[*****]
December 27, 2023

[article-image]
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66321&L=30992&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW1taWdyYXRpb24tYmFja2xvZy1leHBsb2Rlcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3f4cfcb9a81612d0f42c4f5293c77acbc437851cad5a78aecb8d3bfbd07af21e]

Besides crushing records for letting unparalleled amounts of
illegal immigrants into the U.S., the Biden administration’s
catastrophic open border policies are slamming the nation’s
Immigration Court System with an unimaginable backlog not seen under
any president. In November, the Immigration Court backlog exceeded 3
million pending cases, a shocking increase of around a million during
a period of just 12 months. A new report issued this week by the
nonpartisan Transactional Records Access Clearinghouse (TRAC) at
Syracuse University provides the ghastly figures taken straight from
the government.

Read More
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66321&L=30992&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW1taWdyYXRpb24tYmFja2xvZy1leHBsb2Rlcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=3f4cfcb9a81612d0f42c4f5293c77acbc437851cad5a78aecb8d3bfbd07af21e]

clean_body: Besides crushing records for letting unparalleled amounts of illegal immigrants into the U.S., the Biden administration’s catastrophic open border policies are slamming the nation’s Immigration Court System with an unimaginable backlog not seen under any president. [alt_text] [*****] December 27, 2023 [article-image] [] Besides crushing records for letting unparalleled amounts of illegal immigrants into the U.S., the Biden administration’s catastrophic open border policies are slamming the nation’s Immigration Court System with an unimaginable backlog not seen under any president. In November, the Immigration Court backlog exceeded 3 million pending cases, a shocking increase of around a million during a period of just 12 months. A new report issued this week by the nonpartisan Transactional Records Access Clearinghouse (TRAC) at Syracuse University provides the ghastly figures taken straight from the government. Read More [] [] "Last Warning to the West" w/ Dr. Shea Bradley-Farrell [] Judicial Watch: Emails Released on Decision to Not Allow a Menorah Lighting in Williamsburg, Virginia [] Another Green Energy Co. body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Progressive champions like Barbara Lee, Rashida Tlaib, Cori Bush, Ilhan Omar, and others have bravely spoken out against Israeli war crimes in Gaza.

In response, AIPAC is promising to spend "at least" $100 million to fund primary challengers to try to defeat them.

That's why we're proud to roll-out our brand new Peace candidate sticker that highlights these champions.

Donate $5 recurring or $10 one time and we'll send you our brand new Peace sticker! All proceeds will go toward defending these progressive champions under attack for trying to save innocent lives. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13099?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231227_FR_peacestickerRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_peacestickerRS2&amount=10&t=1011&akid=5107%2E5885482%2ET-o3XJ)

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13099?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231227_FR_peacestickerRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_peacestickerRS2&amount=10&t=1012&akid=5107%2E5885482%2ET-o3XJ

GET YOUR STICKER (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13099?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231227_FR_peacestickerRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_peacestickerRS2&amount=10&t=1013&akid=5107%2E5885482%2ET-o3XJ)

AIPAC thinks they can use their unlimited resources to silence progressives calling for peace, but with lives on the line, our champions will never back down from calling out illegal war crimes.

If these candidates lose for doing the right thing, the message would be chilling, and we can't allow that to happen.

That's why we're asking you to pitch in here to get our new Peace sticker! All proceeds support Peace candidates under attack. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13099?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231227_FR_peacestickerRS_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_peacestickerRS2&amount=10&t=1014&akid=5107%2E5885482%2ET-o3XJ)

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: Qasim Rashid
subject: We need 1000 more donors by December 31!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=34584%2E120265%2EBwf1XI ]Qasim for Congress

Hi, Friend,

My name is Qasim Rashid, and I am running for Congress in Illinois' 11th
district. Today, I am reaching out to you for help in achieving a critical
milestone in our campaign.

We're hoping to secure 1000 donors by December 31 to meet our fundraising
goal, and your contribution can make all the difference.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/4319?t=1002&akid=34584%2E120265%2EBwf1XI ]Click here to donate to our campaign.

Donations from people like you make this movement possible. While my
opponent continues to take contributions from fossil fuel and
pharmaceutical companies, I remain committed to getting money out of
politics so that the only people I am accountable to in Congress are my
constituents.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/4319?t=1003&akid=34584%2E120265%2EBwf1XI ]Click here to donate to our campaign.

Growing up in a low-income household, I know the daily struggles many of
us face. So, whether your donation is $1 or $111, I am deeply grateful for
your support of our grassroots campaign.

Thank you for your commitment to building a future that ensures justice,
opportunity, and equity for all Americans.

Sincerely,

— Qasim Rashid

Donate to our campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/qr-em-footer?t=1004&refcode2=34584_120265_Bwf1XI&akid=34584%2E120265%2EBwf1XI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1005&akid=34584%2E120265%2EBwf1XI
Update Your Information: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/update-your-info/
Unsubscribe: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=34584%2E120265%2EBwf1XI

Anti-Palestinian group AIPAC and its network of PACs are targeting progressive Black and brown members of Congress—flooding our working class districts with millions of dollars from far-right donors.
They’re attacking us for supporting a ceasefire, even though it’s what a vast majority of Americans want.
**Members of Congress are supposed to represent the people who vote for them―** and right now a majority of Americans, including 80% of Democrats, support our demands of a permanent ceasefire.**Our voices are critical in Congress, as too many of our colleagues vote to send billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars to bomb Gaza.**
Last year, AIPAC’s network spent more than $1 million trying to defeat me in my Democratic primary through mailers, and TV and digital ads. And they spent another $4 million in Summer Lee’s primary and general elections.
Now, they’re planning to spend at least $100 million in an attempt to defeat us and other progressive women of color in next year’s elections.
[**Please donate to my and Summer Lee’s re-election campaigns before our end-of-year fundraising deadline. From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Tues, Dec 26, 2023
Subject: Summer Lee has been by my side for Palestinians’ rights:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Last year, Rep. Summer Lee overcame more than $4 million in attack ads and mailers from the anti-Palestinian group AIPAC and its network of PACs.
She became the first Black woman to represent Pennsylvania in Congress. And in her first term, she’s been courageously leading calls for a ceasefire.
**Summer has been by my side, holding the Israeli and U.S. governments accountable for war crimes and human rights violations.** She joined me in voting against HR 894, a dangerous resolution conflating anti-Zionism with antisemitism that could silence and criminalize our movement.
**Because Summer Lee and I are standing up for human rights for all people (including Palestinians), right-wing groups that want to continue the genocide of the Palestinian people are planning to spend at least $100 million in an attempt to defeat us in next year’s elections.**

clean_body: We keep speaking up for Palestinians’ humanity, which takes political courage. | | | Friend, Rep. Summer Lee is a progressive champion in Congress, and she continues to bravely speak out against the Israeli military’s war crimes. Even though anti-Palestinian group AIPAC spent millions of dollars trying to defeat Summer in her first election to Congress last year, she will not be intimidated. She keeps speaking up for Palestinians’ humanity, which takes political courage. | Anti-Palestinian group AIPAC and its network of PACs are targeting progressive Black and brown members of Congress—flooding our working class districts with millions of dollars from far-right donors. They’re attacking us for supporting a ceasefire, even though it’s what a vast majority of Americans want. Members of Congress are supposed to represent the people who vote for them― and right now a majority of Americans, including 80% of Democrats, support our demands of a permanent ceasefire.Our voices are critical in Congress, as too many of our colleagues vote to send billions of U.S. taxpayer dollars to bomb Gaza. Last year, AIPAC’s network spent more than $1 million trying to defeat me in my Democratic primary through mailers, and TV and digital ads. And they spent another $4 million in Summer Lee’s primary and general elections. Now, they’re planning to spend at least $100 million in an attempt to defeat us and other progressive women of color in next year’s elections. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Summer Lee | | | | | | | | | Summer and I were grassroots activists before running for Congress, and we’re still holding firm to our values—even when it makes us targets. Summer has been by my side, holding the Israeli and U.S. governments accountable for war crimes and human rights violations. clean_body: We need your input | Fellow Conservative, We hope this email finds you well. Thank you for your dedication to the Conservative cause and for standing up for America. As you know, the midterm elections did not go as planned. We did not see the red wave we expected. We did take back the House majority, but we did not flip the Senate. Given the results of the midterm elections, we are curious to know what you think about the 2024 Presidential Election. | We would love to hear your thoughts. Thank you for your time and consideration. Sincerely, GOP Alerts Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2022 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

| | Friend,

---
2023 will forever be remembered as a dark year in American history.
---
The sitting president and ruling party have become a Third World Marxist _regime_ that weaponized the courts to unconstitutionally _**REMOVE**_ their leading opponent (_ME_) from the 2024 ballot.
---
They're already trying to throw me in JAIL for life as an innocent man, they've gagged and censored me, took a MUGSHOT of me, and are even seeking the "corporate death penalty" against me and my family...
---
_... But now, as the 2024 election rapidly approaches, their target is __**_YOU_**_ _._

_Crooked Joe is actively trying to_** _NULLIFY_** _every "Trump ballot" in America and _**_STEAL_** _this election from the majority of voters like YOU!_

What you are witnessing is not American, it is not even just "dirty politics," it is a dictator refusing to abdicate the throne.

But despite all this, despite the endless witch hunts, I have never been more confident that we _will_ emerge victorious in 2024. Mark my words, Friend, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

Because we have something the Left _NEVER_ will...

...A movement of more than 74 MILLION patriotic Americans who will _**NEVER**_ _**SURRENDER**_ their country to tyranny!

As America barrels down the path of Third World Marxist tyranny, I'm more committed than _ever_ to SAVING her. _**_Are YOU?_**_

subject: Just 5️⃣ days
body:
This deadline is weighing on my mind... |
---
| | Peter, I hope you had a great time celebrating Christmas with family and friends. I know I did.

Now as we get back into work mode and head into the New Year, there are three massive dates weighing on my mind.

_We have just**69 days **until the Primary Election Day on March 5._

_... just**40 days** until ballots are mailed out to every voter in the 47th District.

... and **just FIVE days** until our _**last major quarterly fundraising deadline of the year.**__

This deadline is HUGE. Our campaign has big plans for the next 69 days. The race is trending our way. But if we don't meet our fundraising goal, we'll be forced to make some tough decisions and start cutting back.

**[That's why I'm personally asking if you can generously chip in $10, $25, or even $100 to fuel our campaign in the final stretch.](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=0116466bcd&e=86e91e802d)**

---
| [CHIP IN $25](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=1328d1224e&e=86e91e802d "CHIP IN $25")
---
| [CHIP IN $50](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=853d2455b4&e=86e91e802d "CHIP IN $50")

---
| Look - we both know what our opponents are capable of. They have deep pockets. They'll do anything to win.

Just look at how they're trying to kick President Trump off the ballot altogether!

[We have a big fight ahead. If I didn't believe that every single dollar we raise puts us closer to victory, I wouldn't be asking for your help. ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=a8444a6d92&e=86e91e802d)

Thank you for all your support,

Max Ukropina

clean_body: This deadline is weighing on my mind... | | | Peter, I hope you had a great time celebrating Christmas with family and friends. I know I did. Now as we get back into work mode and head into the New Year, there are three massive dates weighing on my mind. We have just69 days until the Primary Election Day on March 5. ... just40 days until ballots are mailed out to every voter in the 47th District. ... and just FIVE days until our last major quarterly fundraising deadline of the year. This deadline is HUGE. Our campaign has big plans for the next 69 days. The race is trending our way. But if we don't meet our fundraising goal, we'll be forced to make some tough decisions and start cutting back. | "CHIP IN $25" | "CHIP IN $50" | "CHIP IN $100" | Look - we both know what our opponents are capable of. They have deep pockets. They'll do anything to win. Just look at how they're trying to kick President Trump off the ballot altogether! Thank you for all your support, Max Ukropina | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Max Ukropina for Congress, All rights reserved._

subject: Denied Protection (Again)

body:

Dear Peter,
This headline says everything you need to know:
* * *
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_12_27_23_email_1_2_nd&n=4)
* * *
**Despite threats, despite my family history...President Joe Biden is denying Secret Service Protection for me.**
This third rejection by the Administration is a travesty.
The implications are unmistakable: I am personally at much greater risk; as is my family and close staff, and our campaign is on the hook for security detail that costs us thousands of dollars that could otherwise be used to garner ballot access.
Only one thing will stop the political elites from having their way. It’s called people power.
Our grassroots supporters have funded our campaign, which is forced to hire private security (which already stopped an armed intruder with a Federal Marshal badge from entering an event.)
**If you want to help stop the dirty trick of denying Secret Service protection from succeeding,** [please donate to my campaign.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_12_27_23_email_1_2_nd&n=5)
[And there is no better time that right now—we’re closing in on the end of the year and our huge goal of raising $6 million dollars—and we are getting extremely close to reaching that goal.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=secret_12_27_23_email_1_2_nd&n=6)
Thank you again for all you have done, and will do, to take our campaign to the next level! Together we will heal this great nation, build bridges, and unite as one to restore honesty and integrity to Washington.
| |
---
---
Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
---

subject: To protect and strengthen democracy, we cannot be mere onlookers.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
