Friend – Democracy, much like a muscle, requires consistent exercise to thrive. In order to protect democracy, we have to do democracy.
As we stand less than a year away from the next election, our focus is unwaveringly fixed on pressing forward. Over the past several years, we put our nose to the grindstone alongside passionate supporters like you, and made real progress toward a truly representative democracy. Now, with the clock ticking down to 2024, we lean on your strength and commitment more than ever.
**Our mission is clear: we must hold leaders accountable, tirelessly advocate for fair maps across the nation, and unwaveringly uphold the core principles of democracy reform and election integrity.**
[**But, my friend, to turn these commitments into reality, we need your support. Will you make a donation to All On The Line to amplify our efforts ahead of 2024?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75917780/446113058/760843237?refcode=20231227_AOTL_P_EHHB2_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmM2YxY2E1LTBiYTUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aJ_j5E3hZ0JY0nmN33vqhL1kiosTuTMYnbcUFinFmc8=)

As we prepare to face the challenges of 2024, it's clear – to protect and strengthen democracy, we cannot be mere onlookers. The truth is democracy is a perpetual work in progress, shaped by our collective commitment.
Our victories are not just marks of endurance; they are a direct call for action. **We stand on the brink of history, and your support is a declaration of your unshakeable belief in democracy.** It fuels our fight, amplifies our collective voice, and safeguards democratic ideals.
**[Will you help boost our movement forward ahead of 2024 – toward fair maps and away from gerrymandering nationwide?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/75917788/446113066/760843237?refcode=20231227_AOTL_P_EHHB2_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNmM2YxY2E1LTBiYTUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aJ_j5E3hZ0JY0nmN33vqhL1kiosTuTMYnbcUFinFmc8=)**

– Eric H. Holder, Jr.

name: THANK YOU HOUSE DEMOCRATS! (VPP)
subject: your signature spot expires tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
this makes us proud to be Democrats
| Team, while the MAGA GOP made history for their incompetence this year, House Democrats stood unified for the American people!

We’re reaching out to 200 TOP Democrats across the country with the exclusive opportunity to thank House Democrats for their amazing work in 2023! **Hurry, your signature spot isn’t open long:[**Sign the thank you card now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58726?t=6&akid=12207%2E878179%2Eejksaj)** | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58726?t=7&akid=12207%2E878179%2Eejksaj)
---
TO: House Democratic Caucus
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you. **Dear House Democrats,

_Thank you for your incredible work for the American people!_**

The Republican majority is a total DISASTER. They ousted their own Speaker, threatened government shutdowns, and now, multiple members are resigning.

**Even Kevin McCarthy is abandoning ship!**

Meanwhile, your caucus under Rep. Hakeem Jeffries’s leadership did amazing work this year averting the shutdowns and standing up for our democracy.

Your strength makes me proud to be a Democrat — **and gives me hope that we can take down the GOP’s razor-thin majority in 2024!**

[**Fighting against the MAGA dark money machine won’t be easy, so I’m chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to enter the new year strong and to help flip the 5 seats we need to turn the House BIDEN-BLUE! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58726?t=8&akid=12207%2E878179%2Eejksaj) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/58726?t=9&akid=12207%2E878179%2Eejksaj)
---
**_X A GRATEFUL AMERICAN_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12207%2E878179%2Eejksaj). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12207%2E878179%2Eejksaj).**

name: Dean 4 Congress
subject: before the new year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
**** Team Dean – we’re just days out from 2024, and we’re gearing up for a tough election season. We know that Mike Johnson and national Republicans are eyeing the Philadelphia suburbs, and we have to be ready to defend Democrats like Mad from well-funded attacks. The House majority — and so much more — are at stake.

_We know that’s why you’re here, and we need your help._

**We set a goal to raise $10,000 before the upcoming FEC deadline to make sure we’re as prepared as possible to defend the Philly suburbs.[You can be a big help in keeping PA-04 blue by rushing a donation now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75918109/446114260/979907179?amount=25&refcode=12272023_md_eoy_fr_2&refcode2=55d64dc0-0da5-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWQ2NGRjMC0wZGE1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWumOC89PzcZ8QNyqBYb6SsQXt8Vb18b9GfH6T7TWwg=)** | | [ **RUSH A DONATION** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75918110/446114261/979907179?amount=25&refcode=12272023_md_eoy_fr_2&refcode2=55d64dc0-0da5-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWQ2NGRjMC0wZGE1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWumOC89PzcZ8QNyqBYb6SsQXt8Vb18b9GfH6T7TWwg=)
---
If national Republicans are able to cut into our margins in the suburbs, they will be that much closer to flipping Pennsylvania red – and ramming through an unpopular, out-of-touch agenda:
* Abolish the IRS and allow the ultra-wealthy to get away with not paying their fair share

* Increase financial pressures on working families with cuts to needed social programs

* Revoke reproductive rights at the federal level despite opposition from a large majority of Americans

---
In contrast, if Democrats retake the majority next year, we can expect House Dems to continue prioritizing the needs of all Americans:
* Lowering healthcare costs for seniors

* Investing in infrastructure to rebuild our roads, bridges, rails, and more – all while creating thousands of new jobs

* Fighting for solutions and investment on challenging issues like gun violence prevention and green energy solutions

---
Mad is laser-focused on protecting hard working Americans and creating a safer, healthier future for the next generations. _But if we aren’t careful, her work could be cut short._

**You are a top supporter, and we need as many folks as possible to chip in any amount – $5 or $24 or whatever you can – to show Mad’s got grassroots power that can take on the worst of this dysfunctional, dangerous iteration of the GOP.[Will you chip in before the year-end deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75918111/446114262/979907179?amount=25&refcode=12272023_md_eoy_fr_2&refcode2=55d64dc0-0da5-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWQ2NGRjMC0wZGE1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWumOC89PzcZ8QNyqBYb6SsQXt8Vb18b9GfH6T7TWwg=)**

Thanks,

Team Dean

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_
_We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. If you'd like to donate,[**click here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75918112/446114263/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=12272023_md_eoy_fr_2&refcode2=55d64dc0-0da5-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWQ2NGRjMC0wZGE1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWumOC89PzcZ8QNyqBYb6SsQXt8Vb18b9GfH6T7TWwg=) If you’d like to volunteer, [**click here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75918114/446114264/-410778297?refcode=12272023_md_eoy_fr_2&refcode2=55d64dc0-0da5-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWQ2NGRjMC0wZGE1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tWumOC89PzcZ8QNyqBYb6SsQXt8Vb18b9GfH6T7TWwg=&emci=ecd6f480-64a3-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&emdi=55d64dc0-0da5-ee11-bea1-002248223f36&ceid=36373569)_

clean_body: ** Team Dean – we’re just days out from 2024, and we’re gearing up for a tough election season. We know that Mike Johnson and national Republicans are eyeing the Philadelphia suburbs, and we have to be ready to defend Democrats like Mad from well-funded attacks. The House majority — and so much more — are at stake. We know that’s why you’re here, and we need your help. We set a goal to raise $10,000 before the upcoming FEC deadline to make sure we’re as prepared as possible to defend the Philly suburbs.= | | = If national Republicans are able to cut into our margins in the suburbs, they will be that much closer to flipping Pennsylvania red – and ramming through an unpopular, out-of-touch agenda: Abolish the IRS and allow the ultra-wealthy to get away with not paying their fair share Increase financial pressures on working families with cuts to needed social programs Revoke reproductive rights at the federal level despite opposition from a large majority of Americans In contrast, if Democrats retake the majority next year, we can expect House Dems to continue prioritizing the needs of all Americans: Lowering healthcare costs for seniors Investing in infrastructure to rebuild our roads, bridges, rails, and more – all while creating thousands of new jobs Fighting for solutions and investment on challenging issues like gun violence prevention and green energy solutions Mad is laser-focused on protecting hard working Americans and creating a safer, healthier future for the next generations. But if we aren’t careful, her work could be cut short. You are a top supporter, and we need as many folks as possible to chip in any amount – $5 or $24 or whatever you can – to show Mad’s got grassroots power that can take on the worst of this dysfunctional, dangerous iteration of the GOP.= Thanks, Team Dean Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress. We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. If you'd like to donate,= If you’d like to volunteer, = Paid for by Mad4PA PAC Mad 4 PA PAC PO Box 444 Glenside, PA 19038 United States Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, but we know that our inboxes can get flooded. Sign up for our to stay up-to-date with Mad and the campaign without overloading your inbox. We will only send you the important messages only a few times a month. . If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to .

| | | I gotta be honest, team: **I’m pretty freakin’ worried.**

Mitch McConnell and his cronies only need two seats to take back the Senate. And if they do, we can kiss everything goodbye -- reproductive rights, voting rights, level-headed Supreme Court justices... All of it.

**Worst of all, election experts think McConnell has a real chance at winning! It’s straight-up _BONKERS_!**

That’s why I’m reaching out today. Senate Democrats have a big end-of-year deadline coming up, and right now, they're WAY behind. **I'm not even talking about getting ahead. Just to keep up and keep McConnell's ultra-MAGA crew OUT of the Senate, we need to raise $500,000 BEFORE the end-of-year deadline.**

**[So for a limited time ONLY, a group of donors will personally TRIPLE your donation, but that'll only be enough to take on the GOP's megadonors if you step up right now. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: No do-overs or second chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Sorry to bug you, but this is important,
Derek:

Our final FEC deadline of the year is on December 31st, and we’re not
where we need to be to hit our fundraising goal for the quarter.

Once the clock strikes midnight (and we enter the New Year!), we’ll close
the books on our fundraising for the year and submit a report to the
Federal Election Commission detailing how much we’ve raised and how many
folks have pitched in over the last three months.

Shortly after we submit our fundraising report to the FEC, our numbers
will be made public for everyone to see — we won’t get any do-overs or
second chances.

Everyone from Mitch McConnell to my Republican opponents and right-wing
megadonors will pore through our numbers looking for vulnerabilities in
our campaign — and I want them to know I have a big grassroots team by my
side. That’s why I’m asking:

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2209?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20231227_FR_eoq_0_3MO_TammyBaldwin_TammyBaldwin_NA_eoq.2.2&t=1001&akid=6552%2E1827488%2EOrcgDW ]Will you split a donation between Tony Evers and my campaign to help us
hit our goal and report the strongest numbers possible to the FEC?
Anything you can spare will go a long way in our efforts to defend my
Senate seat and our Democratic majority.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately and be split between Tony Evers and Tammy Baldwin.

name: Jason Crow
subject: Creed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
| | “My country expects me to move further, faster, and fight harder than any other.” “I will shoulder more than my share of the task, whatever it may be, 100% and then some.” “Under no circumstances will I ever embarrass my country.”
---
This is the creed I pledged when I served as an Army Ranger. Serving in uniform was one of the greatest honors of my life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75918293/446114853/-486953699?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC30_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzk2YTJkOS0wZmE1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpWHnltAc7JUdIpwegBLHVmAykQUYLaQj0SjdQ-b0MU=)
After 9/11, I went active duty with the Army Rangers. I learned a lot while serving three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan.
It taught me respect.
It taught me how to work under pressure.
Above all, it taught me the value of selfless service. As a leader, it was on me to set the example — to be the last one to eat, and the first one to jump out of the plane.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/75918294/446114854/-486953699?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC30_20231227_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzk2YTJkOS0wZmE1LWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpWHnltAc7JUdIpwegBLHVmAykQUYLaQj0SjdQ-b0MU=)

name: Mike Rogers
subject: RAISE THE BAR!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
I’ll never be ashamed of my country, but the people in charge are embarrassing.| | |
---
Friend, You see that? All the way on the floor? That’s the bar for America’s public officials in 2023. An FBI that’s been plagued by over 200,000 ethics violations. A Secretary of Homeland Security that won’t do the simple task of securing our border. A President who vacations while Americans are desperate for help. Friend, This is former FBI Special Agent and Congressman Mike Rogers and I’ll always be proud of my country. But I’m **deeply** embarrassed by the people calling the shots right now. **[That’s why I’ve decided to take action.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=d4a719f3af824cd4b2dc2bf6b5368209&_e=GPdks9K8jyA-KU8EHMgVdhhkih_-0zZOL2nHCe07_sYRseXCUmVbblToSg8MB_JwqGkUVwFG_PlOUEQyTrLsvXATsFjUmrgdrWdjUyWrtg9UnCETWfykqDGgh22kZesagsJs2aFBAxogiV_TRqG_r13O-dq4gYhWp6DtMoLXgqJgltenXrn9thKZHvI5h9jlSXeB_fwcXUwe4Bd8Zf3h1C4QlswM86bn8LXHDXfcm-WiY4sMJAuAKfaqGXWZ3Oo-pjNO7SxrspsJebEBCuan411viIuXD8h7oFKowbJuOkW2123-S12_gMzQ37PiGcuyuXXCNrUhRGJ5RLceyU3a7a4F1vRlo5e_UUJ9RRIn5BjeVoJL_KUoG4J2YTzcythOlTHkCyFvpiNfl4mNZLLB5A8aEuncU2TDh9XwXToihGk%3D)** When my successor in Congress was sworn in eight years ago, I thought that would be the last I’d ever see of the U.S. Capitol. I was eager to get to work in my new role protecting Americans from Chinese cyberattacks. But seeing the way that D.C. elites are handling the country I love, I knew I couldn’t stay on the sidelines. I’m running for the U.S. Senate because we need to clean house of all the do-nothing bureaucrats and corrupt politicians that are ruining this country. We need to **RETIRE** Wray. We need to say **GOODBYE** to Garland. And most of all, we need to **MOVE OUT** Mayorkas! Americans deserve a government that they can trust, and that starts with getting rid of the corrupt career bureaucrats who have been selling out our country. Friend, can you **[contribute any amount](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=d4a719f3af824cd4b2dc2bf6b5368209&_e=GPdks9K8jyA-KU8EHMgVdhhkih_-0zZOL2nHCe07_sYRseXCUmVbblToSg8MB_JwqGkUVwFG_PlOUEQyTrLsvXATsFjUmrgdrWdjUyWrtg9UnCETWfykqDGgh22kZesagsJs2aFBAxogiV_TRqG_r13O-dq4gYhWp6DtMoLXgqJgltenXrn9thKZHvI5h9jlSXeB_fwcXUwe4Bd8Zf3h1C4QlswM86bn8LXHDXfcm-WiY4sMJAuAKfaqGXWZ3Oo-QPKMrqG_WN50-EtuMokxWEGOHRL0xJYYzUX1Ps3me-WJ4lIOKnZX1VPPQuPOIQwcfarVuyopJ4ngLcPCbFBeaOFnO4p7bGBvZQ-Xxh_rpAlFJ3iVWVYdfpt4crU0jzIq-v3MoO7ofc3-JTFrVk6JDNfj043DDe0mzOgpBE4XrN8%3D)** and help restore a little bit of integrity to Washington? Sincerely,

clean_body: I hope not | Friend, Time is running out, and it looks like we're still short of our End-of-Month, End-of-Quarter, and End-of-Year goals. Senator Grassley and Republicans need your help now more than ever. It's critical that we fight back NOW. Liberal millionaires are spending BIG to Keep the Senate and White House in 2024. It's critical that we give Senator Grassley the resources he needs to stop them in his fight to TAKE BACK THE SENATE, THE WHITE HOUSE , and STOP THE RADICAL LEFT. That 's why we're matching any donation made in the next 48 hours and rushing it immediately to to put it to work. Thank you for your help. Joe Team Grassley | Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. Copyright (C) 2023 The Grassley Committee, All rights reserved.

Let’s talk about Florida. I know some people like to write us off, but I know that in 2024 we can prove them wrong. We’re a diverse state full of people who believe that we all have a right to a better future. **I am proud to support Debbie for the U.S. Senate because I know she’s the leader who can make that vision of a better future a reality for millions of Floridians —** [**_and I hope you’ll join us by making a split donation to our campaigns today._**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/F7zgtD3Zc3VBbQrYZ-SssA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnbz5lP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1kbXAtc3BsaXQ_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIyN19lbV9mcl9iMV9kbXBzcGxpdF9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYTk5NUhoNkdtek9rdTFDY1I0ZnJYek9YUUgmcmVmY29kZTI9MmE5OTVIaDZHbXpPa3UxQ2NSNGZyWHpPWFFIJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJhOTk1SGg2R216T2t1MUNjUjRmclh6T1hRSFcDc3BjQgplg2W5jGXcfoA0UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) In my district, and everywhere I go around the state I hear Floridians talk about the issues they’re facing, and the inaction from our leaders in the GOP. We’re on the front lines of the climate crisis, but Rick Scott has dismissed it as “nuisance flooding.” We’re one of the last safe havens for abortion in the South, but Rick Scott has supported a national abortion ban. We’re the state with the largest enrollment in the Affordable Care Act, but Rick Scott is still pushing to repeal it. We’ve witnessed mass shooting after mass shooting in our state, but in the Senate, Rick Scott has voted with the NRA 100% of the time. These are all debates that should have been settled years ago — but GOP extremists like Rick Scott are trying to keep them alive in Florida. We can’t let them. Debbie is a candidate who understands the challenges Floridians face every day. Like so many Floridians, she is an immigrant who is proof that the American Dream is a reality. She’s a mom who understands the importance of quality education and safe schools. She’s a daughter who is her aging mother’s caretaker, and has seen how critical programs like Medicare and Social Security are. She understands the gun violence crisis because she lost her father to gun violence, and has dedicated her career to creating a safer world. **Debbie represents Floridians. Rick Scott represents himself.** This election has the potential to change our state for the better, but Debbie is up against Rick Scott and his multimillion-dollar fortune. That’s why I’m asking you today: [**_Will you chip in a split donation of $27 or whatever you can to my campaign and Debbie’s so we can build a grassroots movement that can defeat Rick Scott?_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/F7zgtD3Zc3VBbQrYZ-SssA~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnbz5lP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1kbXAtc3BsaXQ_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIyN19lbV9mcl9iMV9kbXBzcGxpdF9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yYTk5NUhoNkdtek9rdTFDY1I0ZnJYek9YUUgmcmVmY29kZTI9MmE5OTVIaDZHbXpPa3UxQ2NSNGZyWHpPWFFIJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJhOTk1SGg2R216T2t1MUNjUjRmclh6T1hRSFcDc3BjQgplg2W5jGXcfoA0UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) | | | [Donate $15](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/pFV5BFVLiJNUHpzK8ZJ1eQ~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRnbz5lP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1lbS1kbXAtc3BsaXQ_cmVmY29kZT0yMDIzMTIyN19lbV9mcl9iMV9kbXBzcGxpdF9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MTUmY2RtYz0yYTk5NUhoNkdtek9rdTFDY1I0ZnJYek9YUUgmcmVmY29kZTI9MmE5OTVIaDZHbXpPa3UxQ2NSNGZyWHpPWFFIJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJhOTk1SGg2R216T2t1MUNjUjRmclh6T1hRSFcDc3BjQgplg2W5jGXcfoA0UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)
